reply.findTool: Voici des outils qui correspondent à votre description :
reply.explainTool: Cet outil transforme les saisies de votre chantier en un verdict clair avec les facteurs de risque sous-jacents :
reply.inputs: Vous saisissez les coûts, quantités et taux essentiels de votre chantier. Les champs obligatoires restent minimaux, les champs optionnels affinent le résultat.
reply.results: Le résultat est un verdict avec les indicateurs et facteurs de risque sous-jacents, pour voir pourquoi il se situe là et ce qu'il faut ajuster.
reply.approvedReports: Les résultats premium peuvent être enregistrés comme résumés de décision exportables pour revue interne.
reply.trustTrace: Le Résumé du calcul enregistre les entrées, hypothèses et étapes de validation pour montrer comment le résultat a été produit.
reply.regionalUnits: SectorCalc prend en charge les unités métriques, impériales et régionales, et affiche les conversions utilisées.
reply.benchmarks: SectorCalc affiche un contexte de référence régional indicatif à côté de votre résultat — pour l'orientation, pas des chiffres officiels.
reply.pricing: Vous pouvez voir les offres et leur contenu sur la page des tarifs :
reply.enterprise: Pour l'usage en équipe, la gouvernance des rapports, les packs et les achats, consultez la page Enterprise :
reply.about: SectorCalc est une plateforme mondiale de calcul industriel et d'aide à la décision qui révèle les pertes cachées et transforme le calcul en décisions fiables :
reply.blockedFormula: Je ne peux pas effectuer de calculs ni partager de formules. Ouvrez l'outil concerné, il calculera le résultat pour vous.
reply.blockedPrivate: Je ne peux pas accéder aux données privées, aux comptes ou aux secrets, et je ne peux contourner aucune restriction.
reply.fallback: Je peux vous aider à trouver le bon outil, à comprendre les saisies et les résultats, et à naviguer dans SectorCalc. Essayez l'un de ceux-ci :

premiumSeo.metaTitle: {tool} | Guide prix, marge et risque | SectorCalc
premiumSeo.metaDescription: Comment fonctionne {tool}, à qui il s'adresse, ce que vous saisissez et comment lire le résultat. Aide à la décision sur le prix et le risque de marge par SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool} : chiffrez le chantier et protégez la marge
premiumSeo.intro: {tool} vous aide à éprouver un chantier avant de vous engager sur un prix. Il transforme vos coûts, quantités et taux en une lecture claire de la marge et du risque, pour repérer les facteurs cachés qui érodent discrètement le profit et décider avec confiance plutôt que de deviner sur le devis.
premiumSeo.howTo: Saisissez {inputs} pour votre scénario {sector}. SectorCalc exécute des formules déterministes contrôlées et renvoie {outputs}. Ajoutez des champs optionnels pour affiner seuils et risques.
premiumSeo.methodTitle: Résumé de la formule et de la méthode
premiumSeo.method: {tool} s'appuie sur la gouvernance formules de SectorCalc : entrées validées, pipeline déterministe et contrôles de seuil. Simulation technique — pas un conseil financier, juridique ou d'ingénierie.
premiumSeo.mistakes: Taux obsolètes, champs optionnels ignorés, unités mélangées et lecture du résultat comme profit garanti sont des erreurs courantes. {pain} Vérifiez les entrées avant toute décision.
premiumSeo.problem: La plupart des chantiers perdent leur marge bien avant la facture, lorsque la préparation, les reprises, les dépassements et les postes sous-évalués ne sont jamais additionnés avant l'envoi du devis. {tool} rend ces facteurs visibles pour qu'ils cessent de vous surprendre.
premiumSeo.help: Il applique le moteur de calcul déterministe de SectorCalc à vos saisies, puis met en évidence les facteurs qui pèsent le plus sur le résultat. Vous obtenez une lecture structurée et défendable, pas un chiffre opaque.
premiumSeo.who: Les exploitants, métreurs, dirigeants et responsables qui chiffrent des travaux, examinent des offres ou ont besoin d'une base cohérente en équipe tirent le meilleur parti de {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: Les champs principaux incluent {inputs} ({inputCount} entrées au total). Les champs obligatoires restent minimaux ; les optionnels affinent le verdict.
premiumSeo.outputs: {tool} renvoie {outputs} avec métriques, alertes de seuil et facteurs de risque — vous voyez pourquoi le chiffre se situe là.
premiumSeo.trustTitle: Résumés de décision premium & Résumé du calcul
premiumSeo.trust: Les résultats premium peuvent inclure un Résumé du calcul enregistré comme résumé de décision exportable.

faq.a: Vous pouvez prévisualiser l’approche gratuitement ; verdict complet, métriques et résumé de décision premium sont inclus dans SectorCalc Pro.
Non. C'est une simulation technique et un outil d'aide à la décision, pas un conseil financier, juridique ou d'ingénierie. Vérifiez les résultats avant toute décision.

faq.q: Quelle est la précision du résultat ?
faq.a: Les résultats reflètent vos saisies et le moteur déterministe de SectorCalc. De meilleures saisies donnent une lecture plus fine et plus défendable.
Oui. Les résultats premium peuvent être exportés comme résumés de décision avec un Résumé du calcul.
Il est calibré sur les schémas de prix et de marge de son secteur et s'intègre au reste de la boîte à outils SectorCalc de 27 secteurs.
Ouvrez l'analyseur, saisissez {inputs} et examinez {outputs}. Ajustez les entrées pour tester le scénario.

Demandez une démo et nous discuterons de vos secteurs, de la taille de votre équipe et de votre déploiement. Les tarifs des offres individuelles sont sur la page des tarifs.

homeAbout.title: À propos
homeAbout.paragraph1: Le profit fuit souvent des entreprises par des coûts inaperçus, et non par les ventes. Tarification erronée, erreurs de calcul, rebut, perte d'efficacité et faible discipline de devis érodent silencieusement les marges au fil du temps.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc est conçu pour rendre ces pertes invisibles quantifiables. Il hisse les décisions de coût, de devis, d'efficacité et de risque sur une base plus rapide, plus transparente et plus fiable.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: La précision du calcul est le fondement d'une performance fiable.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: Une plateforme qui révèle les pertes cachées,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: et transforme le calcul en aide à la décision fiable.

aboutPage.seoTitle: À propos de SectorCalc | Calcul industriel et aide à la décision
aboutPage.seoDescription: SectorCalc aide les entreprises à révéler les pertes cachées, à quantifier les risques opérationnels et à transformer les calculs industriels en aide à la décision fiable.

hero.title: Le calcul, transformé en décisions fiables.
hero.lead: SectorCalc est une plateforme mondiale de calcul industriel et d'aide à la décision qui aide les entreprises à révéler les pertes cachées et à agir en confiance.

why.title: Pourquoi SectorCalc existe
why.body: La plupart des pertes opérationnelles n'apparaissent jamais sur une facture. Elles se cachent dans la tarification, le rebut, le temps de réglage, les baisses d'efficacité et une faible discipline de devis, et érodent les marges en silence pendant des années.

what.title: Ce qu'est SectorCalc
what.body: Une suite ciblée de calculateurs sectoriels et de rapports de décision qui transforment des données opérationnelles brutes en chiffres clairs et défendables, ni un tableur de plus ni un ERP lourd.

problem.title: Le problème que nous résolvons
problem.body: Les équipes prennent des décisions de coût, de devis et de risque sur des informations incomplètes. SectorCalc rend l'invisible mesurable, pour des décisions fondées sur des preuves plutôt que sur des suppositions.

how.title: Comment notre système fonctionne
how.body: Vous fournissez les entrées que vous connaissez ; le système détermine ce qui est requis, exécute des calculs déterministes gouvernés et valide chaque résultat par rapport aux invariants et aux repères avant affichage.

different.title: Ce qui nous distingue
different.body: Chaque résultat inclut un résumé du calcul transparent, des benchmarks régionaux indicatifs et des hypothèses documentées que votre équipe peut revoir avant d’agir.

who.title: À qui il s'adresse
who.body: Aux dirigeants, estimateurs, équipes de terrain et consultants qui ont besoin de réponses rapides et fiables sans recruter une cellule de tarification complète ni déployer un logiciel d'entreprise.

building.title: Ce que nous construisons
building.body: Une norme mondiale pour l'intelligence de calcul sectorielle, qui s'étend à travers les industries tout en gardant chaque formule gouvernée, auditable et digne de confiance.

manifesto.primary: Une plateforme qui révèle les pertes cachées,
manifesto.secondary: et transforme le calcul en aide à la décision fiable.

premiumCategoryCatalog.subtitle: Outils premium de décision dans 20 catégories opérationnelles, avec calculateurs gratuits associés.

premiumSchemaPage.bullet1: Facteurs de perte cachée et contrôles de seuil
premiumSchemaPage.bullet3: PDF et CSV exportables sur les plans payants
premiumSchemaPage.legalQuestion: S'agit-il d'un conseil financier ou d'ingénierie ?
premiumSchemaPage.legalAnswer: Non. Les calculateurs premium SectorCalc sont des outils d'aide à la décision avec hypothèses transparentes. Ils ne remplacent pas un conseil financier, juridique ou d'ingénierie professionnel.

length.label: Longueur
length.helper: Longueur du concrete slab or structure in meters. Based on ISO 9001 measurement standards.

width.label: Largeur
width.helper: Largeur du concrete element in meters. Typical for industrial floors and foundations.

depth.label: Profondeur / Épaisseur
depth.helper: Épaisseur du concrete pour in meters. Common range for slabs: 0.1–0.3 m.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Geometric shape du pour Surface. Affects Volume calculation and parte factors.

wastefactor.label: parte Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected Matériau parte due to spillage, over-excavation, or formwork leakage. Lean Cible < 3%.

compressionstrength.label: Compression Strength Class
compressionstrength.helper: Concrete strength class par EN 206. Higher strength increases Coût and reduces Volume yield slightly.

reinforcementratio.label: Reinforcement Ratio
reinforcementratio.helper: Steel reinforcement as parcentage of concrete Volume. Typical range 0.5–3% for structural slabs.

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Hourly labor Coût for concrete placement and finishing. Based on regional wage data.

materialcostperm3.label: Matériau Coût par m³
materialcostperm3.helper: Coût of ready-mix concrete delivered to site. Includes additives if specified.

usepump.label: Use Concrete Pump
usepump.helper: Indicates if a concrete pump is required for placement. Adds Coût and reduces parte.

loan_amount.label: Loan Montant
loan_amount.helper: Total Capital borrowed, typically 80% of proparty Valeur.

down_payment_percent.label: Down Payment parcentage
down_payment_percent.helper: parcentage of proparty Prix paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Taux
annual_interest_rate.helper: Nominal Taux annuel, fixed or variable. utilisé for monthly compounding.

loan_term_years.label: Loan Durée (Années)
loan_term_years.helper: Durée du mortgage in Années. Standard Durées: 15, 20, 30.

property_tax_rate.label: Proparty Tax Taux
property_tax_rate.helper: Annual proparty tax as parcentage of proparty Valeur. Varies by jurisdiction.

insurance_rate.label: Home Insurance Taux
insurance_rate.helper: Annual homeowner's insurance as parcentage of proparty Valeur.

monthly_hoa.label: Monthly HOA Fee
monthly_hoa.helper: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

annual_income.label: Annual Gross Income
annual_income.helper: Total annual household income before taxes. utilisé for DTI calculation.

monthly_debt.label: Monthly Existing Debt Payments
monthly_debt.helper: Recurring monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, credit cards).

payment_frequency.label: Payment Frequency
payment_frequency.helper: How often payments are made. AcceleTauxd biweekly results in 13 full payments par year.

principal.label: Capital Montant
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan Montant in base currency.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Taux
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest Taux as a parcentage.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding pariods par year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

timeperiod.label: Temps pariod
timeperiod.helper: Total Durée of investment or loan in Années.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution par pariod
additionalcontribution.helper: Fixed Montant added at the end of each compounding pariod.

inflationrate.label: Inflation Taux
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual inflation Taux for real Valeur Adjustment.

taxrate.label: Tax Taux on Interest
taxrate.helper: parcentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

list_price.label: List Prix (par unit)
list_price.helper: Standard Selling Prix before any discount, as defined in ISO 9001 Coût accounting procedures.

discount_percent.label: Discount parcentage
discount_percent.helper: Negotiated or promotional discount off list Prix, typical in Lean pricing stTauxgies.

quantity.label: Order Quantité
quantity.helper: Number of units in the transaction, utilisé for Volume-based discount analysis par WERC DC metrics.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Coût par Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Matériau, labor, and variable overhead par unit (ISO 14051 MFCA standard).

fixed_cost_allocation.label: Fixed Coût Allocation (total)
fixed_cost_allocation.helper: Allocated Fixed Coûts for the order batch (e.g., Préparation, engineering, admin) par Lean Coût deployment.

discount_type.label: Discount Type
discount_type.helper: Method of discount application: parcentage off list or fixed dollar Montant par unit.

apply_to_all_units.label: Apply Discount to All Units
apply_to_all_units.placeholder: Saisir apply discount to all units
apply_to_all_units.helper: If true, discount applies to entire Quantité; if false, only to incremental units (tiered pricing).

total_units.label: Total Units Produced
total_units.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting pariod (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean parte reduction).

scrap_units.label: Scrap Units
scrap_units.helper: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (Matériau yield loss).

target_yield.label: Cible Yield (%)
target_yield.helper: Desired first-pass yield parcentage (Six Sigma Cible ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).

process_type.label: Process Type
process_type.helper: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).

include_scrap_in_defect.label: Include Scrap in Defect Count
include_scrap_in_defect.placeholder: Saisir include scrap in defect count
include_scrap_in_defect.helper: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect Taux calculation.

fixed_costs.label: Total Fixed Coûts (par pariod)
fixed_costs.helper: Sum of all Fixed Coûts (location, salaries, insurance, depreciation) for the pariod. ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.4.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Coût par Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Matériau, direct labor, and variable overhead par unit. Lean manufacturing standard Coût approach.

selling_price_per_unit.label: Selling Prix par Unit
selling_price_per_unit.helper: Net Selling Prix after discounts and returns. WERC DC Metrics benchmark.

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts par million defective. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Typical baseline 5000 ppm (3.8 sigma).

rework_cost_per_unit.label: Rework Coût par Defective Unit
rework_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Saisir rework coût par defective unit
rework_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût to rework or scrap a defective unit. Includes labor, Matériau, and overhead.

production_volume.label: Actual Production Volume (units)
production_volume.helper: Total units produced in the pariod. utilisé for actual vs. break-even comparison.

cost_allocation_method.label: Coût Allocation Method
cost_allocation_method.helper: Traditional uses single overhead Taux; activity-based uses multiple Coût drivers. ABC is recommended for ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3.

annual_revenue.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
annual_revenue.helper: Total annual revenue du facility or business unit.

operating_margin.label: Oparating Margin (%)
operating_margin.helper: Courant oparating profit margin as a parcentage of revenue.

total_inventory_value.label: Total Inventory Valeur (USD)
total_inventory_value.helper: Courant Valeur of all inventory held (raw Matériaus, WIP, finished goods).

inventory_carrying_cost_percent.label: Inventory Carrying Coût (% of inventory Valeur)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.placeholder: Saisir inventory carrying coût (% of inventory valeur)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.helper: Annual Coût to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital Coût). Typical range 20-30%.

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Direct Labor Coût (USD)
annual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual Coût of direct labor in the oparation.

defect_rate_percent.label: Defect Taux (%)
defect_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect (USD)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût incurred par defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Énergie Coût (USD)
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual Énergie expenditure for the facility.

lean_implementation_cost.label: Lean Implementation Coût (USD)
lean_implementation_cost.helper: One-Temps Coût for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

expected_improvement_factor.label: Expected Improvement Factor (0-1)
expected_improvement_factor.helper: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in parte).

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Type of industrial oparation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

iso_certified.label: ISO 9001 Certified
iso_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality Coût baselines.

direct_labor_hours.label: Direct Labor Heures par Unit
direct_labor_hours.placeholder: Saisir direct labor heures par unit
direct_labor_hours.helper: Standard Temps par unit from Temps studies (ISO 9001 clause 7.1.4).

hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage
hourly_wage.helper: Poidsed average of direct labor wages including shift diffelocationials.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Taux
overhead_rate.helper: Includes facility, utilities, indirect labor, and depreciation (WERC DC Measures).

tooling_cost_per_unit.label: Tooling Coût par Unit
tooling_cost_per_unit.helper: Amortized Coût of jigs, fixtures, and parishable tools (Lean TPM).

quality_cost_per_unit.label: Quality Coût par Unit
quality_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût of inspection, rework, scrap, and warranty (Six Sigma COPQ).

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced par Préparation (Lean SMED).

setup_time_hours.label: Préparation Temps par Batch
setup_time_hours.helper: Temps to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

profit_margin.label: Cible Profit Margin
profit_margin.helper: Desired markup over Total Coût (stTauxgic pricing).

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: ISO 4217 currency code for financial reporting.

include_setup.label: Include Préparation Coût in Taux
include_setup.placeholder: Saisir include préparation coût in taux
include_setup.helper: If true, Préparation Temps is amortized across batch size.

avg_days_receivable.label: Average Jours Receivable (DSO)
avg_days_receivable.helper: Average number of Jours to collect payment after a sale. High DSO indicates potential cash Débit issues.

avg_days_payable.label: Average Jours Payable (DPO)
avg_days_payable.helper: Average number of Jours to pay suppliers. Higher DPO can improve cash Débit but may strain supplier relationships.

inventory_days.label: Inventory Jours (DII)
inventory_days.helper: Average number of Jours inventory is held before sale. High DII ties up cash and increases holding Coûts.

operating_expenses_daily.label: Daily Oparating Expenses
operating_expenses_daily.helper: Total daily oparating Coûts including labor, Matériaus, overhead. utilisé to compute cash gap in moNetary Durées.

revenue_daily.label: Daily Revenue
revenue_daily.helper: Average daily revenue from sales. utilisé to compute cash conversion cycle and gap.

payment_terms_suppliers.label: Supplier Payment Durées
payment_terms_suppliers.helper: Standard payment Durées offered by suppliers. Affects DPO and cash gap.

customer_payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
customer_payment_behavior.helper: Historical customer payment behavior. Adjusts effective DSO.

lean_inventory_flag.label: Lean Inventory Practices Active
lean_inventory_flag.helper: Indicates if Lean inventory methods (e.g., JIT) are in place to reduce inventory Jours.

six_sigma_quality_level.label: Six Sigma Quality Level (Sigma)
six_sigma_quality_level.helper: Courant process sigma level. Higher sigma indicates fewer defects and less cash tied up in rework/scrap.

cutting_length.label: Cutting Longueur
cutting_length.helper: Total Longueur du tool path in contact with the workpiece. Derived from CAM or drawing.

feed_rate.label: Feed Taux
feed_rate.helper: Linear feed speed du cutting tool. Based on Matériau and tool specifications.

spindle_speed.label: Spindle Speed
spindle_speed.helper: Rotational speed du spindle. Affects cutting speed and surface finish.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes
number_of_passes.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final geometry.

rapid_traverse_distance.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
rapid_traverse_distance.helper: Total Distance traveled at rapid traverse (non-cutting moves).

rapid_traverse_rate.label: Rapid Traverse Taux
rapid_traverse_rate.helper: Maximum speed du machine during rapid moves.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change Temps
tool_change_time.helper: Average Temps to change a tool, including turret indexing.

number_of_tool_changes.label: Number of Tool Changes
number_of_tool_changes.helper: Total tool changes required for the oparation.

material_hardness_factor.label: Matériau Hardness Factor
material_hardness_factor.helper: Adjusts cutting Temps based on Matériau machinability. Refer to ISO 3685.

tool_wear_factor.label: Tool Wear Factor
tool_wear_factor.helper: Multiplier for tool wear. 1.0 = new tool, >1.0 = worn tool. Based on tool life data.

machine_efficiency.label: Machine Efficiency
machine_efficiency.helper: Efficacité globale des équipements (OEE) factor. Accounts for downtime, speed loss, and quality loss.

part_loading_time.label: Part Loading/Unloading Temps
part_loading_time.helper: Temps to load and unload the workpiece from the machine.

coolant_on_time.label: Coolant On Temps
coolant_on_time.helper: Temps for coolant to activate and stabilize before cutting.

measurement_time.label: In-Process Measurement Temps
measurement_time.helper: Temps for probing or manual measurement during the cycle.

energy_consumption_kwh.label: Énergie Consommation (kWh)
energy_consumption_kwh.helper: Total metered kilowatt-Heures for the billing pariod. utilisé as primary driver for Énergie Coût.

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest 15-minute average demand in the pariod. Drives demand charges par utility tariff.

energy_rate_per_kwh.label: Énergie Taux ($/kWh)
energy_rate_per_kwh.helper: Blended Énergie charge from utility bill, including generation and transmission.

demand_rate_per_kw.label: Demand Taux ($/kW)
demand_rate_per_kw.helper: Monthly demand charge par kW of peak demand, varies by utility and region.

power_factor.label: Puissance Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real Puissance to appalocation Puissance. Low PF incurs penalties par utility tariff.

pf_penalty_threshold.label: PF Penalty Threshold
pf_penalty_threshold.helper: Minimum Puissance factor before penalty applies, typically 0.9 par utility standards.

pf_penalty_rate.label: PF Penalty Taux ($/kvar)
pf_penalty_rate.helper: Coût par reactive Puissance (kvar) when PF below threshold.

system_efficiency.label: System Efficiency (%)
system_efficiency.helper: Overall electrical system efficiency including transformers, cables, and motors. utilisé for loss adjustment.

operating_hours.label: Oparating Heures par Month
operating_hours.helper: Total Heures the facility opeTauxs in the billing pariod. utilisé for Facteur de charge calculation.

tariff_type.label: Tariff Type
tariff_type.helper: Utility Taux structure. Affects how Énergie and demand charges are calculated.

include_demand_charge.label: Include Demand Charge
include_demand_charge.helper: Toggle to include or exclude demand charges from Total Coût.

compressor_power_rating.label: Compressor Motor Puissance Rating
compressor_power_rating.helper: Nameplate Puissance du compressor motor. Typically from 5 kW to 5000 kW for industrial units.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency du electric motor driving the compressor. Premium efficiency motors (IE3/IE4) are >90%.

compressor_type.label: Compressor Type
compressor_type.helper: Diffelocation compressor types have diffelocation specific Puissance curves and maintenance profiles.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total annual oparating Heures. Typical industrial: 8000 Heures (2 shifts, 5 Jours).

load_factor.label: Facteur de charge (Average % of Full Load)
load_factor.placeholder: Saisir facteur de charge (average % of full load)
load_factor.helper: Average parcentage of full load capacity at which the compressor opeTauxs. Includes part-load and unloaded pariods.

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Coût
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Blended average Coût par kWh including demand charges. Typical range $0.05-$0.30.

leakage_percentage.label: Estimated System Leakage
leakage_percentage.helper: parcentage of compressed air lost through leaks. Typical industrial systems: 20-30%.

pressure_setpoint.label: System Pression Setpoint
pressure_setpoint.helper: Oparating Pression at the compressor discharge. Higher Pression increases Énergie Consommation by ~1% par 0.1 bar.

ambient_temperature.label: Average Ambient Temparature
ambient_temperature.helper: Average ambient temparature at compressor intake. Higher temparature reduces air Densité and increases Puissance.

has_vsd.label: Variable Speed Drive (VSD) Installed
has_vsd.helper: VSD can reduce Énergie Consommation by 15-35% under part-load conditions.

maintenance_quality.label: Maintenance Quality Level
maintenance_quality.helper: Maintenance quality affects efficiency, leakage, and Pression drop. Poor maintenance can increase Énergie use by 10-20%.

length_cm.label: Longueur (cm)
length_cm.helper: Physical Longueur du package in centimeters. ISO 1:2016 standard for geometric product specifications.

width_cm.label: Largeur (cm)
width_cm.helper: Physical Largeur du package in centimeters.

height_cm.label: Hauteur (cm)
height_cm.helper: Physical Hauteur du package in centimeters.

actual_weight_kg.label: Actual Poids (kg)
actual_weight_kg.helper: Gross Poids du package including packaging. par ISO 80000-4:2006.

carrier_factor.label: Carrier DIM Factor
carrier_factor.helper: Volumetric Diviseur utilisé by carrier (e.g., FedEx/UPS: 5000, DHL: 5000, Air freight: 6000). WERC standard.

package_type.label: Package Type
package_type.helper: Type of packaging influences dimensional stability and handling. Lean packaging standard.

is_stackable.label: Stackable
is_stackable.helper: Indicates if package can be stacked. Affects storage Densité and handling Coût. Six Sigma Matériau Débit optimization.

hazardous_material.label: Hazardous Matériau
hazardous_material.helper: Indicates if contents are hazardous (IMO/ADR/IATA). Affects surcharges and handling restrictions.

distance_km.label: Route Distance (km)
distance_km.helper: Total one-way Distance du route. utilisé as primary driver for Carburant, labor, and maintenance Coûts.

fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.label: Carburant Consommation (L/100km)
fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.helper: Average Carburant Consommation du vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

fuel_price_per_l.label: Carburant Prix (par liter)
fuel_price_per_l.helper: Courant market Prix of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage (€/hour)
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

average_speed_kmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmh.helper: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. utilisé pour calculer travel Temps.

maintenance_cost_per_km.label: Maintenance Coût (€/km)
maintenance_cost_per_km.helper: Average maintenance Coût par kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

toll_cost_total.label: Total Toll Coût (€)
toll_cost_total.helper: Sum of all Péages on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Poids (tonnes)
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total Poids of cargo. Affects Carburant Consommation and wear.

route_type.label: Route Type
route_type.helper: Characterizes the terrain and traffic conditions. Influences Carburant Consommation and speed.

is_return_trip.label: Return Trip Included
is_return_trip.helper: If true, Distance and Coûts are doubled (round trip).

distance_km.label: Distance (km)
distance_km.helper: Total route Distance from origin to destination, utilisé for Carburant and Temps Coût calculations.

fuel_cost_per_liter.label: Carburant Coût par Liter
fuel_cost_per_liter.helper: Courant average Carburant Prix par liter, directly impacts variable Transport Coût.

fuel_efficiency_kmpl.label: Carburant Efficiency (km/L)
fuel_efficiency_kmpl.helper: Vehicle Carburant Consommation Taux in kilometers par liter, key for Carburant Coût estimation.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage par Hour
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage du driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

average_speed_kmph.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmph.helper: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, utilisé to compute travel Temps.

load_weight_kg.label: Load Poids (kg)
load_weight_kg.helper: Total Poids of cargo, affects Carburant Consommation and handling Coûts.

handling_cost_per_kg.label: Handling Coût par kg
handling_cost_per_kg.helper: Coût for loading/unloading and warehouse handling par kilogram of cargo.

vehicle_maintenance_per_km.label: Vehicle Maintenance par km
vehicle_maintenance_per_km.helper: Average maintenance Coût par kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

toll_cost.label: Toll Coût
toll_cost.helper: Total toll charges along the route, if applicable.

insurance_rate_per_kg.label: Insurance Taux par kg
insurance_rate_per_kg.helper: Insurance premium par kilogram of cargo Valeur, covering risk during transit.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead parcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect Coûts (administration, IT, facilities) as a parcentage of direct Coûts.

is_express_delivery.label: Express Delivery
is_express_delivery.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier to reflect expedited service Coûts.

delivery_zone.label: Delivery Zone
delivery_zone.helper: Geographic zone classification affecting last-mile complexity and Coût multipliers.

shipment_weight_kg.label: Shipment Poids (kg)
shipment_weight_kg.helper: Total Poids du shipment, including packaging. utilisé for Taux base and dimensional Poids calculations.

shipment_volume_cbm.label: Shipment Volume (cbm)
shipment_volume_cbm.helper: Total cubic meters du shipment. utilisé for dimensional Poids factor and space utilization analysis.

distance_km.label: Distance (km)
distance_km.helper: Total Transport Distance from origin to destination. Influences Carburant surcharge and Temps-based Coûts.

transport_mode.label: Transport Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of Transport. Each mode has distinct Coût structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

fuel_surcharge_percent.label: Carburant Surcharge (%)
fuel_surcharge_percent.helper: parcentage applied to base freight Taux to account for Carburant Prix variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

accessorial_charges_usd.label: Accessorial Charges (USD)
accessorial_charges_usd.helper: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

density_factor.label: Densité Factor (kg/cbm)
density_factor.helper: Actual Densité du shipment. utilisé to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable Poids.

is_hazardous.label: Hazardous Matériau
is_hazardous.helper: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

is_expedited.label: Expedited Service
is_expedited.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier for Temps-definite delivery.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Prix (USD)
purchase_price.helper: Initial acquisition Coût du vehicle, including taxes and fees.

residual_value.label: Residual Valeur (USD)
residual_value.helper: Estimated market Valeur du vehicle at the end du holding pariod.

holding_period_years.label: Holding pariod (Années)
holding_period_years.helper: Expected number of Années the vehicle will be owned and utilisé.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
annual_mileage.helper: Average miles driven par year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method utilisé to allocate depreciation expense over the holding pariod.

maintenance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Maintenance Coût (USD)
maintenance_cost_per_year.helper: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

fuel_efficiency_mpg.label: Carburant Efficiency (MPG)
fuel_efficiency_mpg.helper: Miles par gallon, utilisé to estimate Carburant Coût and Total Coût of ownership.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: Carburant Prix par Gallon (USD)
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Courant or projected average Carburant Prix for the vehicle's Carburant type.

insurance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Insurance Coût (USD)
insurance_cost_per_year.helper: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (%)
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount Taux utilisé for Net present Valeur calculations (Coût of capital).

vehicle_type.label: Vehicle Type
vehicle_type.helper: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

crop_type.label: Crop Type
crop_type.helper: DeDuréeines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

target_yield.label: Cible Yield
target_yield.helper: Expected harvest par hectare, utilisé pour calculer total nutrient demand.

soil_nitrogen.label: Soil Nitrogen (N) Content
soil_nitrogen.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the Montant of N fertilizer needed.

soil_phosphorus.label: Soil Phosphorus (P) Content
soil_phosphorus.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the Montant of P fertilizer needed.

soil_potassium.label: Soil Potassium (K) Content
soil_potassium.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the Montant of K fertilizer needed.

application_efficiency.label: Application Efficiency Factor
application_efficiency.helper: parcentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

fertilizer_type_n.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_n.helper: Diffelocation sources have diffelocation N concentration and loss characteristics.

fertilizer_type_p.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_p.helper: Diffelocation sources have diffelocation P concentration and solubility.

fertilizer_type_k.label: Potassium Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_k.helper: Diffelocation sources have diffelocation K concentration and salt index.

soil_moisture.label: Soil Moisture Content
soil_moisture.helper: Affects nutrient Disponibilité and leaching risk; utilisé in loss adjustment.

rainfall_forecast.label: Rainfall Forecast (next 7 Jours)
rainfall_forecast.helper: Expected precipitation; high rainfall increases N loss via leaching and denitrification.

organic_matter.label: Soil Organic Matter
organic_matter.helper: Contributes to nutrient supply; higher OM reduces fertilizer requirement.

target_population.label: Cible Plant Population (plants/ha)
target_population.helper: Desired final stand count par hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

germination_rate.label: Germination Taux (%)
germination_rate.helper: parcentage of seeds expected to germinate under optimal conditions, typically from seed lot analysis.

field_emergence_factor.label: Field Emergence Factor (%)
field_emergence_factor.helper: Expected parcentage of germinated seeds that emerge as healthy seedlings, accounting for soil conditions, pests, and weather.

seed_weight.label: Seed Poids (g par 1000 seeds)
seed_weight.helper: Thousand kernel Poids (TKW) from seed supplier or lab test, utilisé to convert seed count to mass.

row_spacing.label: Row Spacing (cm)
row_spacing.helper: Distance between planting rows, typically set by planter configuration and crop type.

planter_efficiency.label: Planter Efficiency (%)
planter_efficiency.helper: Oparational efficiency du planter accounting for skips, doubles, and mechanical losses (Lean OEE metric).

seed_cost_per_unit.label: Seed Coût par Unit ($/kg)
seed_cost_per_unit.helper: Purchase Prix of seed par kilogram, utilisé for economic analysis.

expected_yield_value.label: Expected Yield Valeur ($/tonne)
expected_yield_value.helper: Market Prix par tonne of harvested crop, utilisé for ROI calculations.

soil_type.label: Soil Type
soil_type.helper: Soil texture classification affecting emergence factor and recommended seeding Profondeur.

irrigation_available.label: Irrigation Available
irrigation_available.helper: Indicates if supplemental irrigation is utilisé, influencing emergence and Cible population.

water_volume.label: Annual water Volume utilisé
water_volume.helper: Total Volume of water withdrawn for irrigation par year.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water Coût par m³
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Unit Coût of water including extraction, treatment, and delivery.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Énergie Coût par kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity Coût for pumping and distribution.

pump_efficiency.label: Pump system efficiency
pump_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency of pump and motor system (ISO 9906).

distribution_losses.label: Distribution losses
distribution_losses.helper: parcentage of water lost due to leaks, evaporation, and runoff.

labor_hours_per_year.label: Annual Labor Heures for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.placeholder: Saisir annual labor heures for irrigation
labor_hours_per_year.helper: Total Labor Heures dedicated to irrigation oparation and maintenance.

maintenance_cost.label: Annual maintenance Coût
maintenance_cost.helper: Total annual Coût for repairs, parts, and servicing.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level

data_points.label: Data Points (comma-sepaTauxd)

height_cm.label: Hauteur
height_cm.helper: Stature measured par ISO 7250-1:2017 basic human body measurements.

age_years.label: Age
age_years.helper: Chronological age utilisé in metabolic Taux decay modeling.

body_fat_percent.label: Body Fat parcentage (optional)
body_fat_percent.helper: utilisé for lean body mass estimation (DEXA or skinfold par ISAK standards). If null, default estimation is applied.

activity_factor.label: Activity Factor (PAL)
activity_factor.helper: Physical Activity Level par WHO/FAO/UNU expart consultation (2004). utilisé for total Énergie expenditure estimation.

measurement_confidence.label: Measurement Confidence Level
measurement_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of Entrée data quality (e.g., calibTauxd equipment, self-reported vs. lab). Influences dataConfidenceAdjusted output.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Biological sex utilisé in anthropometric regression models (ISO 7250-1).

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects body composition and metabolic Taux (Six Sigma DMAIC phase: Measure).

height.label: Hauteur
height.helper: Stature measurement par ISO 7250-1 for normalization.

weight.label: Poids
weight.helper: Body mass for BMI and fat mass calculations.

neckcircumference.label: Neck Circumference
neckcircumference.helper: Key Entrée for body Densité estimation (Navy method, Lean Six Sigma MSA).

waistcircumference.label: Waist Circumference
waistcircumference.helper: Abdominal girth for visceral fat risk (WERC ergonomic guidelines).

hipcircumference.label: Hip Circumference
hipcircumference.helper: Required for female body fat calculation (ISO 20685).

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier for Énergie expenditure (Lean Kaizen continuous improvement).

bolt_grade.label: Bolt Grade / Proparty Class
bolt_grade.helper: Defines yield and tensile strength par ISO 898-1.

thread_pitch.label: Thread Pitch (P)
thread_pitch.helper: Distance between thread crests. Coarse or fine.

friction_coefficient_thread.label: Friction Coefficient (Thread)
friction_coefficient_thread.helper: µ_th: affects torque-preload relationship. Typical range 0.08-0.20 for lubricated steel.

friction_coefficient_head.label: Friction Coefficient (Head/Nut face)
friction_coefficient_head.helper: µ_h: underhead or nut face friction. Higher Valeurs reduce preload efficiency.

preload_percentage.label: Cible Preload (% of Yield)
preload_percentage.helper: Typical assembly preload Cible. ISO 898 recommends 70-80% for static joints.

lubrication_condition.label: Lubrication Condition
lubrication_condition.helper: Affects friction coefficients and torque scatter.

temperature.label: Oparating Temparature
temperature.helper: High temparature reduces yield strength and alters friction.

use_washers.label: Use Washers (Under Head & Nut)
use_washers.helper: Washers reduce embedment and distribute load.

bottleneck_utilization.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
bottleneck_utilization.helper: Courant utilization Taux du primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative pariod (e.g., last 4 weeks).

demand_rate.label: Average Demand Taux (units/hour)
demand_rate.helper: Average customer demand Taux for the product family Débiting through the bottleneck.

bottleneck_capacity.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
bottleneck_capacity.helper: Maximum theoretical output Taux du bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

investment_cost.label: Proposed Investment Coût ($)
investment_cost.helper: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

expected_capacity_increase.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
expected_capacity_increase.helper: Expected parcentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned oparating Heures du bottleneck resource par year.

profit_margin_per_unit.label: Profit Margin par Unit ($)
profit_margin_per_unit.helper: Contribution margin (revenue minus Variable Coût) par unit of product Débiting through the bottleneck.

quality_yield.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
quality_yield.helper: First-pass yield (parcentage of Unités conformes) at the bottleneck oparation.

maintenance_downtime_percent.label: Planned Maintenance Downtime (%)
maintenance_downtime_percent.helper: parcentage of total oparating Temps allocated to planned maintenance for the bottleneck.

risk_factor.label: Implementation Risk Factor
risk_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment du risk that the investment will not achieve the expected capacity increase.

fixedcosts.label: Total Fixed Coûts
fixedcosts.helper: Sum of all fixed expenses (location, salaries, insurance) par pariod.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Coût par Unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct Matériau, labor, and overhead par unit.

actualsalesvolume.label: Actual Sales Volume
actualsalesvolume.helper: Number of units actually sold in the pariod.

capacityvolume.label: Maximum Capacity Volume
capacityvolume.helper: Theoretical maximum output under normal oparating conditions.

demanduncertainty.label: Demand Uncertainty Factor
demanduncertainty.helper: Expected parcentage variation in demand (coefficient of variation).

costescalationrate.label: Coût Escalation Taux
costescalationrate.helper: Annual expected increase in Variable Coûts (inflation, supplier pricing).

includetax.label: Include Tax Effect
includetax.helper: If true, tax Taux Entrée is required and after-tax break-even is calculated.

taxrate.label: Tax Taux
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoTaux tax Taux, utilisé only when includeTax is true.

calibration_interval_days.label: Calibration Interval (Jours)
calibration_interval_days.helper: Standard calibration frequency par ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommendation.

days_since_last_calibration.label: Jours Since Last Calibration
days_since_last_calibration.helper: Actual elapsed Temps since the most recent calibration event.

measurement_tolerance_pct.label: Measurement Tolerance (%)
measurement_tolerance_pct.helper: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal Valeur, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.

observed_drift_pct.label: Observed Drift (%)
observed_drift_pct.helper: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as parcentage of full scale.

environmental_stress_factor.label: Environmental Stress Factor
environmental_stress_factor.helper: Qualitative assessment of temparature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift Taux.

criticality_level.label: Criticality Level
criticality_level.helper: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (par ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).

historical_failure_rate.label: Historical Failure Taux (par 100 calibrations)
historical_failure_rate.helper: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, utilisé for reliability trending.

data_confidence_score.label: Data Confidence Score (0-100)
data_confidence_score.helper: Subjective or calculated measure of data quality based on measurement system analysis (MSA) par AIAG MSA manual.

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic Taux (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender influences BMR through différences in body composition and hormonal profiles.

weight.label: Poids
weight.helper: Body Poids is a primary driver of Énergie expenditure and calorie needs.

height.label: Hauteur
height.helper: Hauteur is utilisé in BMR equations to estimate lean body mass and metabolic Taux.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.

goalrate.label: Poids Loss Taux
goalrate.helper: Desired weekly Poids loss Taux deDuréeines the daily calorie deficit Cible.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat parcentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional Entrée for more accuTaux BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.

ispregnant.label: Pregnant
ispregnant.helper: Pregnancy increases Énergie requirements; deficit is not recommended during pregnancy.

islactating.label: Lactating
islactating.helper: Lactation adds ~500 kcal/day to Énergie needs; deficit must be adjusted.

electricity_kwh.label: Electricity Consommation
electricity_kwh.helper: Annual electricity usage from utility bills or submeters. Scope 2 emission source.

natural_gas_therms.label: Natural Gas Consommation
natural_gas_therms.helper: Annual natural gas usage from utility bills. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_diesel_liters.label: Diesel Carburant Consommation (Fleet)
fuel_diesel_liters.helper: Annual diesel Consommation for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_gasoline_liters.label: Gasoline Carburant Consommation (Fleet)
fuel_gasoline_liters.helper: Annual gasoline Consommation for owned fleet vehicles. Scope 1 emission source.

waste_tonnes.label: parte GeNetauxd
waste_tonnes.helper: Total parte sent to landfill or incineration. Scope 3 emission source.

business_travel_km.label: Business Travel (Air & Rail)
business_travel_km.helper: Annual Distance traveled by Employés for business purposes (air, rail). Scope 3 emission source.

region.label: Oparational Region
region.helper: Geographic region deDuréeines emission factors for electricity grid and Carburant standards.

data_quality_score.label: Data Quality Score (1-5)
data_quality_score.helper: Subjective score of Entrée data reliability: 1=estimated, 3=measured, 5=audited. utilisé for confidence adjustment.

energy_consumption.label: Total Énergie Consommation
energy_consumption.helper: Annual electrical Énergie utilisée by the facility (ISO 50001).

energy_source.label: Primary Énergie Source
energy_source.helper: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

fuel_consumption.label: Fossil Carburant Consommation (Fleet & Heating)
fuel_consumption.helper: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil utilisé annually (Scope 1 emissions).

waste_generated.label: Total parte GeNetauxd
waste_generated.helper: Annual parte sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

recycling_rate.label: Recycling Taux
recycling_rate.helper: parcentage of parte that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total units produced par year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

transport_distance.label: Average Transport Distance par Unit
transport_distance.placeholder: Saisir average Transport Distance par unit
transport_distance.helper: Average Distance raw Matériaus or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

has_carbon_offset_program.label: Active Carbon Offset Program
has_carbon_offset_program.helper: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

total_imported_tonnes.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
total_imported_tonnes.helper: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting pariod.

embedded_emissions_per_tonne.label: Embedded Emissions par Tonne
embedded_emissions_per_tonne.helper: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

carbon_price_origin.label: Prix du carbone Paid in Country of Origin
carbon_price_origin.placeholder: Saisir prix du carbone paid in country of origin
carbon_price_origin.helper: Effective Prix du carbone already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

cbam_certificate_price.label: CBAM Certificate Prix (Courant auction)
cbam_certificate_price.helper: Latest weekly average auction Prix of CBAM certificates.

free_allocation_factor.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
free_allocation_factor.placeholder: Saisir free allocation factor for sector
free_allocation_factor.helper: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

verification_status.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
verification_status.placeholder: Saisir verification status of embedded emissions
verification_status.helper: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

compliance_deadline_met.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.placeholder: Saisir compliance deadline met (quarterly report submitted)
compliance_deadline_met.helper: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total output du primary product (e.g., steel, cement, aluminum) in metric tons par year.

carbon_intensity.label: Carbon Intensity
carbon_intensity.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions par ton of product, based on ISO 14064 or GHG Protocol.

cbam_carbon_price.label: CBAM Prix du carbone
cbam_carbon_price.helper: Expected or Courant EU ETS allowance Prix utilisé for CBAM certificate calculation.

free_allocation_percentage.label: Free Allocation parcentage
free_allocation_percentage.helper: parcentage of emissions covered by free allowances under CBAM transitional rules.

production_efficiency_index.label: Production Efficiency Index
production_efficiency_index.helper: Efficacité globale des équipements (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher Valeurs reduce parte and emissions.

compliance_readiness_score.label: Compliance Readiness Score
compliance_readiness_score.helper: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness par CBAM requirements.

industry_benchmark_intensity.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
industry_benchmark_intensity.helper: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

emission_scope.label: Emission Scope
emission_scope.helper: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

use_verified_data.label: Use Verified Data Only
use_verified_data.helper: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is utilisé; otherwise estimated data may be included.

celsius_input.label: Temparature in Celsius
celsius_input.helper: Process temparature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

sensor_accuracy.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
sensor_accuracy.helper: Manufacturer-specified accuracy du temparature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

calibration_offset.label: Calibration Offset
calibration_offset.helper: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

unit_system.label: Cible Unit System
unit_system.helper: Sélectionnez output temparature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

enable_alerts.label: Enable Process Alerts
enable_alerts.helper: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temparature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

changeover_time_matrix.label: Changeover Temps Matrix (minutes)
changeover_time_matrix.helper: Average Temps to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

number_of_changeovers_per_month.label: Number of Changeovers par Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.placeholder: Saisir number of changeovers par month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.helper: Total changeovers parformed monthly across all shifts. utilisé pour calculer total changeover downtime.

setup_external_time.label: External Préparation Temps par Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.placeholder: Saisir external préparation Temps par changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.helper: Préparation activities that can be parformed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Cible for SMED optimization.

setup_internal_time.label: Internal Préparation Temps par Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.placeholder: Saisir internal préparation Temps par changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.helper: Préparation activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary Cible for reduction via SMED.

product_family_count.label: Number of Product Families
product_family_count.helper: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

standard_deviation_changeover_time.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Temps (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.placeholder: Saisir standard deviation of changeover Temps (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.helper: Measure of variability in changeover times. utilisé for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Oparating schedule affecting available production Temps and changeover frequency.

lean_smed_implemented.label: SMED Implementation Status
lean_smed_implemented.helper: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

target_changeover_time.label: Cible Changeover Temps (minutes)
target_changeover_time.helper: SMED Cible for changeover Temps reduction. Typically <10 minutes for world-class parformance.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed du cutting tool relative to workpiece.

tool_overhang.label: Tool Overhang (L)
tool_overhang.helper: ISO 3685: Free Longueur of tool holder; affects stiffness.

tool_diameter.label: Tool Diamètre (D)
tool_diameter.helper: ISO 3685: Cutter Diamètre for milling or turning insert Diamètre.

workpiece_material_hardness.label: Workpiece Matériau Hardness
workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

machine_spindle_power.label: Machine Spindle Puissance (P_m)
machine_spindle_power.helper: ISO 841: Tauxd Puissance du spindle motor.

machine_damping_ratio.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
machine_damping_ratio.helper: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

tool_material.label: Tool Matériau
tool_material.helper: ISO 513: Tool substTaux affects wear and stiffness.

coolant_application.label: Coolant Application
coolant_application.helper: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total Surface (sq ft)
total_sq_ft.helper: Total cleanable Surface au sol in Pieds carrés. Basis for all labor and Matériau calculations.

cleaning_frequency.label: Cleaning Frequency par Week
cleaning_frequency.helper: Number of times the facility is cleaned par week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Taux ($/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

labor_burden_percent.label: Labor Burden (%)
labor_burden_percent.helper: parcentage added to Labor Taux for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

productivity_sqft_per_hour.label: Productivity Taux (sq ft/hour)
productivity_sqft_per_hour.helper: Average Surface cleaned par parson par hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

material_cost_per_sqft.label: Matériau Coût ($/sq ft)
material_cost_per_sqft.helper: Coût of cleaning chemicals, papar, and Consommables par square foot par cleaning.

equipment_cost_per_sqft.label: Equipment Coût ($/sq ft)
equipment_cost_per_sqft.helper: Amortized equipment Coût (mops, vacuums, buffers) par square foot par cleaning.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead (%)
overhead_percent.helper: Indirect Coûts (management, office, insurance) as parcentage of direct Coûts.

desired_margin_percent.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desired_margin_percent.helper: Cible Net profit margin on the bid.

waste_factor_percent.label: parte Factor (%)
waste_factor_percent.helper: Allowance for Matériau parte, rework, and inefficiency (Lean Six Sigma parte reduction).

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Service quality tier. Affects labor productivity and Matériau usage. Healthcare adds 15% to labor.

use_lean_methods.label: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.placeholder: Saisir use lean methods (5s, standard work)
use_lean_methods.helper: If true, applies 10% productivity improvement via Lean techniques.

api_call_volume.label: Monthly API Call Volume
api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made par month, including successful and overrun calls.

overrun_rate.label: Overrun Taux
overrun_rate.helper: parcentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response Temps threshold (e.g., >200ms).

avg_overrun_duration.label: Average Overrun Durée
avg_overrun_duration.helper: Average extra Temps beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

cost_per_call.label: Coût par API Call
cost_per_call.helper: Direct Coût par API call (compute, Network, storage).

retry_cost_per_call.label: Retry Coût par Call
retry_cost_per_call.helper: Additional Coût incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

retry_rate.label: Retry Taux
retry_rate.helper: parcentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

data_egress_gb.label: Monthly Data Egress
data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out du cloud par month.

egress_cost_per_gb.label: Egress Coût par GB
egress_cost_per_gb.helper: Coût par GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

sla_penalty_percentage.label: SLA Penalty parcentage
sla_penalty_percentage.helper: parcentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

monthly_service_fee.label: Monthly Service Fee
monthly_service_fee.helper: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

overrun_threshold_ms.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
overrun_threshold_ms.helper: Maximum acceptable response Temps par the SLA.

region.label: Cloud Region
region.helper: Geographic region du cloud service, affects egress Coûts and latency.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Coûts (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Saisir include hidden coûts (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, adds estimated hidden Coûts like customer churn and brand impact.

total_cloud_spend.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
total_cloud_spend.helper: Total monthly cloud infrastructure Coût across all services.

compute_utilization_rate.label: Average Compute Utilization Taux
compute_utilization_rate.helper: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

storage_waste_percentage.label: Storage parte parcentage
storage_waste_percentage.helper: Estimated parcentage of storage that is orphaned, unutilisé, or over-provisioned.

idle_resource_count.label: Idle Resource Count
idle_resource_count.helper: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 Jours.

data_transfer_out_gb.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
data_transfer_out_gb.helper: Total outbound data transfer Volume par month.

reserved_instance_coverage.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
reserved_instance_coverage.helper: parcentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

rightsizing_opportunity_score.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
rightsizing_opportunity_score.helper: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

cloud_provider.label: Cloud Provider
cloud_provider.helper: Primary cloud provider for Coût analysis.

include_network_waste.label: Include Network parte Analysis
include_network_waste.helper: Toggle to include Network-related parte (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

avg_order_value.label: Average Order Valeur (AOV)
avg_order_value.helper: Mean revenue par transaction. utilisé in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.

purchase_frequency.label: Purchase Frequency par Year
purchase_frequency.helper: Number of purchases par customer par year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.

customer_lifetime_years.label: Customer Lifetime (Années)
customer_lifetime_years.helper: Average retention pariod. For subscription models, use 1/churn Taux.

gross_margin_pct.label: Gross Margin (%)
gross_margin_pct.helper: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.

cac_total.label: Total Customer Acquisition Coût (CAC)
cac_total.helper: Sum of all marketing and sales Coûts divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spend, salaries, tools.

retention_rate.label: Annual Retention Taux
retention_rate.helper: parcentage of customers retained year over year. utilisé for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (Annual)
discount_rate.helper: Coût of capital or required Taux of return. Typical range: 8-15%.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of Entrée data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.

include_churn_adjustment.label: Include Churn Adjustment
include_churn_adjustment.helper: If true, uses retention Taux to adjust CLV for churn. Recommended for subscription models.

length_cm.label: Longueur in Centimeters
length_cm.helper: Measured Longueur in centimeters, typically from calipars, rulers, or CAD models.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty du measurement (e.g., ±0.05 cm for standard calipars).

conversion_precision.label: Conversion Precision
conversion_precision.helper: Sélectionnez conversion factor precision based on industry standard (ISO 80000-1, NIST).

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class
tolerance_class.helper: Tolerance class for dimensional inspection par ISO 2768. Affects alert thresholds.

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit Coût par Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: Coût par inch of Matériau or product, utilisé for Coût estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch Quantité
batch_quantity.helper: Number of units in the batch for Total Coût and parte calculations.

material_type.label: Matériau Type
material_type.helper: Matériau selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and Coût par part.

part_weight_kg.label: Part Poids (kg)
part_weight_kg.helper: Poids du finished part, utilisé pour calculer raw Matériau Coût and scrap.

stock_volume_cm3.label: Stock Volume (cm³)
stock_volume_cm3.helper: Volume of raw Matériau block before machining, deDuréeines Matériau usage.

machining_time_min.label: Machining Temps (minutes)
machining_time_min.helper: Total cycle Temps par part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.

setup_time_min.label: Préparation Temps (minutes)
setup_time_min.helper: Temps to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.

batch_size.label: Batch Size (parts)
batch_size.helper: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.

machine_hourly_rate_usd.label: Machine Hourly Taux ($/hr)
machine_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Fully burdened machine Coût including depreciation, maintenance, and Énergie.

labor_hourly_rate_usd.label: Labor Hourly Taux ($/hr)
labor_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Oparator wage including overhead and benefits.

tooling_cost_per_part_usd.label: Tooling Coût par Part ($)
tooling_cost_per_part_usd.helper: Consumable tooling Coût allocated par part (inserts, drills, end mills).

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead parcentage (%)
overhead_percentage.helper: Facility, quality, and administrative overhead as a parcentage of direct Coûts.

scrap_rate_percent.label: Scrap Taux (%)
scrap_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of parts that fail inspection and are scrapped.

material_cost_per_kg_usd.label: Matériau Coût par kg ($/kg)
material_cost_per_kg_usd.helper: Prix of raw Matériau par kilogram, varies by Matériau type.

density_g_per_cm3.label: Densité (g/cm³)
density_g_per_cm3.helper: Matériau Densité utilisé to convert Volume to Poids.

annual_manual_labor_cost.label: Annual Manual Labor Coût (par FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.placeholder: Saisir annual manual labor coût (par fte)
annual_manual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual Coût par full-Temps equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

number_of_workers.label: Number of Workers Replaced
number_of_workers.helper: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase Prix
cobot_purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.

cobot_annual_maintenance.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance Coût
cobot_annual_maintenance.helper: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

cobot_lifespan_years.label: Cobot Lifespan
cobot_lifespan_years.helper: Expected oparational life before major overhaul or replacement.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital for NPV calculation.

labor_productivity_factor.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
labor_productivity_factor.helper: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

cobot_uptime_percent.label: Cobot Uptime
cobot_uptime_percent.helper: parcentage of scheduled Temps the cobot is oparational (excluding planned maintenance).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Number of shifts par day the cobot will opeTaux (manual labor typically single shift).

include_training_cost.label: Include Cobot Training Coût
include_training_cost.helper: Whether to include initial training and integration Coûts.

training_cost.label: Cobot Training & Integration Coût
training_cost.helper: One-Temps Coût for programming, safety validation, and oparator training.

system_pressure.label: System Pression
system_pressure.helper: Oparating Pression du compressed air system; higher Pression increases leak Débit Taux.

leak_diameter.label: Equivalent Leak Diamètre
leak_diameter.helper: Diamètre of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

number_of_leaks.label: Number of Leaks
number_of_leaks.helper: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.

operating_hours.label: Annual Oparating Heures
operating_hours.helper: Total Heures the compressor runs par year. Continuous oparation = 8760 h.

electricity_cost.label: Electricity Coût
electricity_cost.helper: Average blended Coût of electricity par kilowatt-hour.

compressor_efficiency.label: Compressor Efficiency
compressor_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency du compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.

leak_type.label: Leak Type
leak_type.helper: Geometry du leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.

include_maintenance_cost.label: Include Maintenance Coût
include_maintenance_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated labor and Matériau Coût for leak repair.

compressorflowrate.label: Débit compresseur Taux
compressorflowrate.helper: Tauxd free air delivery du compressor at standard conditions.

demandflowrate.label: Average Demand Débit Taux
demandflowrate.helper: Average compressed air Consommation du system.

systempressure.label: System Oparating Pression
systempressure.helper: Nominal Pression at which the system opeTauxs.

pressuredifferential.label: Allowable Pression Diffelocationial
pressuredifferential.helper: Maximum acceptable Pression drop during peak event.

compressorcontroltype.label: Compressor Control Type
compressorcontroltype.helper: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temparature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average ambient temparature at compressor location.

altitude.label: Altitude Above Sea Level
altitude.helper: Site elevation for air Densité correction.

systemleakagepercent.label: System Leakage Estimate
systemleakagepercent.helper: Estimated parcentage of compressed air lost to leaks.

applicationtype.label: Application Type
applicationtype.helper: Primary use case, influences safety factor.

container_type.label: Container Type
container_type.helper: Sélectionnez container type to define internal Volume and dimensional constraints par ISO 668.

cargo_length_cm.label: Cargo Longueur (cm)
cargo_length_cm.helper: Longueur du primary cargo unit (pallet or box). Must align with container internal Longueur.

cargo_width_cm.label: Cargo Largeur (cm)
cargo_width_cm.helper: Largeur du cargo unit. Affects lateral stacking and aisle space.

cargo_height_cm.label: Cargo Hauteur (cm)
cargo_height_cm.helper: Hauteur du cargo unit. Must respect container door Hauteur and internal Hauteur.

cargo_weight_kg.label: Cargo Poids par Unit (kg)
cargo_weight_kg.helper: Poids par cargo unit. Critical for gross Poids limit and axle load distribution.

stacking_factor.label: Stacking Factor
stacking_factor.helper: Number of cargo units that can be stacked vertically, considering crush resistance and stability.

load_secure_method.label: Load Securing Method
load_secure_method.helper: Method utilisé to secure cargo. Affects usable Volume and Poids distribution par CTU Code.

use_pallet.label: Use Pallet
use_pallet.helper: Indicates if cargo is palletized. Pallet dimensions add to base footprint and reduce usable Hauteur.

pallet_height_cm.label: Pallet Hauteur (cm)
pallet_height_cm.helper: Hauteur du pallet (if utilisé). Added to cargo Hauteur for total unit Hauteur.

actual_throughput.label: Actual Throughput (units)
actual_throughput.helper: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement pariod.

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts par million defective, measured par Six Sigma standards.

on_time_delivery_percent.label: On-Temps Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_percent.helper: parcentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

cost_per_unit.label: Coût par Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Total manufacturing Coût par unit, including Matériaus, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Cible Coût par Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Contractually agreed Coût Cible par unit.

incentive_base_rate.label: Incentive Base Taux ($/unit)
incentive_base_rate.helper: Base incentive Montant par unit, subject to parformance multipliers.

quality_threshold_ppm.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
quality_threshold_ppm.helper: Maximum defect Taux to qualify for any incentive.

delivery_threshold_percent.label: Delivery Threshold (%)
delivery_threshold_percent.helper: Minimum on-Temps delivery parcentage to qualify for incentive.

cost_reduction_sharing_percent.label: Coût Reduction Sharing (%)
cost_reduction_sharing_percent.helper: parcentage of Coût savings shared as additional incentive.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

lean_certification_active.label: Lean Certification Active
lean_certification_active.helper: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.helper: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical Cibles: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift (long-Durée drift)
sigmashift.helper: Accounts for long-Durée process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

distributiontype.label: Distribution Type
distributiontype.helper: Sélectionnez distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

samplesize.label: Sample Size (n)
samplesize.helper: Number of observations utilisé to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Confidence level for the confidence interval du PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval
useconfidenceinterval.helper: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and uppar bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

planned_duration_days.label: Planned Durée (Jours)
planned_duration_days.helper: Total planned Durée du project from start to finish, as par CPM schedule baseline.

actual_duration_days.label: Actual Durée (Jours)
actual_duration_days.helper: Actual elapsed Durée from project start to Courant date or completion.

daily_penalty_rate.label: Daily Penalty Taux (Currency)
daily_penalty_rate.helper: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty par day of delay beyond the planned Durée.

critical_path_float_total.label: Total Float on Critical Path (Jours)
critical_path_float_total.placeholder: Saisir total float on critical path (jours)
critical_path_float_total.helper: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Valeurs below 0.8 indicate significant parte.

rework_percentage.label: Rework parcentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: parcentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

delay_type.label: Delay Type
delay_type.helper: Classification par standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
use_earned_schedule.helper: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accuTaux delay impact assessment.

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
expected_yield.helper: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed geNetics and local potential.

actual_yield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
actual_yield.helper: Measured yield at harvest, utilisé as baseline for loss calculation.

harvest_loss_pct.label: Harvest Loss (%)
harvest_loss_pct.helper: parcentage of crop lost during harvesting oparations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

post_harvest_loss_pct.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
post_harvest_loss_pct.helper: Losses during handling, storage, and Transport after harvest.

field_condition.label: Field Condition
field_condition.helper: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

irrigation_type.label: Irrigation Type
irrigation_type.helper: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

pest_pressure.label: Pest Pression (0-10)
pest_pressure.helper: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

disease_index.label: Disease Index (0-10)
disease_index.helper: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

weed_cover_pct.label: Weed Cover (%)
weed_cover_pct.helper: parcentage of Field Surface covered by weeds, competing for resources.

soil_quality_score.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
soil_quality_score.helper: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

labor_efficiency.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
labor_efficiency.helper: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field oparations.

equipment_reliability.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
equipment_reliability.helper: parcentage of Temps equipment opeTauxs without breakdown during critical pariods.

exposure_amount.label: Exposure Montant (in base currency)
exposure_amount.helper: Total Valeur of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange Taux fluctuation.

volatility_annual.label: Annualized Volatility of Exchange Taux
volatility_annual.placeholder: Saisir annualized volatility of exchange taux
volatility_annual.helper: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
confidence_level.placeholder: Saisir confidence level for var calculation
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level utilisé in Valeur At Risk (VaR) estimation, typical Valeurs 90%, 95%, 99%.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio
hedge_ratio.helper: parcentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for parte reduction.

time_horizon_days.label: Temps Horizon (Jours)
time_horizon_days.helper: Risk assessment pariod aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).
