enable_lean_adjustment.label: Enable Lean Volatility Adjustment
enable_lean_adjustment.helper: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.

cutvolume.label: Cut Volume
cutvolume.helper: Total Volume of Matériau to be excavated from cut Surfaces, measured in bank cubic meters (BCM).

fillvolume.label: Fill Volume
fillvolume.helper: Total Volume of Matériau required for fill/embankment Surfaces, measured in compacted cubic meters (CCM).

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: Factor accounting for Volume increase when Matériau is excavated (loose state vs. bank state). Typical range 1.1–1.4.

shrinkagefactor.label: Shrinkage Factor
shrinkagefactor.helper: Factor accounting for Volume decrease when Matériau is compacted (compacted state vs. bank state). Typical range 0.75–0.95.

hauldistance.label: Average Haul Distance
hauldistance.helper: Average one-way Distance from cut to fill Surfaces, utilisé for Coût and Carburant calculations.

unithaulcost.label: Unit Haul Coût
unithaulcost.helper: Coût par cubic meter par kilometer of hauling Matériau, including Carburant, labor, and equipment depreciation.

wastedisposalcost.label: parte Disposal Coût
wastedisposalcost.helper: Coût par cubic meter for disposing excess Matériau at a designated parte site.

borrowcost.label: Borrow Matériau Coût
borrowcost.helper: Coût par cubic meter to import Matériau from a borrow pit to meet fill deficit.

materialtype.label: Matériau Type
materialtype.helper: Type of Matériau being moved, affects swell/shrinkage factors and handling difficulty.

useoptimizedhaulroutes.label: Use Optimized Haul Routes
useoptimizedhaulroutes.helper: If enabled, the tool applies lean logistics principles to minimize haul Distance and idle Temps.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed
cutting_speed.helper: Surface speed du workpiece relative to the cutting tool, based on ISO 3685.

feed_rate.label: Feed Taux
feed_rate.helper: Linear Distance the tool advances par revolution, affects chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: Profondeur of Cut
depth_of_cut.helper: Radial or axial engagement du tool, influences cutting forces and heat generation.

tool_material.label: Tool Matériau
tool_material.helper: Matériau du cutting tool, affects wear resistance and optimal cutting parameters.

workpiece_material.label: Workpiece Matériau
workpiece_material.helper: Matériau being machined, deDuréeines machinability rating and recommended speeds.

coolant_used.label: Coolant utilisé
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is applied, reduces thermal stress and extends tool life.

machine_stability_factor.label: Machine Stability Factor
machine_stability_factor.helper: Factor representing machine rigidity and vibration damping, based on condition monitoring data.

milk_volume_liters.label: Milk Volume (Liters par day)
milk_volume_liters.helper: Total raw milk received daily from suppliers or own herd.

fat_percentage.label: Fat Content (%)
fat_percentage.helper: Average butterfat content of incoming milk, critical for yield calculations.

protein_percentage.label: Protein Content (%)
protein_percentage.helper: Average protein content, affects cheese and powder yields.

selling_price_per_liter.label: Selling Prix (par Liter)
selling_price_per_liter.helper: Average revenue par liter of raw milk sold to processor or retail.

production_cost_per_liter.label: Production Coût (par Liter)
production_cost_per_liter.helper: Includes feed, labor, utilities, veterinary, and overhead par liter.

waste_percentage.label: parte / Shrinkage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Milk lost due to spoilage, spillage, or quality rejection.

labor_hours_per_day.label: Labor Heures par Day
labor_hours_per_day.helper: Total direct Labor Heures utilisé in milk production and handling.

energy_cost_per_day.label: Énergie Coût (par Day)
energy_cost_per_day.helper: Daily electricity, Carburant, and cooling Coûts.

other_variable_cost_per_liter.label: Other Variable Coût (par Liter)
other_variable_cost_per_liter.helper: Supplies, additives, packaging, and miscellaneous Variable Coûts.

fixed_cost_per_day.label: Fixed Coût (par Day)
fixed_cost_per_day.helper: Depreciation, location, insurance, and other fixed overhead.

quality_grade.label: Quality Grade
quality_grade.helper: Milk quality grade based on somatic cell count and bacteria (A, B, C).

historical_demand_mean.label: Historical Demand Mean (units/pariod)
historical_demand_mean.helper: Average demand observed over the past 12 pariods (ISO 9001:2015 data collection).

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units)
demand_std_dev.helper: Standard deviation of demand, utilisé for safety stock calculation (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).

lead_time_days.label: Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead Temps from supplier (WERC DC Metrics).

service_level.label: Cible Service Level
service_level.helper: Probability of not stocking out during lead Temps (Six Sigma DPMO Cible).

unit_cost.label: Unit Coût ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase Coût par unit (ISO 14051 Matériau Débit Coût accounting).

holding_cost_rate.label: Annual Holding Coût Taux (%)
holding_cost_rate.helper: parcentage of unit Coût par year (WERC DC Measures, typical 20-30%).

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Coût ($/order)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed Coût par purchase order (Lean transactional Coût reduction).

stockout_cost_per_unit.label: Stockout Coût par Unit ($)
stockout_cost_per_unit.helper: Lost profit + penalty par unit of unmet demand (Six Sigma Coût of poor quality).

periods_per_year.label: pariods par Year
periods_per_year.helper: Number of demand pariods in a year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 52 for weekly).

use_abc_classification.label: Use ABC Classification
use_abc_classification.helper: If true, applies ABC analysis to adjust service level (Pareto principle in inventory management).

twin_scope.label: Digital Twin Scope
twin_scope.helper: Sélectionnez scope du digital twin: asset, process, system, or enterprise. Influences complexity and Coût multipliers.

asset_count.label: Number of Assets/Entities
asset_count.helper: Total number of physical assets or entities to be modeled in the digital twin.

sensor_density.label: Sensor Densité (sensors par asset)
sensor_density.helper: Average number of IoT sensors par asset. Higher Densité increases data acquisition and processing Coûts.

data_frequency.label: Data Acquisition Frequency
data_frequency.helper: Frequency of data collection: 0.1 (every 10s), 1 (par second), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Higher frequency increases data Volume and Coût.

integration_complexity.label: Integration Complexity
integration_complexity.helper: Complexity of integrating with existing systems (ERP, MES, CMMS). Low, medium, high. Affects labor and software Coûts.

data_quality_index.label: Data Quality Index (DQI)
data_quality_index.helper: parcentage of data that is accuTaux, complete, and timely. Based on ISO 8000 data quality standards.

labor_rate.label: Average Labor Taux (USD/hour)
labor_rate.helper: Blended hourly Taux for engineering and IT staff involved in digital twin development and maintenance.

expected_lifespan.label: Expected Lifespan (Années)
expected_lifespan.helper: Expected oparational lifespan du digital twin system. utilisé for amortization and Total Coût of ownership calculations.

lean_six_sigma_level.label: Lean Six Sigma Maturity Level
lean_six_sigma_level.placeholder: Saisir lean six sigma maturity level
lean_six_sigma_level.helper: Organizational maturity in Lean Six Sigma: level1 (initial), level2 (managed), level3 (defined), level4 (quantitatively managed), level5 (optimizing). Affects efficiency and parte reduction.

werc_benchmark.label: WERC DC Benchmark (Coût par order)
werc_benchmark.placeholder: Saisir werc dc benchmark (coût par order)
werc_benchmark.helper: Warehouse Education and Research Council (WERC) benchmark for average Coût par order in distribution centers.

planned_production_rate.label: Planned Production Taux
planned_production_rate.helper: The standard output Taux par hour under normal oparating conditions (ISO 22400).

downtime_duration.label: DownDurée
downtime_duration.helper: Total Durée du unplanned downtime event.

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue par Unit
revenue_per_unit.helper: Selling Prix or standard Coût par unit of output.

direct_labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Coût par Hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Saisir direct labor coût par hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage including benefits for oparators affected by downtime.

energy_cost_per_hour.label: Énergie Coût par Hour
energy_cost_per_hour.helper: Average Coût of electricity, gas, or other Énergie consumed during production.

scrap_rate_during_downtime.label: Scrap Taux During Downtime
scrap_rate_during_downtime.helper: parcentage of Matériau parted due to restart or instability after downtime (Six Sigma defect Taux).

recovery_time_factor.label: Recovery Temps Factor
recovery_time_factor.helper: Multiplier for additional Temps needed to return to steady-state production (Lean Takt Temps recovery).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift during which downtime occurred; affects labor Coût multipliers (night/weekend premiums).

include_quality_loss.label: Include Quality Loss
include_quality_loss.helper: If true, adds Coût of scrap and rework cautilisé by the downtime event.

dye_volume_l.label: Dye bath Volume (liters)
dye_volume_l.helper: Total Volume of dye liquor in the batch.

dye_concentration_gpl.label: Dye concentration (g/L)
dye_concentration_gpl.helper: Grams of dye powder par liter of bath.

chemicals_per_liter.label: Auxiliary chemicals Coût (USD/L)
chemicals_per_liter.helper: Coût of salts, acids, bases, etc., par liter of bath.

energy_cost_per_batch.label: Énergie Coût par batch (USD)
energy_cost_per_batch.helper: Electricity, steam, or gas Coût for heating and running the dyeing machine.

batch_time_hours.label: Batch cycle Temps (Heures)
batch_time_hours.helper: Total Temps from loading to unloading.

waste_percentage.label: parte / rework Taux (%)
waste_percentage.helper: parcentage of batches that require re-dyeing or are scrapped.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water Coût (USD/m³)
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Coût of fresh water and partewater treatment.

water_usage_l_per_kg.label: Consommation d'eau (L/kg fabric)
water_usage_l_per_kg.helper: Typical water Consommation par kg of fabric processed.

fabric_weight_kg.label: Fabric Poids (kg)
fabric_weight_kg.helper: Poids of fabric in the batch.

dye_type.label: Dye class
dye_type.helper: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and Coût.

use_lean_optimization.label: Enable Lean optimization (reduce parte)
use_lean_optimization.helper: If true, applies lean principles to reduce parte and rework.

total_energy_kwh.label: Total Énergie Consommation (kWh)
total_energy_kwh.helper: Total electrical Énergie consumed by the facility over the reporting pariod (e.g., monthly).

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest recorded Puissance demand during the pariod; utilisé for demand charge calculation.

tariff_rate_per_kwh.label: Énergie Taux ($/kWh)
tariff_rate_per_kwh.helper: Average Coût par kWh from utility bill (blended Taux).

demand_charge_per_kw.label: Demand Charge ($/kW)
demand_charge_per_kw.helper: Utility demand charge par kW of peak demand.

production_units.label: Total Production Units
production_units.helper: Number of units produced in the pariod (e.g., pieces, kg, liters).

facility_type.label: Facility Type
facility_type.helper: Type of facility for benchmarking and normalization.

include_renewable_offset.label: Include Renewable Énergie Offset
include_renewable_offset.helper: If true, subtracts renewable generation from total Consommation for Net Coût calculation.

renewable_kwh.label: Renewable Énergie GeNetauxd (kWh)
renewable_kwh.helper: On-site renewable generation (solar, wind) during the pariod.

co2_emission_factor.label: CO2 Emission Factor (kg CO2/kWh)
co2_emission_factor.helper: Grid average emission factor for the region (ISO 14064).

waste_type.label: parte Type
waste_type.helper: Sélectionnez category of parte to apply appropriate Coût factors and regulatory thresholds.

waste_volume_kg.label: parte Volume (kg)
waste_volume_kg.helper: Total mass of parte geNetauxd in the reporting pariod.

disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Disposal Coût par kg
disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Average Coût paid to parte management vendor par kilogram.

transport_distance_km.label: Transport Distance (km)
transport_distance_km.helper: One-way Distance from facility to disposal or recycling site.

transport_cost_per_km.label: Transport Coût par km
transport_cost_per_km.helper: Coût par kilometer for parte Transport, including Carburant and labor.

labor_hours_per_ton.label: Labor Heures par Ton
labor_hours_per_ton.helper: Direct Labor Heures required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of parte.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Taux par Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage including overhead for parte handling parsonnel.

recycling_revenue_per_kg.label: Recycling Revenue par kg
recycling_revenue_per_kg.helper: Revenue received from selling recyclable Matériaus par kilogram.

recycling_rate.label: Recycling Taux (%)
recycling_rate.helper: parcentage of total parte that is diverted to recycling.

carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.label: Carbon Coût par kg CO2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.placeholder: Saisir carbon coût par kg co2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.helper: Internal or regulatory Coût assigned to each kg of CO2 equivalent emissions.

emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e/kg parte)
emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.helper: Average greenhouse gas emissions par kilogram of parte based on parte type and disposal method.

compliance_penalty_per_kg.label: Compliance Penalty par kg
compliance_penalty_per_kg.helper: Potential regulatory fines or penalties par kilogram if parte exceeds parmitted limits.

waste_volume_limit_kg.label: parte Volume Limit (kg)
waste_volume_limit_kg.helper: Regulatory or internal threshold for parte Volume before penalties apply.

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the item over one year. utilisé pour calculer order frequency and total cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Coût par Order
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed Coût incurred par purchase order (e.g., administrative, inspection, Transportation Préparation).

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding Coût par Unit par Year
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Saisir holding coût par unit par year
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût to hold one unit in inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence, and capital Coût.

unit_cost.label: Unit Coût (Purchase Prix)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase Prix par unit from supplier. utilisé pour calculer total annual purchase Coût and capital tied up.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_days.helper: Average Temps from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point calculations.

demand_variability.label: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
demand_variability.placeholder: Saisir demand variability (std dev of daily demand)
demand_variability.helper: Standard deviation of daily demand. utilisé pour calculer safety stock under uncertainty (Six Sigma approach).

service_level.label: Desired Service Level
service_level.helper: Cible probability of not stocking out during lead Temps. Higher service levels increase safety stock.

backorder_cost.label: Backorder Coût par Unit
backorder_cost.helper: Coût incurred par unit when demand cannot be met from stock (lost sales, penalty, expediting).

warehouse_capacity.label: Warehouse Capacity (units)
warehouse_capacity.helper: Maximum storage capacity available for this item. utilisé to constrain order Quantité if EOQ exceeds capacity.

storage_cost_per_sqft.label: Storage Coût par sq ft par Year
storage_cost_per_sqft.placeholder: Saisir storage coût par sq ft par year
storage_cost_per_sqft.helper: Coût par square foot of warehouse space par year. utilisé for space-based holding Coût adjustments.

item_footprint.label: Item Footprint (sq ft par unit)
item_footprint.placeholder: Saisir item footprint (sq ft par unit)
item_footprint.helper: Average floor space required par unit of inventory. utilisé to compute space Coût component.

bac.label: Budget at Completion
bac.helper: Total authorized budget for the work scope (PMBOK).

ev.label: Earned Valeur
ev.helper: Valeur of work actually parformed, measured in budgeted Coût.

ac.label: Actual Coût
ac.helper: Total Coût incurred for the work parformed.

pv.label: Planned Valeur
pv.helper: Authorized budget for the work scheduled to be completed.

percentcomplete.label: parcent Complete (physical)
percentcomplete.helper: Objective physical progress estimate (e.g., via earned Valeur rules).

cpi.label: Coût parformance Index (override)
cpi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated CPI. CPI = EV/AC.

spi.label: Schedule parformance Index (override)
spi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated SPI. SPI = EV/PV.

useweightedmethod.label: Use Poidsed CPI/SPI for EAC
useweightedmethod.placeholder: Saisir use poidsed cpi/spi for eac
useweightedmethod.helper: If true, applies 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI Poidsing for EAC (industry practice).

managementreserve.label: Management Reserve
managementreserve.helper: Reserve held for unforeseen scope changes (not part of BAC).

fabric_width.label: Fabric Largeur (cm)
fabric_width.helper: Standard industrial fabric roll Largeur, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.

fabric_length.label: Fabric Longueur (m)
fabric_length.helper: Total Longueur of fabric roll or batch, utilisé to compute total Surface.

pattern_length.label: Pattern Longueur (cm)
pattern_length.helper: Longueur of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.

pattern_width.label: Pattern Largeur (cm)
pattern_width.helper: Largeur of one pattern piece parpendicular to the grain.

quantity.label: Quantité to Cut
quantity.helper: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

cutting_method.label: Cutting Method
cutting_method.helper: Method affects Matériau utilization and labor Coût. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.

material_cost_per_m2.label: Matériau Coût par m²
material_cost_per_m2.helper: Coût of fabric par square meter, utilisé for financial loss calculations.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Taux par Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of cutting oparator, utilisé for labor Coût estimation.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance parcentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Extra fabric allowance for seam, shrinkage, or alignment tolerances par ISO 4915.

use_nesting.label: Enable Nesting Optimization
use_nesting.helper: If true, the optimizer will attempt to nest patterns to reduce parte.

num_departments.label: Number of Departments
num_departments.helper: Total distinct production or storage Surfaces in the facility.

flow_intensity_matrix.label: Débit Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaTauxd par row)
flow_intensity_matrix.placeholder: Saisir débit intensity matrix (triangular, comma-sepatauxd par row)
flow_intensity_matrix.helper: Number of Matériau movements between each pair of departments par day.

distance_matrix.label: Distance Matrix (triangular, comma-sepaTauxd par row)
distance_matrix.placeholder: Saisir Distance matrix (triangular, comma-sepatauxd par row)
distance_matrix.helper: Courant or proposed travel Distances between department centroids.

path_efficiency_factor.label: Path Efficiency Factor
path_efficiency_factor.helper: Ratio of straight-line Distance to actual travel path (1.0 = parfect straight line).

layout_type.label: Layout Type
layout_type.helper: Classification du facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

use_weighted_distance.label: Use Poidsed Distance (Débit × Distance)
use_weighted_distance.helper: If true, the primary Résultat is the sum of Débit × Distance; otherwise raw Distance sum.

recycling_machine_cost.label: Recycling Machine Purchase Coût
recycling_machine_cost.helper: Capital expenditure for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.

machine_life_years.label: Machine Durée de vie utile
machine_life_years.placeholder: Saisir machine durée de vie utile
machine_life_years.helper: Expected oparational life before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Coût
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.

recycling_energy_consumption.label: Recycling Énergie Consommation
recycling_energy_consumption.helper: Énergie required par kg of recycled filament produced.

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux
labor_rate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for oparator.

labor_hours_per_kg.label: Labor Heures par kg
labor_hours_per_kg.helper: Direct labor Temps to process one kg of recycled filament.

waste_collection_cost.label: parte Collection Coût
waste_collection_cost.helper: Coût to collect and Transport scrap plastic to recycling facility.

virgin_filament_price.label: Virgin Filament Market Prix
virgin_filament_price.helper: Courant market Prix for virgin PLA/ABS/PETG filament.

recycling_yield.label: Recycling Yield
recycling_yield.helper: parcentage of Entrée parte that becomes usable filament (losses due to contamination, degradation).

quality_factor.label: Quality Factor (vs Virgin)
quality_factor.helper: Relative mechanical/print quality of recycled filament compared to virgin (e.g., 90% means 10% more Matériau needed for same strength).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total kg of recycled filament produced par year.

waste_type.label: parte Type
waste_type.helper: Type of plastic parte being recycled; affects processing parameters and yield.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon Coût
include_carbon_cost.helper: If true, adds a carbon penalty Coût based on estimated emissions.

carbon_price.label: Prix du carbone
carbon_price.helper: Social Coût of carbon or carbon tax par metric ton of CO2 equivalent.

static_pressure.label: Static Pression
static_pressure.helper: Measured at hydrant outlet with no Débit. utilisé to deDuréeine available system Pression par NFPA 291.

residual_pressure.label: Residual Pression
residual_pressure.helper: Pression measured while hydrant is Débiting at test Taux. Indicates system capacity under demand.

flow_rate_test.label: Test Débit Taux
flow_rate_test.helper: Débit Taux measured during hydrant Débit test using pitot gauge or Débit meter.

pipe_diameter.label: Supply Pipe Diamètre
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal Diamètre du main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.

pipe_length.label: Supply Pipe Longueur
pipe_length.helper: Distance from water main to hydrant. utilisé in friction loss calculations.

hazen_williams_coefficient.label: Hazen-Williams C Factor
hazen_williams_coefficient.helper: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. par ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.

elevation_difference.label: Elevation différence
elevation_difference.helper: Hauteur différence between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.

number_of_hydrants.label: Number of Hydrants in Test
number_of_hydrants.placeholder: Saisir number of hydrants in test
number_of_hydrants.helper: Number of hydrants Débiting simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.

hydrant_type.label: Hydrant Type
hydrant_type.helper: Type of hydrant par NFPA 291. Dry barrel common in cold climates.

flow_condition.label: Débit Condition
flow_condition.helper: Steady for normal tests, Transient for surge analysis par ISO 4126.

is_test_standard.label: NFPA 291 Compliant Test
is_test_standard.helper: Indicates if Débit test was parformed par NFPA 291 standard procedures.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced par year across all product variants.

avg_batch_size.label: Average Batch Size
avg_batch_size.helper: Average number of units produced par production run before changeover.

current_setup_time.label: Courant Préparation Temps par Changeover
current_setup_time.placeholder: Saisir courant préparation Temps par changeover
current_setup_time.helper: Temps required to change from one product to another in the Courant system.

target_setup_time.label: Cible Préparation Temps par Changeover (after FMS)
target_setup_time.placeholder: Saisir cible préparation Temps par changeover (after fms)
target_setup_time.helper: Expected Préparation Temps after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

hourly_operating_cost.label: Hourly Oparating Coût (labor + overhead)
hourly_operating_cost.helper: Fully burdened hourly Coût of production labor and overhead.

changeover_cost_per_hour.label: Changeover Coût par Hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Saisir changeover coût par hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.helper: Total Coût incurred par hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

inventory_holding_cost_rate.label: Inventory Holding Coût Taux
inventory_holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual Coût to hold inventory as a parcentage of inventory Valeur (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Valeur (Courant)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Courant average Valeur of raw Matériaus, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

fms_investment.label: Total FMS Investment
fms_investment.helper: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing system (equipment, software, training, integration).

fms_useful_life.label: FMS Durée de vie utile
fms_useful_life.placeholder: Saisir fms durée de vie utile
fms_useful_life.helper: Expected oparational life du flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital utilisé for Net present Valeur calculation.

product_variants.label: Number of Product Variants
product_variants.helper: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

quality_defect_rate.label: Courant Quality Defect Taux
quality_defect_rate.helper: parcentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

fms_quality_improvement.label: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
fms_quality_improvement.placeholder: Saisir expected quality improvement from fms
fms_quality_improvement.helper: Expected parcentage reduction in defect Taux after implementing FMS.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût to rework or scrap a defective unit.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain from FMS
labor_productivity_gain.placeholder: Saisir labor productivity gain from fms
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Expected parcentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

floor_space_reduction.label: Floor Space Reduction
floor_space_reduction.helper: Expected parcentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

annual_floor_space_cost.label: Annual Floor Space Coût par sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.placeholder: Saisir annual floor space coût par sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.helper: Annual Coût par square foot of manufacturing space (location, utilities, maintenance).

current_floor_space.label: Courant Floor Space
current_floor_space.helper: Total manufacturing floor space Courantly occupied.

energy_cost_reduction.label: Énergie Coût Reduction from FMS
energy_cost_reduction.placeholder: Saisir énergie coût reduction from fms
energy_cost_reduction.helper: Expected parcentage reduction in Énergie Coûts due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle Temps.

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Énergie Coût
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual Énergie Coût for the manufacturing facility.

maintenance_cost_increase.label: Maintenance Coût Increase from FMS
maintenance_cost_increase.placeholder: Saisir maintenance coût increase from fms
maintenance_cost_increase.helper: Expected parcentage increase in maintenance Coûts due to more complex equipment.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Coût (Courant)
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Courant annual maintenance Coût for existing equipment.

training_cost.label: Training Coût for FMS
training_cost.helper: One-Temps Coût for training oparators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

implementation_time.label: Implementation Temps
implementation_time.helper: Temps required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

production_days_per_year.label: Production Jours par Year
production_days_per_year.helper: Number of Jours the facility opeTauxs par year.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts par Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts par day.

total_production_kg.label: Total Production (kg)
total_production_kg.helper: Total Poids of finished goods produced in the reporting pariod (ISO 14051 Matériau Débit).

waste_kg.label: parte (kg)
waste_kg.helper: Total Poids of Alimentation parte geNetauxd (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

selling_price_per_kg.label: Selling Prix par kg
selling_price_per_kg.helper: Average revenue par kg of finished product sold (Net of discounts).

cost_per_kg.label: Coût par kg
cost_per_kg.helper: Total Variable Coût par kg (raw Matériaus, labor, Énergie, packaging).

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: parte Disposal Coût par kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Saisir parte disposal coût par kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Coût to dispose of parte (landfill, composting, incineration).

rework_percentage.label: Rework parcentage
rework_percentage.helper: parcentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect Taux).

labor_hourly_rate.label: Labor Hourly Taux
labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor Coût par hour (including benefits).

rework_hours_per_kg.label: Rework Heures par kg
rework_hours_per_kg.helper: Average Labor Heures required to rework one kg of product.

storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.label: Storage Coût par kg par Day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.placeholder: Saisir storage coût par kg par day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.helper: Coût to store one kg of product par day (WERC warehousing metrics).

average_storage_days.label: Average Storage Jours
average_storage_days.helper: Average number of Jours parte is held before disposal or rework.

waste_type.label: parte Type
waste_type.helper: Primary category of parte (ISO 14051 parte classification).

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Coûts (Énergie, Water, Overhead)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Saisir include hidden coûts (énergie, water, overhead)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, allocates a portion of fixed overhead to parte (activity-based Coûting).

numerator.label: Numerator
numerator.helper: The top part du fraction (dividend). For mixed numbers, use the fractional part only.

denominator.label: Denominator
denominator.helper: The bottom part du fraction (Diviseur). Must be non-zero.

wholenumber.label: Whole Number (for mixed fractions)
wholenumber.helper: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for propar fractions.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places (precision)
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the Résultat. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

roundingmethod.label: Rounding Method
roundingmethod.helper: Rounding rule par ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommended for statistical work).

uncertaintyinput.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
uncertaintyinput.helper: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). utilisé for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.

planned_distance_km.label: Planned Route Distance
planned_distance_km.helper: Total Distance du planned route as par logistics plan.

actual_distance_km.label: Actual Route Distance
actual_distance_km.helper: Total Distance actually driven, including deviations.

fuel_consumption_rate.label: Average Carburant Consommation Taux
fuel_consumption_rate.helper: Vehicle Carburant Consommation Taux under standard conditions (ISO 14040).

fuel_price_per_liter.label: Carburant Prix par Liter
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: Courant market Prix of diesel or gasoline par liter.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Poids
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total Poids of cargo carried, affects Carburant Consommation.

terrain_factor.label: Terrain Type
terrain_factor.helper: Terrain classification affecting Carburant efficiency (WERC guidelines).

traffic_condition.label: Traffic Condition
traffic_condition.helper: Traffic Densité impact on Carburant Consommation and route drift.

driver_behavior_score.label: Driver Behavior Score
driver_behavior_score.helper: Eco-driving score based on acceleration, braking, idling (Lean Six Sigma metric).

vehicle_age_years.label: Vehicle Age
vehicle_age_years.helper: Age du vehicle, utilisé for efficiency degradation factor.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include secondary loss factors like tire Pression, engine wear, etc.

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts par million defective – Six Sigma quality metric. Lower is better.

throughput.label: Throughput (units/hour)
throughput.helper: Actual production Taux par hour. utilisé pour calculer OEE and capacity utilization.

planned_throughput.label: Planned Throughput (units/hour)
planned_throughput.helper: Cible production Taux par hour. Must be >0 to avoid division by zero.

cost_per_unit.label: Coût par Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Direct manufacturing Coût par unit. Includes Matériau, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Cible Coût par Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Budgeted or standard Coût par unit. Must be >0.

safety_incidents.label: Safety Incidents (last 12 months)
safety_incidents.helper: Total recordable incidents par year. Lower is better (ISO 45001).

on_time_delivery_pct.label: On-Temps Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_pct.helper: parcentage of orders delivered on or before promised date. WERC metric.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift pattern affects fatigue and error Tauxs. utilisé in safety adjustment.

oee_override.label: Override OEE Calculation?
oee_override.helper: If true, user can manually enter OEE instead of computing from throughput.

manual_oee.label: Manual OEE (%)
manual_oee.helper: Efficacité globale des équipements if override is enabled.

deviation_type.label: Deviation Type
deviation_type.helper: Sélectionnez category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate Coût multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

affected_batch_kg.label: Affected Batch Poids (kg)
affected_batch_kg.helper: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. utilisé pour calculer Matériau loss and rework Coûts.

unit_cost_per_kg.label: Unit Coût par kg ($)
unit_cost_per_kg.helper: Standard Coût of raw Matériaus par kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

rework_percentage.label: Rework parcentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Estimated fraction du affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

rework_cost_per_kg.label: Rework Coût par kg ($)
rework_cost_per_kg.helper: Additional Coût par kilogram for rework activities (labor, Énergie, extra Matériaus).

downtime_hours.label: Downtime (Heures)
downtime_hours.helper: Total production downtime cautilisé by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

hourly_overhead_rate.label: Hourly Overhead Taux ($/hr)
hourly_overhead_rate.helper: Burdened overhead Coût par hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility Coûts).

regulatory_penalty_flag.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
regulatory_penalty_flag.helper: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

base_penalty_amount.label: Base Penalty Montant ($)
base_penalty_amount.helper: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. utilisé only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

recall_cost_flag.label: Recall Coût Included?
recall_cost_flag.helper: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage Coûts.

recall_fixed_cost.label: Recall Fixed Coût ($)
recall_fixed_cost.helper: Fixed Coût associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

recall_variable_per_kg.label: Recall Variable Coût par kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.placeholder: Saisir recall variable coût par kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.helper: par-kilogram Coût for recall handling (Transport, disposal, replacement).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
data_confidence.helper: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of Entrée data (0 = low, 1 = high). utilisé to adjust the final Coût estimate.

design_ua.label: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Surface (UA_design)
design_ua.placeholder: Saisir design overall heat transfer coefficient × surface (ua_design)
design_ua.helper: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).

actual_ua.label: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Surface (UA_actual)
actual_ua.placeholder: Saisir actual overall heat transfer coefficient × surface (ua_actual)
actual_ua.helper: Courant measured UA from process data (temparature, Débit) using heat balance. Indicates fouling severity.

hot_inlet_temp.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temparature
hot_inlet_temp.helper: Temparature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.

cold_inlet_temp.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temparature
cold_inlet_temp.helper: Temparature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.

hot_flow_rate.label: Hot Fluid Mass Débit Taux
hot_flow_rate.placeholder: Saisir hot fluid mass débit taux
hot_flow_rate.helper: Mass Débit Taux du hot process stream.

hot_specific_heat.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
hot_specific_heat.placeholder: Saisir hot fluid specific heat capacity
hot_specific_heat.helper: Average specific heat of hot fluid over oparating temparature range.

energy_cost.label: Énergie Coût
energy_cost.helper: Coût of thermal Énergie (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oparating Heures du heat exchanger.

production_loss_factor.label: Production Loss Factor
production_loss_factor.helper: parcentage of production capacity lost due to reduced heat transfer (e.g., slower throughput).

revenue_per_unit_product.label: Revenue par Unit Product
revenue_per_unit_product.helper: Revenue geNetauxd par kg of product processed through the exchanger.

exchanger_type.label: Heat Exchanger Type
exchanger_type.helper: Type of heat exchanger; affects fouling factors and cleaning intervals.

fouling_factor_known.label: Fouling Factor Known?
fouling_factor_known.helper: If true, user provides measured fouling factor directly; otherwise calculated from UA ratio.

measured_fouling_factor.label: Measured Fouling Factor (R_f)
measured_fouling_factor.helper: Directly measured fouling resistance from test or literature (TEMA standards).

horsepower.label: HorsePuissance (HP)
horsepower.helper: Mechanical Puissance rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

hp_type.label: HorsePuissance Type
hp_type.helper: Diffelocation horsePuissance definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency du motor at Tauxd load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

load_factor.label: Facteur de charge
load_factor.helper: parcentage of Tauxd load at which the motor opeTauxs. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

power_factor.label: Puissance Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real Puissance to appalocation Puissance. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual Durée d'exécution for Énergie Coût calculations. Common Valeurs: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Coût
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average industrial electricity Taux. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

cooling_load.label: Cooling Load
cooling_load.helper: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

heating_load.label: Heating Load
heating_load.helper: Total parte thermique from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temparature
ambient_temperature.helper: Outdoor dry-bulb temparature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

relative_humidity.label: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity.helper: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil parformance.

efficiency_ratio.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
efficiency_ratio.helper: Courant system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

airflow_rate.label: AirDébit Taux
airflow_rate.helper: Supply air Volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

duct_leakage_factor.label: Duct Leakage Factor
duct_leakage_factor.helper: Estimated leakage as parcentage of total airDébit; affects effective capacity.

occupancy_density.label: Occupancy Densité
occupancy_density.helper: People par square meter, impacts internal heat gain (ASHRAE 62.1).

is_preventive_maintenance_active.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
is_preventive_maintenance_active.helper: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

flow_rate.label: Débit Taux
flow_rate.helper: Volumetric Débit Taux of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

pressure_drop_total.label: Total Pression Drop
pressure_drop_total.helper: Sum of all Pression losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Densité
fluid_density.helper: Densité of hydraulic fluid at oparating temparature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

kinematic_viscosity.label: Kinematic Viscosity
kinematic_viscosity.helper: Fluid viscosity at oparating temparature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

pipe_length.label: Total Pipe Longueur
pipe_length.helper: Total Longueur of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diamètre
pipe_diameter.helper: Inner Diamètre du main hydraulic pipe. Affects Débit velocity and Reynolds number.

valve_count.label: Number of Valves
valve_count.helper: Total number of directional, Pression, and Débit control valves in the system.

fitting_count.label: Number of Fittings
fitting_count.helper: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: Application type influences typical loss factors and maintenance intervals.

is_new_system.label: New System (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.placeholder: Saisir new system (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.helper: New systems may have diffelocation loss characteristics due to break-in pariod.

base_cost.label: Base Coût (Courant pariod)
base_cost.helper: Total Coût of goods or services at the start du analysis pariod.

inflation_rate.label: Annual Inflation Taux
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation Taux for the Coût category (e.g., CPI, PPI).

period_years.label: Analysis pariod (Années)
period_years.helper: Number of Années over which inflation escalation is calculated.

escalation_method.label: Escalation Method
escalation_method.helper: Method to apply inflation: compound (annual compounding), simple (linear), or stepwise (discrete annual steps).

include_energy.label: Include Énergie Coût Escalation
include_energy.helper: If true, applies a sepaTaux Énergie escalation factor (typically higher than general inflation).

energy_escalation_rate.label: Énergie Escalation Taux
energy_escalation_rate.helper: Annual escalation Taux for Énergie Coûts, often based on EIA forecasts.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Annual productivity improvement that offsets labor Coût inflation (Lean / Six Sigma metric).

material_volatility_index.label: Matériau Volatility Index
material_volatility_index.helper: Multiplier to adjust Matériau inflation based on commodity volatility (e.g., coppar, steel).

current_rate.label: Courant Interest Taux (%)
current_rate.helper: The prevailing market interest Taux for the reference pariod.

rate_change.label: Expected Taux Change (bps)
rate_change.helper: Anticipated shift in interest Taux in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

portfolio_value.label: Portfolio Valeur (USD)
portfolio_value.helper: Total notional Valeur du fixed-income portfolio.

duration.label: Modified Durée (Années)
duration.helper: Sensitivity of bond Prix to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

convexity.label: Convexity
convexity.helper: Second-order measure of curvature in Prix-yield relationship.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: parcentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

volatility_regime.label: Volatility Regime
volatility_regime.helper: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Valeur (USD)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Total average Valeur of inventory over the pariod (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).

cogs_annual.label: Annual Coût of Goods Sold (USD)
cogs_annual.placeholder: Saisir annual coût of goods sold (usd)
cogs_annual.helper: Total Coût of goods sold over the last 12 months.

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher Valeurs indicate greater unpredictability.

obsolescence_rate.label: Obsolescence Taux (% par year)
obsolescence_rate.helper: Annual parcentage of inventory Valeur that becomes obsolete or expired.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Coût Taux (% par year)
carrying_cost_rate.placeholder: Saisir inventory carrying coût taux (% par year)
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual Coût to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a parcentage of inventory Valeur.

lead_time_days.label: Average Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead Temps from order placement to receipt.

service_level_target.label: Service Level Cible (%)
service_level_target.helper: Cible fill Taux or cycle service level (e.g., 95% = 0.95).

inventory_accuracy_pct.label: Inventory Record Accuracy (%)
inventory_accuracy_pct.helper: parcentage of inventory records matching physical counts (cycle count accuracy).

industry_benchmark_turnover.label: Industry Benchmark Turnover (turns/year)
industry_benchmark_turnover.helper: Expected turnover Taux for the industry (e.g., WERC benchmark).

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure (CapEx) for the project or asset.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash InDébit
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected Net cash inDébit par year (revenue minus oparating Coûts).

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Années)
project_life_years.helper: Durée over which cash Débits are projected.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital or required Taux of return.

terminal_value.label: Duréeinal Valeur
terminal_value.helper: Residual Valeur At end of project life (e.g., salvage, resale).

cash_flow_variability.label: Cash Débit Variability
cash_flow_variability.helper: Risk level affecting confidence in cash Débit estimates (low = ±5%, medium = ±15%, high = ±30%).

lean_six_sigma_adjustment.label: Lean Six Sigma Adjustment
lean_six_sigma_adjustment.helper: If enabled, applies a 2% reduction to cash Débits to account for process parte and variation (Lean Six Sigma standard).

total_energy_consumption.label: Total Énergie Consommation
total_energy_consumption.helper: Total Énergie consumed by the organization in the baseline pariod (e.g., one year).

production_volume.label: Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total production output in the baseline pariod (e.g., number of products, tons, or other relevant unit).

heating_degree_days.label: Heating Degree Jours (HDD)
heating_degree_days.helper: Annual heating degree Jours for the facility location, utilisé to normalize weather-related Énergie use.

cooling_degree_days.label: Cooling Degree Jours (CDD)
cooling_degree_days.helper: Annual cooling degree Jours for the facility location, utilisé to normalize weather-related Énergie use.

operating_hours.label: Oparating Heures
operating_hours.helper: Total Heures the facility opeTauxd during the baseline pariod.

energy_source_mix.label: Énergie Source Mix
energy_source_mix.helper: Primary Énergie sources utilisé, affecting emission factors and normalization.

baseline_type.label: Baseline Type
baseline_type.helper: Type of baseline par ISO 50001:2018 clause 6.3.

use_weather_normalization.label: Apply Weather Normalization
use_weather_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts Énergie Consommation for heating and cooling degree Jours.

use_production_normalization.label: Apply Production Normalization
use_production_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts Énergie Consommation for production Volume.

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux (par hour)
labor_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor Coût par oparator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).

operators_affected.label: Number of Oparators Affected
operators_affected.helper: Number of direct oparators whose work is impacted by the Kaizen event. utilisé pour calculer labor savings.

time_saved_per_operator.label: Temps Saved par Oparator par Shift
time_saved_per_operator.placeholder: Saisir Temps saved par oparator par shift
time_saved_per_operator.helper: Reduction in cycle Temps or non-Valeur-added Temps par oparator par shift, measured via Temps studies (Lean standard work, ISO 22400).

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts par Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts par day. Typical in manufacturing (WERC DC Measures).

operating_days_per_year.label: Oparating Jours par Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Annual oparating Jours, excluding weekends and holiJours. Standard for industrial planning (ISO 9001).

defect_rate_before.label: Defect Taux Before Kaizen
defect_rate_before.helper: parcentage of defective units before improvement. Six Sigma DMAIC baseline (DPMO conversion).

defect_rate_after.label: Defect Taux After Kaizen
defect_rate_after.helper: parcentage of defective units after improvement. Must be <= defect_Taux_before for valid savings.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced par year. utilisé to scale defect savings.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût of rework, scrap, warranty, and inspection par defective unit (COPQ, ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

material_cost_savings.label: Matériau Coût Savings (annual)
material_cost_savings.helper: Direct Matériau savings from parte reduction, scrap reduction, or better yield. Enter 0 if not applicable.

energy_cost_savings.label: Énergie Coût Savings (annual)
energy_cost_savings.helper: Énergie savings from process improvements (ISO 50001, Lean Énergie). Enter 0 if not applicable.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation Coût (one-Temps)
implementation_cost.helper: Total Coût to implement the Kaizen (training, equipment, downtime). utilisé for ROI calculation.

sustainability_factor.label: Sustainability Factor
sustainability_factor.helper: Confidence that savings will parsist over Temps. Low = 0.7, Medium = 0.85, High = 1.0. Based on Lean sustainability audits.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Quality of Entrée data. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0. Affects adjusted savings.

mass_kg.label: Mass in Kilograms
mass_kg.helper: Entrée mass Valeur in kilograms for conversion to pounds. utilisé in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

precision_level.label: Precision Level
precision_level.helper: Sélectionnez number of decimal places for output rounding, par ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

use_industry_rounding.label: Use Industry Rounding (WERC)
use_industry_rounding.helper: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty in the Entrée measurement, utilisé for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

mass_lbs.label: Mass in Pounds (lb)
mass_lbs.helper: Entrée mass Valeur in pounds for conversion to kilograms. utilisé in logistics, manufacturing, and Matériau handling.

precision_level.label: Precision Level (Decimal Places)
precision_level.helper: Sélectionnez number of decimal places for the output. Higher precision for laboratory or quality control (ISO 17025).

rounding_method.label: Rounding Method
rounding_method.helper: Rounding method par ASTM E29 or ISO 80000-1. Standard rounding (half up) is default for most industrial applications.

include_loss_analysis.label: Include Hidden Loss Analysis
include_loss_analysis.helper: Enable pour calculer potential mass loss due to moisture, measurement error, or Matériau handling (Lean Six Sigma parte analysis).

measurement_uncertainty_pct.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty_pct.helper: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a parcentage du mass Valeur. Based on calibration data (ISO 17025, GUM).

material_type.label: Matériau Type (for loss factor)
material_type.helper: Matériau type influences hidden loss factors (e.g., moisture absorption for hygroscopic Matériaus, spillage for powders).

acquisition_cost.label: Acquisition Coût
acquisition_cost.helper: Total initial Coût of acquiring the asset (purchase, installation, commissioning).

expected_life_years.label: Expected Life (Années)
expected_life_years.helper: Planned Durée de vie utile du asset par ISO 15686.

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance StTauxgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Type of maintenance approach (preventive, predictive, reactive).

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux
labor_rate.helper: Average hourly Coût of maintenance labor.

parts_cost_per_incident.label: Parts Coût par Incident
parts_cost_per_incident.helper: Average Coût of spare parts par maintenance event.

downtime_cost_per_hour.label: Downtime Coût par Hour
downtime_cost_per_hour.helper: Lost revenue or Coût par hour of unplanned downtime.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Taux
inflation_rate.helper: Annual inflation Taux for future Coût adjustments.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux
discount_rate.helper: Discount Taux for Net present Valeur calculations.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence
data_confidence.helper: Confidence level in Entrée data accuracy (0-100%).

first_unit_time.label: First Unit Temps (Heures)
first_unit_time.helper: Standard Temps to produce the first unit, typically from historical data or pilot run.

learning_rate.label: Learning Taux (%)
learning_rate.helper: parcentage reduction in Temps par doubling of cumulative units. Typical range 70-95% for manual tasks.

cumulative_units.label: Cumulative Units Produced
cumulative_units.helper: Total number of units produced to date, utilisé to estimate Courant and future unit times.

target_units.label: Cible Units for Estimate
target_units.helper: The specific unit number for which the Temps estimate est obligatoire.

shift_length.label: Shift Longueur (Heures)
shift_length.helper: Standard working shift Durée for converting Temps to calendar Jours.

learning_model.label: Learning Curve Model
learning_model.helper: Sélectionnez theoretical model: Wright (standard), Crawford (unit), or DeJong (plateau).

include_break_in.label: Include Break-In Effect
include_break_in.helper: If true, applies a penalty factor for production interruptions (e.g., after holiJours or retooling).

break_in_penalty.label: Break-In Penalty (%)
break_in_penalty.helper: parcentage increase in Temps for the first unit after a break, applied only if break-in is enabled.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Purchase Prix
equipmentcost.helper: Total upfront Coût to acquire the asset if achating.

leasetermmonths.label: Lease Durée
leasetermmonths.helper: Durée du lease agreement in months.

monthlyleasepayment.label: Monthly Lease Payment
monthlyleasepayment.helper: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.

residualvalue.label: Residual Valeur At End of Lease
residualvalue.placeholder: Saisir residual valeur at end of lease
residualvalue.helper: Estimated market Valeur du equipment at lease end (if achating, this is Valeur résiduelle).

annualmaintenancecost.label: Annual Maintenance Coût (achat)
annualmaintenancecost.helper: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.

leasemaintenanceincluded.label: Maintenance Included in Lease?
leasemaintenanceincluded.helper: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.

discountrate.label: Discount Taux (WACC)
discountrate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital utilisé to discount future cash Débits.

utilizationrate.label: Expected Utilization Taux
utilizationrate.helper: parcentage of Temps the equipment is expected to be productive.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax Taux
taxrate.helper: CorpoTaux tax Taux applied to depreciation and lease payment deductions.

depreciationmethod.label: Depreciation Method
depreciationmethod.helper: Method utilisé pour calculer annual depreciation for tax shield.

leasetype.label: Lease Type
leasetype.helper: Oparating lease is off-balance-sheet; capital lease is treated as ownership.

current_weight_kg.label: Courant Poids par Unit (kg)
current_weight_kg.helper: Poids du product or packaging before lightPoidsing.

new_weight_kg.label: New Poids par Unit (kg)
new_weight_kg.helper: Poids du product or packaging after lightPoidsing.

annual_volume_units.label: Annual Volume (units)
annual_volume_units.helper: Total number of units produced or shipped par year.

material_cost_per_kg.label: Matériau Coût par kg
material_cost_per_kg.helper: Coût of raw Matériau par kilogram.

waste_rate_percent.label: parte Taux (%)
waste_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of Matériau parted during production (scrap, rework).

labor_hours_per_unit.label: Labor Heures par Unit
labor_hours_per_unit.helper: Direct Labor Heures required to produce one unit.

energy_consumption_per_kg.label: Énergie Consommation par kg of Matériau
energy_consumption_per_kg.placeholder: Saisir énergie consommation par kg of matériau
energy_consumption_per_kg.helper: Énergie utilisée to process one kilogram of Matériau.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead Taux (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of direct Coûts allocated to overhead.

material_type.label: Matériau Type
material_type.helper: Type of Matériau being lightPoidsed, affects processing and recyclability.

use_recycled_content.label: Use Recycled Content
use_recycled_content.helper: Whether the new Matériau includes recycled content, which may reduce Coût and environmental impact.

liters.label: Volume in Liters
liters.helper: Total liquid Volume to be converted, typically from production batch or storage tank measurement.

conversionstandard.label: Conversion Standard
conversionstandard.helper: Sélectionnez gallon standard based on regional regulatory or trade requirements (ISO 80000-1).

temperatureadjustment.label: Temparature Adjustment Factor
temperatureadjustment.helper: Correction factor for thermal expansion/contraction of liquid (par ASTM D1250). 1.0 = no adjustment.

batchlossfactor.label: Batch Loss Factor
batchlossfactor.helper: Expected parcentage loss during transfer or processing (Lean Six Sigma parte reduction).

includeevaporation.label: Include Evaporation Loss
includeevaporation.helper: If true, applies an additional evaporation loss factor based on standard industrial evaporation Tauxs.

value_x.label: Valeur X (oparand)
value_x.helper: Primary Entrée for logarithmic calculation. Represents throughput, defect count, or signal amplitude.

base.label: Logarithm Base
base.helper: Sélectionnez logarithmic base par application: base 2 for binary entropy, base e for continuous processes, base 10 for decibel and pH scales.

unit_type.label: Unit Type
unit_type.helper: Sélectionnez unit type to apply correct scaling for decibel calculations in acoustics, electronics, or vibration analysis.

reference_value.label: Reference Valeur (for ratio)
reference_value.helper: Reference baseline for ratio-based logarithmic calculations (e.g., reference Puissance, reference amplitude).

enable_threshold_alerts.label: Enable Threshold Alerts
enable_threshold_alerts.helper: Toggle to activate automated alerts when logarithmic results exceed predefined industrial thresholds.

route_distance_km.label: Route Distance (km)
route_distance_km.helper: Total Distance du route from origin to destination.

average_speed_kmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmh.helper: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

planned_stops.label: Planned Stops
planned_stops.helper: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

average_stop_time_min.label: Average Stop Temps (min)
average_stop_time_min.helper: Average Temps spent par stop, including waiting and handling.

traffic_delay_factor.label: Traffic Delay Factor
traffic_delay_factor.helper: Fraction of driving Temps lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

fuel_cost_per_km.label: Carburant Coût par km
fuel_cost_per_km.helper: Average Carburant Coût par kilometer for the vehicle type.

vehicle_operating_cost_per_km.label: Vehicle Oparating Coût par km
vehicle_operating_cost_per_km.placeholder: Saisir vehicle oparating coût par km
vehicle_operating_cost_per_km.helper: Non-Carburant oparating Coûts par km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

load_value_currency.label: Load Valeur (currency)
load_value_currency.helper: Total moNetary Valeur du cargo being Transported.

transit_time_target_hours.label: Transit Temps Cible (Heures)
transit_time_target_hours.helper: Cible transit Temps for the route (utilisé to compute Temps-based penalties).

route_type.label: Route Type
route_type.helper: Type of route affecting speed and delay assumptions.

use_real_time_traffic.label: Use Real-Temps Traffic Data
use_real_time_traffic.helper: If true, the calculator will adjust traffic delay factor based on real-Temps data (premium feature).

purchase_price.label: Purchase Prix
purchase_price.helper: Initial capital investment for the machine, including installation and commissioning.

salvage_value.label: Valeur résiduelle at End of Life
salvage_value.placeholder: Saisir valeur résiduelle at end of life
salvage_value.helper: Estimated resale or scrap Valeur At the end du machine's Durée de vie utile.

useful_life_years.label: Estimated Durée de vie utile
useful_life_years.placeholder: Saisir estimated durée de vie utile
useful_life_years.helper: Expected number of Années the machine will be oparational before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_operating_cost.label: Annual Oparating Coût (Year 1)
annual_operating_cost.helper: Includes Énergie, Consommables, labor, and routine maintenance in the first year.

operating_cost_escalation_rate.label: Oparating Coût Escalation Taux
operating_cost_escalation_rate.helper: Annual increase in oparating Coûts due to aging, inflation, and wear.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital utilisé for Net present Valeur calculations.

annual_production_units.label: Annual Production Units
annual_production_units.helper: Number of units produced par year at full capacity.

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue par Unit
revenue_per_unit.helper: Selling Prix par unit produced by the machine.

quality_defect_rate.label: Initial Defect Taux
quality_defect_rate.helper: parcentage of defective units in the first year, utilisé to model quality degradation over Temps.

defect_rate_annual_increase.label: Defect Taux Annual Increase
defect_rate_annual_increase.helper: Yearly increase in defect Taux due to machine wear, impacting rework and scrap Coûts.

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance StTauxgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Type of maintenance program in place, affecting downtime and Coût patterns.

utilization_rate.label: Utilization Taux
utilization_rate.helper: parcentage of available Temps the machine is actually producing.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Énergie Coût par kWh
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Coût of electricity par kilowatt-hour, utilisé for Énergie Consommation modeling.

power_consumption_kw.label: Puissance Consommation
power_consumption_kw.helper: Tauxd Puissance Consommation du machine during oparation.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 3685 standard for tool life; affects surface finish and cycle Temps.

feed_rate.label: Feed Taux (f)
feed_rate.helper: ISO 3002/1 standard; influences chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: Profondeur of Cut (ap)
depth_of_cut.helper: ISO 3002/1; affects cutting forces and Puissance Consommation.

part_length.label: Part Longueur (L)
part_length.helper: Workpiece geometry; defines total travel Distance.

part_diameter.label: Part Diamètre (D)
part_diameter.helper: Workpiece Diamètre; utilisé for rotational speed calculation.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change Temps (Tct)
tool_change_time.helper: SMED (Single Minute Exchange of Die) metric; Lean manufacturing.

tool_life_minutes.label: Tool Life (T)
tool_life_minutes.helper: ISO 3685 Taylor tool life equation; affects Coût and downtime.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes (n_passes)
number_of_passes.helper: Roughing/finishing stTauxgy; impacts total cycle Temps.

machine_type.label: Machine Type
machine_type.helper: ISO 841 for coordinate systems; affects spindle Puissance and rigidity.

use_high_feed.label: High Feed StTauxgy
use_high_feed.helper: Lean Six Sigma approach to reduce cycle Temps; may increase tool wear.

revenue.label: Total Revenue
revenue.helper: Total sales revenue for the pariod (ISO 9001 financial reporting).

materialcost.label: Direct Matériau Coût
materialcost.helper: Coût of raw Matériaus directly utilisé in production (Lean Coût accounting).

laborcost.label: Direct Labor Coût
laborcost.helper: Wages and benefits for production labor (Six Sigma labor variance).

overheadcost.label: Manufacturing Overhead
overheadcost.helper: Indirect manufacturing Coûts (ISO 14000 environmental overhead allocation).

defectrate.label: Defect Taux
defectrate.helper: parcentage of defective units (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Coût par Unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Average Coût to rework one defective unit (Lean parte reduction).

unitsproduced.label: Units Produced
unitsproduced.helper: Total units produced in the pariod (WERC throughput metric).

inventoryholdingcost.label: Inventory Holding Coût Taux
inventoryholdingcost.helper: Annual holding Coût as parcentage of inventory Valeur (WERC warehousing standard).

averageinventoryvalue.label: Average Inventory Valeur
averageinventoryvalue.helper: Average Valeur of inventory held (ISO 9001 inventory management).

logisticscost.label: Logistics Coût
logisticscost.helper: Total inbound and outbound freight Coûts (WERC logistics benchmark).

qualitysystemcost.label: Quality System Coût
qualitysystemcost.helper: Coût of quality management system (ISO 9001 compliance).

productionvolume.label: Production Volume
productionvolume.helper: Number of units produced for the pariod (Lean throughput).

setuptimehours.label: Préparation Temps par Batch
setuptimehours.helper: Temps to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of units par production batch (Lean batch size reduction).

laborrate.label: Labor Taux
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits (Six Sigma labor variance).

machinedowntimepercent.label: Machine Downtime
machinedowntimepercent.helper: parcentage of scheduled Temps machine is down (OEE metric).

energycostperunit.label: Énergie Coût par Unit
energycostperunit.helper: Énergie Coût allocated par unit produced (ISO 50001 Énergie management).

warrantyreturnrate.label: Warranty Return Taux
warrantyreturnrate.helper: parcentage of units returned under warranty (Six Sigma customer quality).

warrantycostperreturn.label: Warranty Coût par Return
warrantycostperreturn.helper: Average Coût to process one warranty return (ISO 9001 customer feedback).

scraprate.label: Scrap Taux
scraprate.helper: parcentage of Matériau scrapped (Lean parte elimination).

materialcostperunit.label: Matériau Coût par Unit
materialcostperunit.helper: Standard Matériau Coût par good unit (Lean Coût analysis).

current_material_cost.label: Courant Matériau Coût par Unit
current_material_cost.placeholder: Saisir courant matériau coût par unit
current_material_cost.helper: Direct Matériau Coût par unit for the Courant Matériau.

alternative_material_cost.label: Alternative Matériau Coût par Unit
alternative_material_cost.placeholder: Saisir alternative matériau coût par unit
alternative_material_cost.helper: Direct Matériau Coût par unit for the alternative Matériau.

annual_volume.label: Annual Volume (units)
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or purchased par year.

scrap_rate_current.label: Courant Scrap Taux (%)
scrap_rate_current.helper: parcentage of units scrapped due to defects with Courant Matériau.

scrap_rate_alternative.label: Alternative Scrap Taux (%)
scrap_rate_alternative.helper: parcentage of units scrapped due to defects with alternative Matériau.

logistics_cost_current.label: Courant Logistics Coût par Unit
logistics_cost_current.placeholder: Saisir courant logistics coût par unit
logistics_cost_current.helper: Transportation, handling, and warehousing Coût par unit for Courant Matériau.

logistics_cost_alternative.label: Alternative Logistics Coût par Unit
logistics_cost_alternative.placeholder: Saisir alternative logistics coût par unit
logistics_cost_alternative.helper: Transportation, handling, and warehousing Coût par unit for alternative Matériau.

changeover_cost.label: One-Temps Changeover Coût
changeover_cost.helper: Coût to retool, test, and qualify the alternative Matériau.

quality_impact.label: Quality Impact on Downstream
quality_impact.helper: Expected impact of Matériau change on downstream rework or quality issues.

supplier_reliability.label: Alternative Supplier Reliability
supplier_reliability.helper: Historical on-Temps delivery parformance du alternative supplier.

currency_risk.label: Currency Risk Factor
currency_risk.helper: Expected annual currency fluctuation risk if sourcing from diffelocation region.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding Coût Taux
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Annual Coût to hold inventory as a parcentage of unit Coût (WERC standard).

lead_time_current.label: Courant Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_current.helper: Average lead Temps for Courant Matériau.

lead_time_alternative.label: Alternative Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_alternative.helper: Average lead Temps for alternative Matériau.

value_mm.label: Valeur in Millimeters
value_mm.helper: The linear dimension to be converted from millimeters to inches. Typical range for industrial parts: 0.1 mm to 10,000 mm.

precision.label: Decimal Precision
precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the inch Résultat. ISO 2768-m standard suggests 2-4 decimals for general tolerances.

tolerance_mm.label: Tolerance (mm)
tolerance_mm.helper: Manufacturing tolerance in millimeters. utilisé to compute tolerance in inches and assess quality thresholds.

unit_system.label: Cible Unit System
unit_system.helper: Sélectionnez output unit system. Imparial outputs inches; metric outputs millimeters (for cross-check).

apply_six_sigma.label: Apply Six Sigma Adjustment
apply_six_sigma.helper: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process drift (Six Sigma DMAIC methodology).

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the SKU over one year. utilisé pour calculer order frequency and cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Coût par Order ($)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed Coût par purchase order (Préparation, administrative, freight). Influences EOQ and total logistics Coût.

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding Coût par Unit par Year ($)
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Saisir holding coût par unit par year ($)
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût to hold one unit in inventory for one year (storage, insurance, obsolescence). Key for inventory carrying Coût.

unit_cost.label: Unit Coût ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase Coût par unit from supplier. utilisé in Total Coût calculations and MOQ financial impact.

moq.label: Minimum Order Quantité (units)
moq.helper: Supplier-imposed minimum batch size. If EOQ < MOQ, order Quantité must be adjusted upward, increasing holding Coût.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_days.helper: Temps from order placement to receipt. utilisé for safety stock calculation and reorder point.

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units/day)
demand_std_dev.helper: Daily demand variability. Critical for safety stock under Six Sigma service levels.

service_level.label: Service Level (%)
service_level.helper: Desired probability of not stocking out during lead Temps. utilisé to derive z-score for safety stock.

days_per_year.label: Oparating Jours par Year
days_per_year.helper: Number of Jours the facility opeTauxs. Converts annual demand to daily demand.

storage_capacity.label: Storage Capacity (units)
storage_capacity.helper: Maximum inventory the warehouse can physically hold. Constraint for feasible order Quantité.

backorder_cost_per_unit.label: Backorder Coût par Unit ($)
backorder_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût par unit of unmet demand (lost sales, penalty, expediting). utilisé in Total Coût trade-off.

supplier_reliability.label: Supplier Reliability Factor
supplier_reliability.helper: Probability that supplier delivers on Temps. Adjusts safety stock for lead Temps variability (Lean JIT).

inventory_policy.label: Inventory Policy
inventory_policy.helper: Review method: continuous (Q,R) or pariodic (P,T). Affects safety stock formula.

use_moq_override.label: Force MOQ Compliance
use_moq_override.helper: If true, order Quantité is rounded up to MOQ when EOQ < MOQ. If false, EOQ is utilisé even if below MOQ (may violate supplier Durées).

mpg_value.label: Carburant Economy (MPG)
mpg_value.helper: Primary Entrée: miles par gallon (US gallon). Typical range for passenger vehicles: 10–60 mpg. utilisé in North American fleet reporting.

fuel_type.label: Carburant Type
fuel_type.helper: DeDuréeines carbon intensity and Énergie content. Required for environmental loss calculations par ISO 14067.

driving_cycle.label: Driving Cycle
driving_cycle.helper: Affects real-world efficiency deviation. utilisé in Six Sigma process capability analysis for fleet variance.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage
annual_mileage.helper: utilisé to compute total Carburant Consommation, Coût, and emissions. Typical fleet vehicle: 10k–30k miles/year.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: Carburant Prix par Gallon
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Local Carburant Coût for Total Coût of ownership (TCO) analysis. Entrée for Lean Coût reduction projects.

co2_per_gallon.label: CO₂ par Gallon
co2_per_gallon.helper: Default for gasoline: 8.887 kg CO₂/gallon (EPA). utilisé for environmental impact assessment par ISO 14064.

num_parts.label: Number of Parts in Study
num_parts.placeholder: Saisir number of parts in study
num_parts.helper: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 par AIAG MSA guidelines.

num_appraisers.label: Number of Appraisers
num_appraisers.helper: Number of oparators or appraisers parforming measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

num_trials.label: Number of Trials par Part
num_trials.placeholder: Saisir number of trials par part
num_trials.helper: Number of repeated measurements par part par appraiser, typically 2-3.

total_variation.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
total_variation.helper: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

repeatability_variation.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
repeatability_variation.helper: Variation due to equipment (same oparator, same part, repeated measurements).

reproducibility_variation.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
reproducibility_variation.helper: Variation due to diffelocation oparators measuring the same part.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect (Internal)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

cost_per_escaped_defect.label: Coût par Escaped Defect (External)
cost_per_escaped_defect.helper: Average Coût when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced par year for the measured characteristic.

defect_rate.label: Courant Defect Taux (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts par million non-conforming based on Courant measurement system.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (False Positives/Negatives)
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, calculates Coûts from misclassifications due to measurement error.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total planned oparating Heures du equipment par year. utilisé pour calculer failure frequency and downtime.

number_of_units.label: Number of Units
number_of_units.helper: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

mtbf.label: Mean Temps Between Failures (MTBF)
mtbf.helper: Average Temps between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

mttr.label: Mean Temps To Repair (MTTR)
mttr.helper: Average Temps to restore a failed system to oparational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

cost_per_downtime_hour.label: Coût par Downtime Hour
cost_per_downtime_hour.helper: Lost profit or Coût incurred par hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

cost_per_failure_event.label: Coût par Failure Event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.placeholder: Saisir coût par failure event (excluding downtime)
cost_per_failure_event.helper: Fixed Coûts par failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

maintenance_labor_rate.label: Maintenance Labor Taux
maintenance_labor_rate.helper: Hourly Coût of maintenance parsonnel (including overhead).

reliability_improvement_investment.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
