reliability_improvement_investment.helper: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

availability_target.label: Disponibilité Cible
availability_target.helper: Cible oparational Disponibilité (uptime / total Temps). utilisé for gap analysis.

industry_benchmark_mtbf.label: Industry Benchmark MTBF
industry_benchmark_mtbf.helper: Reference MTBF from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ISO) for comparison.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Matériau Coût par Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Matériau Coût par unit of product, including raw Matériaus and purchased components.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully burdened labor Coût par hour for direct oparators.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Taux
overhead_rate.helper: parcentage of direct labor Coût allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 Coût accounting).

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux
defect_rate.helper: parcentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_time_per_unit.label: Rework Temps par Unit
rework_time_per_unit.helper: Average Temps spent reworking a defective unit.

scrap_rate.label: Scrap Taux
scrap_rate.helper: parcentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).

waiting_time_per_unit.label: Waiting Temps par Unit
waiting_time_per_unit.helper: Average idle Temps par unit due to bottlenecks, Matériau shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt Temps analysis).

excess_motion_cost_per_unit.label: Excess Motion Coût par Unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Saisir excess motion coût par unit
excess_motion_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) par unit, based on Temps-motion studies.

inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.label: Inventory Holding Coût par Unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Saisir inventory holding coût par unit
inventory_holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût of holding one unit in inventory par year (WERC DC Metrics).

overproduction_quantity.label: Overproduction Quantité
overproduction_quantity.helper: Number of units produced beyond customer demand (Muda of overproduction).

transportation_cost_per_unit.label: Transportation Coût par Unit
transportation_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût of moving Matériaus or products between processes (Lean parte of Transportation).

processing_waste_per_unit.label: Processing parte par Unit
processing_waste_per_unit.helper: Coût of unnecessary processing steps or non-Valeur-added oparations.

production_volume.label: Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the analysis pariod.

shift_hours_per_day.label: Shift Heures par Day
shift_hours_per_day.helper: Number of oparating Heures par shift.

working_days_per_year.label: Working Jours par Year
working_days_per_year.helper: Number of working Jours par year.

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Industry sector for benchmarking and threshold adjustment.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses
include_hidden_losses.helper: If true, includes intangible losses such as lost opportunity Coût and brand damage.

num_workers_exposed.label: Number of workers exposed
num_workers_exposed.helper: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).

avg_daily_exposure_hours.label: Average daily exposure Heures
avg_daily_exposure_hours.helper: par worker, typical shift Durée in the affected Surface.

noise_level_dba.label: Noise level (A-Poidsed)
noise_level_dba.helper: Measured at oparator position par ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.

vibration_level_ms2.label: Vibration level (RMS acceleration)
vibration_level_ms2.helper: Poidsed acceleration par ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.

machine_runtime_hours_per_day.label: Machine Durée d'exécution par day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.placeholder: Saisir machine durée d'exécution par day
machine_runtime_hours_per_day.helper: Total oparating Heures du primary noise/vibration source.

maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.label: Annual maintenance Coût par machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.placeholder: Saisir annual maintenance coût par machine
maintenance_cost_per_machine_per_year.helper: Courant average spend on repairs and parts for each affected machine.

number_of_machines.label: Number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.placeholder: Saisir number of machines in zone
number_of_machines.helper: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed Surface.

avg_worker_annual_salary.label: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.placeholder: Saisir average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
avg_worker_annual_salary.helper: Includes wages, benefits, overhead. utilisé to estimate productivity loss.

hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.label: Hearing protection Coût par worker par year
hearing_protection_cost_per_worker_per_y.placeholder: Saisir hearing protection coût par worker par year

quality_defect_rate_percent.label: Courant defect Taux due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.placeholder: Saisir courant defect taux due to vibration
quality_defect_rate_percent.helper: Estimated parcentage of parts affected by vibration-induced quality issues (e.g., surface finish, tolerances).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced par year in the assessed line.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût to rework or scrap a defective unit.

machine_power_kw.label: Machine Puissance Consommation
machine_power_kw.helper: Average Puissance draw par machine during oparation.

vibration_reduction_investment.label: Vibration reduction investment (one-Temps)
vibration_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for dampars, isolators, foundations, or redesign.

noise_reduction_investment.label: Noise reduction investment (one-Temps)
noise_reduction_investment.helper: Budget for enclosures, silencers, acoustic panels.

iso_standard_compliance.label: ISO standard compliance level
iso_standard_compliance.helper: Sélectionnez most relevant standard for threshold evaluation.

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment (CAPEX)
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning Coûts.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital reflecting the opportunity Coût of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Années)
project_life_years.helper: Expected oparational lifespan du investment par ISO 15686-5.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash InDébit
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected annual revenue or Coût savings geNetauxd by the investment.

annual_cash_outflow.label: Annual Cash OutDébit
annual_cash_outflow.helper: Annual oparating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring Coûts.

salvage_value.label: Valeur résiduelle
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual Valeur At the end of project life.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Taux
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation Taux for nominal cash Débit adjustments.

tax_rate.label: Effective Tax Taux
tax_rate.helper: CorpoTaux tax Taux applied to Net income.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Depreciation method for tax shield calculation par GAAP/IFRS.

include_sensitivity.label: Include Sensitivity Analysis
include_sensitivity.helper: Toggle to enable Monte Carlo simulation for risk assessment.

planned_production_time.label: Planned Production Temps (minutes)
planned_production_time.helper: Total scheduled Temps for production in a shift/day (e.g., 8 Heures = 480 minutes).

downtime_minutes.label: Total Downtime (minutes)
downtime_minutes.helper: Sum of all unplanned and planned stops (breakdowns, Préparation, maintenance).

ideal_cycle_time.label: Ideal Cycle Temps (minutes par unit)
ideal_cycle_time.placeholder: Saisir ideal cycle Temps (minutes par unit)
ideal_cycle_time.helper: Theoretical fastest Temps to produce one unit under optimal conditions.

total_parts_produced.label: Total Parts Produced
total_parts_produced.helper: Total count of units produced during the planned production Temps.

defective_parts.label: Defective Parts
defective_parts.helper: Number of units that do not meet quality standards (scrap, rework).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Type of shift to adjust for fatigue or environmental factors.

include_micro_stops.label: Include Micro-Stops (< 2 min) in Downtime
include_micro_stops.placeholder: Saisir include micro-stops (< 2 min) in downtime
include_micro_stops.helper: If true, small stops are counted as downtime par Six Sigma guidelines.

annual_usage_units.label: Annual Usage (units)
annual_usage_units.helper: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of papar, pens) consumed par year.

unit_cost.label: Unit Coût
unit_cost.helper: Average purchase Coût par unit du office supply item.

order_cost.label: Order Coût par Purchase Order
order_cost.placeholder: Saisir order coût par purchase order
order_cost.helper: Fixed Coût associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).

holding_cost_rate.label: Holding Coût Taux
holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding Coût as a parcentage of unit Coût (storage, insurance, obsolescence).

waste_percentage.label: parte parcentage
waste_percentage.helper: Estimated parcentage of supplies parted due to over-ordering, expiration, or damage.

order_frequency.label: Order Frequency
order_frequency.helper: How often orders are placed, affecting order size and inventory levels.

use_lean_inventory.label: Use Lean Inventory Principles
use_lean_inventory.helper: If enabled, applies just-in-Temps ordering to reduce holding Coûts and parte.

voltage.label: Voltage (V)
voltage.helper: Nominal voltage par IEC 60038. Typical industrial Valeurs: 230V single-phase, 400V three-phase.

current.label: Courant (I)
current.helper: Courant de charge in ampares. utilisé for conductor sizing and protection coordination.

resistance.label: Resistance (R)
resistance.helper: DC resistance or AC impedance at Puissance frequency. Includes conductor, contact, and load resistance.

powerfactor.label: Puissance Factor (cos φ)
powerfactor.helper: Ratio of real Puissance to appalocation Puissance. Typical industrial loads: 0.8-1.0. utilisé for AC Puissance calculations.

phasetype.label: Phase Type
phasetype.helper: Single-phase or three-phase system. Affects Puissance calculation formulas par IEC 60364.

temperature.label: Ambient Temparature
temperature.helper: Ambient temparature for resistance temparature correction. Coppar conductor TCR = 0.00393 /°C.

current_headcount.label: Courant Headcount (FTEs)
current_headcount.helper: Number of full-Temps equivalent Employés Courantly working in the department or line.

avg_hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage (Base)
avg_hourly_wage.helper: Average base hourly wage for the role, excluding overtime premium.

overtime_premium.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
overtime_premium.helper: Standard overtime pay multiplier (e.g., 1.5 for Temps-and-a-half, 2.0 for double Temps).

overtime_hours_per_week.label: Overtime Heures par Week (par FTE)
overtime_hours_per_week.placeholder: Saisir overtime heures par week (par fte)
overtime_hours_per_week.helper: Average overtime Heures worked par full-Temps employee par week.

hiring_cost_per_fte.label: Hiring Coût par FTE
hiring_cost_per_fte.helper: Total Coût to recruit, interview, onboard, and train a new employee (including agency fees, training Matériaus, lost productivity).

annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.label: Annual Benefits Coût par FTE
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.placeholder: Saisir annual benefits coût par fte
annual_benefits_cost_per_fte.helper: Annual Coût of benefits (health insurance, retirement, paid leave, etc.) par full-Temps employee.

productivity_factor_overtime.label: Overtime Productivity Factor
productivity_factor_overtime.helper: Productivity during overtime as a parcentage of normal shift productivity (e.g., 85% due to fatigue).

productivity_factor_new_hire.label: New Hire Ramp-Up Productivity
productivity_factor_new_hire.helper: Average productivity of a new hire during the first 3 months as a parcentage of an exparienced employee.

quality_defect_rate_overtime.label: Overtime Defect Taux Increase
quality_defect_rate_overtime.helper: Additional defect Taux (in parcentage points) observed during overtime shifts due to fatigue.

quality_defect_rate_normal.label: Normal Defect Taux
quality_defect_rate_normal.helper: Baseline defect Taux during regular shifts.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect (rework/scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût to rework or scrap a defective unit (labor, Matériaus, disposal).

weekly_productive_hours_needed.label: Weekly Productive Heures Needed
weekly_productive_hours_needed.helper: Total productive Heures required par week to meet demand (adjusted for normal productivity).

weeks_per_year.label: Weeks par Year (oparating)
weeks_per_year.helper: Number of weeks par year the oparation runs (typically 52 for continuous, 50 for seasonal).

include_risk_adjustment.label: Include Risk Adjustment
include_risk_adjustment.helper: If enabled, applies a risk multiplier to overtime Coûts to account for burnout, turnover, and safety incidents.

risk_multiplier.label: Overtime Risk Multiplier
risk_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to overtime Coûts when risk adjustment is enabled (based on historical incident data).

cycle_length.label: Average cycle Longueur (Jours)
cycle_length.helper: Typical range for healthy adult women; utilisé as baseline for ovulation estimation.

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal phase Longueur (Jours)
luteal_phase_length.helper: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

last_period_start.label: Start date of last menstrual pariod
last_period_start.placeholder: Saisir start date of last menstrual pariod
last_period_start.helper: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle Longueur variability (standard deviation, Jours)
cycle_variability.placeholder: Saisir cycle longueur variability (standard deviation, jours)
cycle_variability.helper: utilisé to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window Largeur par SPC rules.

age_group.label: Age group
age_group.helper: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; utilisé for risk adjustment.

has_irregular_cycles.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 Jours)
has_irregular_cycles.helper: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

rack_height_mm.label: Rack Hauteur (mm)
rack_height_mm.helper: Total vertical storage Hauteur par rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.

pallet_depth_mm.label: Pallet Profondeur (mm)
pallet_depth_mm.helper: Standard pallet Profondeur (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

pallet_width_mm.label: Pallet Largeur (mm)
pallet_width_mm.helper: Standard pallet Largeur (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

pallet_height_mm.label: Pallet Hauteur (mm)
pallet_height_mm.helper: Hauteur of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

beam_thickness_mm.label: Beam Épaisseur (mm)
beam_thickness_mm.helper: Vertical Épaisseur of horizontal load beams, affects usable Hauteur par level.

clearance_vertical_mm.label: Vertical Clearance (mm)
clearance_vertical_mm.helper: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.

aisle_width_mm.label: Aisle Largeur (mm)
aisle_width_mm.helper: Largeur of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, par OSHA/ISO 3691.

rack_length_mm.label: Rack Bay Longueur (mm)
rack_length_mm.helper: Horizontal Longueur of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

num_bays.label: Number of Bays
num_bays.helper: Number of adjacent rack bays in a row.

num_levels.label: Number of Levels
num_levels.helper: Number of horizontal beam levels par bay.

pallet_weight_kg.label: Average Pallet Poids (kg)
pallet_weight_kg.helper: Average Poids of a loaded pallet, utilisé for structural load calculations.

utilization_rate.label: Courant Utilization Taux (%)
utilization_rate.helper: parcentage of rack positions Courantly occupied.

storage_strategy.label: Storage StTauxgy
storage_strategy.helper: Warehouse inventory rotation stTauxgy affecting throughput and space utilization.

forklift_type.label: Forklift Type
forklift_type.helper: Forklift type deDuréeines required aisle Largeur and lift Hauteur capability.

seismic_zone.label: Seismic Zone
seismic_zone.helper: Seismic classification par ASCE 7 / IBC, affects rack bracing requirements.

include_beam_deflection_check.label: Include Beam Deflection Check
include_beam_deflection_check.helper: If enabled, validates beam deflection against L/180 standard (RMI/ANSI MH16.1).

avg_invoice_value.label: Average Invoice Valeur
avg_invoice_value.helper: Average moNetary Valeur of a single invoice issued to customers.

annual_invoice_count.label: Annual Invoice Count
annual_invoice_count.helper: Total number of invoices issued par year.

current_terms_days.label: Courant Payment Durées (Jours)
current_terms_days.helper: Courant Net payment Durée offered to customers (e.g., Net 30).

proposed_terms_days.label: Proposed Payment Durées (Jours)
proposed_terms_days.helper: New Net payment Durée to be evaluated (e.g., Net 15).

early_payment_discount_pct.label: Early Payment Discount (%)
early_payment_discount_pct.helper: parcentage discount offered for early payment (e.g., 2/10 Net 30).

discount_window_days.label: Discount Window (Jours)
discount_window_days.helper: Number of Jours within which the discount can be taken (e.g., 10 Jours for 2/10).

cost_of_capital_pct.label: Coût of Capital (%)
cost_of_capital_pct.helper: Annual Poidsed average Coût of capital (WACC) for the company.

customer_acceptance_rate_pct.label: Customer Acceptance Taux (%)
customer_acceptance_rate_pct.helper: Estimated parcentage of customers who will take the early payment discount.

industry_benchmark_dso.label: Industry Benchmark DSO (Jours)
industry_benchmark_dso.helper: Average Jours Sales Outstanding for the industry (WERC/CFO benchmarks).

payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
payment_behavior.helper: Typical payment behavior du customer base, utilisé to adjust effective DSO.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diamètre
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal pipe Diamètre par ISO 6708. Affects cross-sectional Surface and velocity.

pipe_length.label: Pipe Longueur
pipe_length.helper: Total straight pipe Longueur. utilisé for friction loss calculation.

flow_rate.label: Volumetric Débit Taux
flow_rate.helper: Design Débit Taux. Must be within pump capacity and pipe rating.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Densité
fluid_density.helper: Densité at oparating temparature. Water = 1000, oil ≈ 850.

fluid_viscosity.label: Dynamic Viscosity
fluid_viscosity.helper: Dynamic viscosity at oparating temparature. Water = 0.001, heavy oil up to 1.

roughness.label: Pipe Roughness
roughness.helper: Absolute roughness Hauteur. Steel = 0.000045, concrete = 0.001. par ISO 9906.

elevation_change.label: Elevation Change
elevation_change.helper: Positive if outlet is higher than inlet. Affects gravitational head.

minor_loss_coefficient.label: Minor Loss Coefficient (K)
minor_loss_coefficient.helper: Sum of K factors for fittings, valves, bends. par Crane Technical Papar No. 410.

flow_regime.label: Débit Regime Assumption
flow_regime.helper: Sélectionnez 'auto' for Reynolds-based deDuréeination. Override for sensitivity analysis.

include_measurement_uncertainty.label: Include Measurement Uncertainty
include_measurement_uncertainty.helper: When true, applies GUM (Guide to the Expression of Uncertainty in Measurement) propagation to final Résultat.

annual_units.label: Annual Units Produced
annual_units.helper: Total number of units produced par year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.

current_defect_rate.label: Courant Defect Taux
current_defect_rate.helper: Courant defect Taux in parts par million (ppm) for the process step Cibleed by the poka-yoke.

defect_cost_per_unit.label: Defect Coût par Unit
defect_cost_per_unit.helper: Average Total Coût incurred par defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.

poka_yoke_effectiveness.label: Poka-Yoke Effectiveness
poka_yoke_effectiveness.helper: Expected parcentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation Coût
implementation_cost.helper: Total one-Temps Coût to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Coût
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Recurring yearly Coût for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep du poka-yoke system.

labor_hours_saved_per_year.label: Labor Heures Saved par Year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.placeholder: Saisir labor heures saved par year
labor_hours_saved_per_year.helper: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework Labor Heures par year due to the poka-yoke.

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor Coût for oparators and inspectors.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount Taux utilisé for Net present Valeur (NPV) calculation, reflecting the Coût of capital.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Années)
project_life_years.helper: Expected Durée de vie utile du poka-yoke solution before major redesign or replacement.

lmp_date.label: Last Menstrual pariod (LMP) Date
lmp_date.helper: Date du first day du last menstrual pariod, utilisé as the baseline for gestational age calculation.

cycle_length.label: Average Cycle Longueur
cycle_length.helper: Average Longueur du woman's menstrual cycle in Jours. Deviations from 28 Jours adjust the due date estimate.

luteal_phase_length.label: Luteal Phase Longueur
luteal_phase_length.helper: Longueur du luteal phase (post-ovulation). Typically 14 Jours, but can vary. utilisé to refine ovulation date.

ultrasound_ga_weeks.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (weeks)
ultrasound_ga_weeks.helper: Gestational age measured by ultrasound (crown-rump Longueur). If provided, overrides LMP-based estimate.

ultrasound_ga_days.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (additional Jours)
ultrasound_ga_days.helper: Restant Jours beyond weeks for ultrasound gestational age.

cycle_variability.label: Cycle Variability (standard deviation)
cycle_variability.helper: Standard deviation of cycle Longueur, utilisé to compute confidence intervals and data confidence adjustment.

parity.label: Parity (number of previous births)
parity.helper: Number of previous live births. utilisé in risk stratification (e.g., grand multiparity).

risk_factors.label: Risk Factors Present
risk_factors.helper: Presence of known risk factors that may affect due date reliability or require additional monitoring.

design_pressure.label: Design Pression (P)
design_pressure.helper: Maximum allowable working Pression par ASME UG-21

allowable_stress.label: Allowable Stress (S)
allowable_stress.helper: Matériau allowable stress at design temparature par ASME II Part D

joint_efficiency.label: Joint Efficiency (E)
joint_efficiency.helper: Welded joint efficiency factor par ASME UW-12

corrosion_allowance.label: Corrosion Allowance (CA)
corrosion_allowance.helper: Additional Épaisseur for corrosion/erosion par UG-25

material_utilization.label: Matériau Utilization Factor
material_utilization.helper: Lean manufacturing metric for Matériau parte reduction

safety_factor_override.label: Override Safety Factor
safety_factor_override.helper: Enable to use custom safety factor instead of ASME default 3.5

custom_safety_factor.label: Custom Safety Factor
custom_safety_factor.helper: Only utilisé if override is enabled; typical range par ISO 16528

current_price.label: Courant Prix par Unit
current_price.helper: The Courant Selling Prix du product in USD.

current_quantity.label: Courant Quantité Sold (units/month)
current_quantity.helper: Monthly sales Volume at Courant Prix.

price_change_percent.label: Proposed Prix Change (%)
price_change_percent.helper: parcentage change in Prix (negative for decrease, positive for increase).

elasticity_coefficient.label: Prix Elasticity of Demand (PED)
elasticity_coefficient.helper: Estimated elasticity coefficient (typically negative). Absolute Valeur >1 indicates elastic demand.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Coût par Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Variable Coût par unit (Matériaus, labor, etc.).

fixed_cost_monthly.label: Fixed Coût par Month
fixed_cost_monthly.helper: Total Fixed Coûts allocated par month.

demand_shift_factor.label: Demand Shift Factor (seasonality/market)
demand_shift_factor.helper: Multiplier to adjust baseline demand (e.g., 1.2 for 20% market growth).

confidence_level.label: Data Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Quality of Entrée data: low = ±20% error, medium = ±10%, high = ±5%.

apply_six_sigma_adjustment.label: Apply Six Sigma Process Adjustment
apply_six_sigma_adjustment.placeholder: Saisir apply six sigma process adjustment
apply_six_sigma_adjustment.helper: If true, applies a 1.5 sigma shift to account for process variation (DMAIC).

material_weight.label: Matériau Poids
material_weight.helper: Total Poids of raw Matériaus utilisé in the product, including all components and packaging.

material_type.label: Matériau Type
material_type.helper: Primary Matériau category to deDuréeine emission factors par ISO 14067.

energy_consumption.label: Énergie Consommation in Manufacturing
energy_consumption.helper: Total electrical Énergie utilisée during production processes (machining, assembly, etc.).

transport_distance.label: Transport Distance
transport_distance.helper: Average Distance from raw Matériau source to manufacturing facility, and from facility to customer.

transport_mode.label: Transport Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of Transport affecting emission factors par ton-km (WERC guidelines).

recycled_content.label: Recycled Content
recycled_content.helper: parcentage of recycled Matériau in the product, reducing virgin Matériau emissions.

use_phase_efficiency.label: Use Phase Efficiency
use_phase_efficiency.helper: Annual Énergie Consommation du product during its use phase (e.g., for appliances).

lifespan.label: Product Lifespan
lifespan.helper: Expected Durée de vie utile du product, utilisé to allocate use-phase emissions.

end_of_life_recycling_rate.label: End-of-Life Recycling Taux
end_of_life_recycling_rate.helper: parcentage of product mass that is recycled at end of life, reducing disposal emissions.

energy_source.label: Énergie Source
energy_source.helper: Type of Énergie utilisée in manufacturing, affecting emission factor par kWh.

avg_volume_per_sku.label: Average Volume par SKU
avg_volume_per_sku.helper: Average annual production Quantité par SKU.

num_components.label: Number of Unique Components
num_components.helper: Total distinct raw Matériaus or parts utilisé across all SKUs.

avg_bom_levels.label: Average BOM Levels
avg_bom_levels.helper: Average Profondeur du bill of Matériaus (number of subassembly tiers).

setup_time_minutes.label: Average Préparation Temps par Changeover
setup_time_minutes.placeholder: Saisir average préparation Temps par changeover
setup_time_minutes.helper: Average Temps to change a production line from one SKU to another.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Taux
overhead_rate.helper: Manufacturing overhead as parcentage of direct labor and Matériau.

complexity_type.label: Complexity Type
complexity_type.helper: Category of complexity: 'product' (high SKU count), 'process' (high Préparation Temps), 'mixed' (both).

use_lean_metrics.label: Use Lean Metrics (SMED, OEE)
use_lean_metrics.helper: If true, applies SMED-based Préparation reduction and OEE factors.

labor_hours.label: Direct Labor Heures
labor_hours.helper: Total planned direct Labor Heures for the project, based on work breakdown structure (WBS).

labor_rate.label: Average Labor Taux
labor_rate.helper: Poidsed average hourly Taux including wages, benefits, and overhead par ISO 15686-5.

material_cost.label: Matériau Coût
material_cost.helper: Total Coût of raw Matériaus and purchased components, including procurement and logistics.

equipment_cost.label: Equipment & Tooling Coût
equipment_cost.helper: Coût of specialized machinery, tooling, and equipment depreciation or locational.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead parcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect Coût Taux (facilities, utilities, management) as a parcentage of direct Coûts, par standard Coût accounting.

complexity_factor.label: Project Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts Coût based on project complexity (low/medium/high) par PMI and Lean principles.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (Sigma)
quality_level.helper: Cible quality level based on Six Sigma; higher sigma reduces rework and hidden Coûts.

use_lean_standardization.label: Apply Lean Standardization
use_lean_standardization.helper: If true, applies lean parte reduction factor (e.g., 5% reduction in labor and Matériau).

plannedduration.label: Planned Durée (months)
plannedduration.helper: Original planned project Durée in months as par baseline schedule.

actualduration.label: Actual Durée to Date (months)
actualduration.helper: Elapsed Temps since project start, utilisé to compute schedule parformance.

plannedcost.label: Planned Total Coût (USD)
plannedcost.helper: Total budgeted Coût for the project at completion.

actualcost.label: Actual Coût Incurred (USD)
actualcost.helper: Total Coûts actually incurred up to the Courant reporting pariod.

percentcomplete.label: parcent Complete (%)
percentcomplete.helper: Estimated parcentage of work completed based on earned Valeur or physical progress.

scopechangefrequency.label: Scope Change Frequency
scopechangefrequency.helper: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, ModeTaux = 2-4, High = 5+.

teamexperience.label: Team Exparience Level
teamexperience.helper: Average exparience level du core project team.

qualitydefectrate.label: Quality Defect Taux (defects par unit)
qualitydefectrate.placeholder: Saisir quality defect taux (defects par unit)
qualitydefectrate.helper: Number of defects par unit of output (e.g., par 1000 lines of code, par 100 parts).

supplierreliability.label: Supplier Reliability Index
supplierreliability.helper: Probability that critical suppliers deliver on Temps and within spec (0 = unreliable, 1 = fully reliable).

riskexposure.label: Risk Exposure (USD)
riskexposure.helper: MoNetary Valeur of identified risks (probability * impact) not yet mitigated.

pressure_psi.label: Pression (PSI)
pressure_psi.helper: Entrée Pression in pounds par square inch (PSI). Typical range: 0–100,000 psi for industrial applications.

temperature_celsius.label: Temparature (°C)
temperature_celsius.helper: Process temparature in Celsius. utilisé for thermal correction par ISO 80000-1.

altitude_meters.label: Altitude (m)
altitude_meters.helper: Altitude above sea level for barometric correction. Relevant for high-altitude installations.

fluid_type.label: Fluid Type
fluid_type.helper: Sélectionnez fluid type for Densité correction. Options: water, oil, gas, steam.

include_temperature_correction.label: Apply Temparature Correction
include_temperature_correction.helper: Enable thermal expansion correction for Pression measurement.

include_altitude_correction.label: Apply Altitude Correction
include_altitude_correction.helper: Enable barometric Pression correction based on altitude.

coefficient_a.label: Coefficient a (quadratic Durée)
coefficient_a.helper: Leading coefficient du quadratic equation ax² + bx + c = 0. Must be non-zero for a valid quadratic.

coefficient_b.label: Coefficient b (linear Durée)
coefficient_b.helper: Linear coefficient influencing the vertex position and root symmetry.

coefficient_c.label: Coefficient c (constant Durée)
coefficient_c.helper: Constant Durée representing the y-intercept du quadratic function.

precision_mode.label: Precision Mode
precision_mode.helper: Selects rounding and display precision: standard (4 decimals), high (8 decimals), engineering (scientific notation).

use_complex_roots.label: Allow Complex Roots
use_complex_roots.helper: When true, the calculator returns complex roots for negative discriminants. When false, it returns an error for non-real roots.

total_sales.label: Total Sales Revenue
total_sales.helper: Annual total sales revenue utilisé as a baseline for Coût ratio calculations.

prevention_training_cost.label: Prevention Training Coût
prevention_training_cost.helper: Coûts for quality training, process planning, and preventive maintenance.

prevention_design_cost.label: Prevention Design/Process Control Coût
prevention_design_cost.helper: Coûts for FMEA, design reviews, and process control implementation.

appraisal_inspection_cost.label: Appraisal Inspection & Testing Coût
appraisal_inspection_cost.helper: Coûts for incoming, in-process, and final inspection and testing.

appraisal_audit_cost.label: Appraisal Audit & Calibration Coût
appraisal_audit_cost.helper: Coûts for internal/external audits and equipment calibration.

internal_failure_scrap_cost.label: Internal Failure Scrap & Rework Coût
internal_failure_scrap_cost.placeholder: Saisir internal failure scrap & rework coût
internal_failure_scrap_cost.helper: Coûts of scrap, rework, and downtime due to defects before delivery.

internal_failure_downtime_cost.label: Internal Failure Downtime Coût
internal_failure_downtime_cost.helper: Lost production Temps due to quality issues.

external_failure_warranty_cost.label: External Failure Warranty & Returns Coût
external_failure_warranty_cost.placeholder: Saisir external failure warranty & returns coût
external_failure_warranty_cost.helper: Coûts for warranty claims, returns, and replacements after delivery.

external_failure_liability_cost.label: External Failure Liability & Lost Sales Coût
external_failure_liability_cost.placeholder: Saisir external failure liability & lost sales coût
external_failure_liability_cost.helper: Coûts from lawsuits, penalties, and lost future sales due to poor quality.

quality_improvement_investment.label: Quality Improvement Investment (Optional)
quality_improvement_investment.helper: Additional investment in quality improvement initiatives (e.g., Six Sigma projects).

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Industry context for benchmarking and threshold adjustments.

include_hidden_drivers.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers
include_hidden_drivers.helper: Toggle to include intangible Coûts like lost customer goodwill and overtime.

order_volume.label: Order Volume (units)
order_volume.helper: Total Quantité of items in the quote. Higher Volumes may reduce unit Coût but increase risk exposure.

unit_price.label: Unit Prix ($)
unit_price.helper: Prix par unit quoted to the customer.

production_lead_time_days.label: Production Lead Temps (Jours)
production_lead_time_days.helper: Temps from order placement to delivery. Longer lead times increase demand forecast risk.

material_cost_variability.label: Matériau Coût Variability (%)
material_cost_variability.helper: Expected fluctuation in raw Matériau Coûts during the lead Temps. Based on historical volatility.

labor_skill_level.label: Labor Skill Level
labor_skill_level.helper: Skill level du workforce assigned to the project. Low skill increases defect risk.

quality_defect_rate.label: Historical Defect Taux (%)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Historical parcentage of defective units from similar production runs. utilisé for Six Sigma DPMO calculation.

logistics_complexity.label: Logistics Complexity Score
logistics_complexity.helper: Score based on number of shipping modes, customs requirements, and Distance. Higher score increases risk.

customer_credit_rating.label: Customer Credit Rating
customer_credit_rating.helper: Standard credit rating du customer. Lower ratings increase payment default risk.

contract_penalty_clause.label: Contract Penalty Clause
contract_penalty_clause.helper: Whether the contract includes penalty clauses for late delivery or non-conformance.

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux (par hour)
labor_rate.helper: Average hourly wage including burden for direct labor oparators.

labor_hours_per_cycle.label: Labor Heures par Cycle
labor_hours_per_cycle.helper: Standard Temps par production cycle (e.g., par unit or batch).

material_cost_per_unit.label: Matériau Coût par Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Matériau Coût par unit of output.

energy_cost_per_cycle.label: Énergie Coût par Cycle
energy_cost_per_cycle.helper: Electricity, gas, or other Énergie Coûts par production cycle.

maintenance_cost_per_cycle.label: Maintenance Coût par Cycle
maintenance_cost_per_cycle.helper: Average preventive and corrective maintenance Coût allocated par cycle.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Taux (%)
overhead_rate.helper: parcentage applied to direct Coûts to cover indirect expenses (ISO 14051).

cycle_time_minutes.label: Cycle Temps (minutes)
cycle_time_minutes.helper: Actual cycle Temps par unit; utilisé for throughput and efficiency calculations.

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux (%)
defect_rate.helper: parcentage of units that fail quality inspection (Six Sigma metric).

rework_cost_per_defect.label: Rework Coût par Defect
rework_cost_per_defect.helper: Additional Coût to rework or scrap a defective unit.

production_volume.label: Production Volume (units/month)
production_volume.helper: Monthly production Quantité utilisé to scale recurring Coûts.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: DeDuréeines labor multiplier and overhead allocation (Lean standard).

include_environmental_cost.label: Include Environmental Coût (ISO 14000)
include_environmental_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated environmental compliance and parte disposal Coûts.

system_capacity_kw.label: System Capacity (kW)
system_capacity_kw.helper: Total installed capacity du renewable Énergie system (solar, wind, etc.)

annual_energy_output_kwh.label: Annual Énergie Output (kWh)
annual_energy_output_kwh.helper: Expected annual electricity generation based on location, technology, and degradation factors

capital_cost_usd.label: Total Capital Coût (USD)
capital_cost_usd.helper: Total upfront investment including equipment, installation, parmits, and commissioning

annual_operating_cost_usd.label: Annual Oparating & Maintenance Coût (USD)
annual_operating_cost_usd.helper: Recurring Coûts for maintenance, insurance, monitoring, and repairs

electricity_price_usd_per_kwh.label: Grid Electricity Prix (USD/kWh)
electricity_price_usd_per_kwh.helper: Courant or projected Prix of grid electricity, utilisé pour calculer savings

inflation_rate_percent.label: Annual Inflation Taux (%)
inflation_rate_percent.helper: Expected annual inflation Taux affecting future electricity Prixs and Coûts

discount_rate_percent.label: Discount Taux (%)
discount_rate_percent.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital (WACC) or required Taux of return

system_lifetime_years.label: System Lifetime (Années)
system_lifetime_years.helper: Expected oparational life du renewable Énergie system

degradation_rate_percent.label: Annual Degradation Taux (%)
degradation_rate_percent.helper: Annual reduction in Énergie output due to aging (e.g., solar panel degradation)

incentive_tax_credit_percent.label: Tax Credit / Incentive (%)
incentive_tax_credit_percent.helper: One-Temps incentive or tax credit as parcentage of capital Coût (e.g., ITC)

carbon_credit_usd_per_ton.label: Carbon Credit Valeur (USD/ton CO2)
carbon_credit_usd_per_ton.helper: MoNetary Valeur par ton of CO2 avoided, if applicable

energy_source.label: Énergie Source Type
energy_source.helper: Type of renewable Énergie technology for benchmarking and degradation curves

include_carbon_benefits.label: Include Carbon Benefits in ROI?
include_carbon_benefits.placeholder: Saisir include carbon benefits in roi?
include_carbon_benefits.helper: Toggle to include or exclude carbon credit revenue in financial calculations

total_area_sqft.label: Total Renovation Surface (sq ft)
total_area_sqft.helper: Total Surface au sol to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.

scope_complexity.label: Scope Complexity
scope_complexity.helper: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.

material_quality.label: Matériau Quality Tier
material_quality.helper: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable Matériaus.

labor_efficiency_factor.label: Labor Efficiency Factor
labor_efficiency_factor.helper: Average Labor Heures par square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.

waste_factor_pct.label: parte Factor (%)
waste_factor_pct.helper: Expected Matériau parte parcentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.

contingency_pct.label: Contingency (%)
contingency_pct.helper: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).

region_cost_index.label: Regional Coût Index
region_cost_index.helper: Multiplier for local labor and Matériau Coût variations (1.0 = national average).

sustainability_target.label: Sustainability Cible
sustainability_target.helper: If pursuing certification, additional Coûts for documentation, commissioning, and Matériaus.

phased_renovation.label: Phased Renovation
phased_renovation.helper: True if renovation is done in phases (e.g., floor by floor) to reduce disruption.

avg_cover_price.label: Average Cover Prix (Menu Prix)
avg_cover_price.helper: Average Prix paid par guest for a main dish or complete meal as listed on the menu.

food_cost_per_cover.label: Alimentation Coût par Cover
food_cost_per_cover.helper: Direct Ingredient Coût allocated to each cover (plate Coût).

labor_cost_per_cover.label: Labor Coût par Cover
labor_cost_per_cover.helper: Direct labor (kitchen + service) Coût par guest.

overhead_per_cover.label: Overhead par Cover
overhead_per_cover.helper: location, utilities, insurance, and other Fixed Coûts allocated par cover.

waste_percentage.label: Alimentation parte parcentage
waste_percentage.helper: parcentage of Alimentation purchased that is discarded due to spoilage, overproduction, or plate parte.

theft_shrinkage_percentage.label: Theft & Shrinkage parcentage
theft_shrinkage_percentage.helper: Estimated loss of inventory due to theft, misreporting, or unrecorded Consommation.

discount_comp_percentage.label: Discount & Comp parcentage
discount_comp_percentage.helper: parcentage of revenue lost due to employee meals, promotions, comps, and discounts.

covers_per_period.label: Covers par pariod (Monthly)
covers_per_period.helper: Total number of guests served in the measurement pariod (month).

menu_engineering_score.label: Menu Engineering Score (1-10)
menu_engineering_score.helper: Subjective score of menu layout, item placement, and upselling effectiveness (1=poor, 10=excellent).

lean_kitchen_maturity.label: Lean Kitchen Maturity Level
lean_kitchen_maturity.helper: Maturity of Lean/Six Sigma practices in kitchen oparations (ISO 9001 / Lean principles).

fluid_type.label: Fluid Type
fluid_type.helper: Sélectionnez working fluid to auto-populate Densité and viscosity. Options include water, air, oil, and custom.

density.label: Fluid Densité
density.helper: Mass Densité du fluid at oparating temparature. For water at 20°C: 998.2 kg/m³.

dynamic_viscosity.label: Dynamic Viscosity
dynamic_viscosity.helper: Absolute viscosity du fluid. For water at 20°C: 0.001002 Pa·s.

velocity.label: Débit Velocity
velocity.helper: Average velocity du fluid in the pipe cross-section.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diamètre
pipe_diameter.helper: Internal Diamètre du pipe or conduit.

pipe_roughness.label: Pipe Roughness
pipe_roughness.helper: Average Hauteur of surface irregularities inside the pipe. For commercial steel: 0.000045 m.

temperature.label: Oparating Temparature
temperature.helper: Fluid temparature utilisé for viscosity and Densité corrections if applicable.

flow_regime_threshold.label: Débit Regime Threshold
flow_regime_threshold.helper: Sélectionnez threshold standard: 'standard' (Re<2300 laminar, 2300-4000 transitional, >4000 turbulent) or 'conservative' (Re<2000 laminar, 2000-3000 transitional, >3000 turbulent).

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and training Coûts.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash InDébit
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected annual Net cash inDébit from the investment (revenue increase or Coût savings).

annual_cash_outflow.label: Annual Cash OutDébit
annual_cash_outflow.helper: Annual oparating and maintenance Coûts associated with the investment.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (%)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital (WACC) or required Taux of return par ISO 15663.

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Années)
project_life_years.helper: Expected Durée de vie utile du investment par ISO 15686.

salvage_value.label: Valeur résiduelle
salvage_value.helper: Estimated residual Valeur At end of project life.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Taux (%)
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation Taux for adjusting future cash Débits.

tax_rate.label: Tax Taux (%)
tax_rate.helper: Effective corpoTaux tax Taux for after-tax cash Débit calculations.

risk_adjustment.label: Risk Adjustment Factor
risk_adjustment.helper: Multiplier to discount Taux for project risk (1.0 = baseline).

lean_six_sigma_savings.label: Lean Six Sigma Annual Savings
lean_six_sigma_savings.placeholder: Saisir lean six sigma annual savings
lean_six_sigma_savings.helper: Additional annual savings from Lean/Six Sigma improvements (DMAIC).

werc_throughput.label: WERC Throughput (units/year)
werc_throughput.helper: Annual throughput par WERC warehouse metrics.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect Taux (%)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Defect Taux par Six Sigma DPMO Cible (default 1.5% = 4 sigma).

building_length.label: Building Longueur
building_length.helper: Overall Longueur du building footprint along the ridge direction.

building_width.label: Building Largeur
building_width.helper: Overall Largeur du building footprint parpendicular to the ridge.

roof_pitch.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run ratio)
roof_pitch.helper: Ratio of vertical rise to horizontal run (e.g., 0.5 = 6:12 pitch).

overhang_length.label: Eave Overhang Longueur
overhang_length.helper: Horizontal projection du roof beyond the exterior wall.

number_of_floors.label: Number of Floors
number_of_floors.helper: Number of stories; affects complexity and potential parte factors.

waste_factor_percent.label: Matériau parte Factor
waste_factor_percent.helper: parcentage allowance for cutting, overlap, and installation losses (ISO 9001 parte reduction).

num_stops.label: Number of Stops
num_stops.helper: Total delivery or service stops on the route.

total_distance.label: Total Route Distance
total_distance.helper: Total Distance traveled for the route in kilometers.

avg_speed.label: Average Speed
avg_speed.helper: Average vehicle speed including traffic and stops.

dwell_time_per_stop.label: Dwell Temps par Stop
dwell_time_per_stop.helper: Average Temps spent at each stop for loading/unloading.

driver_hourly_rate.label: Driver Hourly Taux
driver_hourly_rate.helper: Hourly wage Coût for the driver.

vehicle_type.label: Vehicle Type
vehicle_type.helper: Type of vehicle utilisé for the route.

traffic_condition.label: Traffic Condition
traffic_condition.helper: Expected traffic condition along the route.

use_optimization.label: Use Optimization Algorithm
use_optimization.helper: Toggle to apply route optimization logic.

total_licenses.label: Total Licenses Purchased
total_licenses.helper: Total number of SaaS licenses paid for in the Courant pariod.

active_users.label: Active Users (Monthly)
active_users.helper: Number of distinct users who logged in at least once in the last 30 Jours.

license_cost_per_month.label: License Coût par Month
license_cost_per_month.helper: Monthly recurring Coût par license, including any fixed fees divided by license count.

implementation_cost.label: One-Temps Implementation Coût
implementation_cost.helper: Total Coût of onboarding, training, and integration for the SaaS tool.

monthly_support_cost.label: Monthly Support & Admin Coût
monthly_support_cost.helper: Recurring internal labor and third-party support Coûts to maintain the tool.

contract_months_remaining.label: Contract Months Restant
contract_months_remaining.helper: Number of months left in the Courant contract or commitment pariod.

utilization_threshold.label: Utilization Threshold for parte
utilization_threshold.helper: parcentage of active users vs total licenses below which licenses are considered shelfware (Lean parte).

annual_salary.label: Annual Salary (USD)
annual_salary.helper: Total gross annual compensation before taxes and deductions.

work_hours_per_week.label: Work Heures par Week
work_hours_per_week.helper: Standard contractual weekly working Heures, excluding unpaid breaks.

paid_weeks_per_year.label: Paid Weeks par Year
paid_weeks_per_year.helper: Total weeks compensated including vacation, sick leave, and holiJours.

overtime_multiplier.label: Overtime Multiplier
overtime_multiplier.helper: Standard overtime pay factor par FLSA or local labor law (e.g., 1.5x for >40 hrs/week).

benefits_percentage.label: Benefits & Overhead (% of Salary)
benefits_percentage.helper: parcentage of salary allocated to benefits (health, retirement, payroll taxes, training).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift diffelocationials affect effective hourly Coût; night/rotating shifts may require premium pay.

include_productivity_factor.label: Include Productivity Factor (Lean)
include_productivity_factor.helper: If true, applies a productivity loss factor (e.g., 85%) based on typical industrial engineering allowances.

net_sales.label: Net Sales Montant
net_sales.helper: Total revenue from taxable sales before any tax or discounts.

tax_rate.label: Sales Tax Taux
tax_rate.helper: Combined state and local sales tax Taux as a parcentage.

exempt_ratio.label: Exempt Sales Ratio
exempt_ratio.helper: parcentage of Net sales that are tax-exempt (e.g., resale, non-profit).

tax_jurisdiction.label: Tax Jurisdiction
tax_jurisdiction.helper: Level of tax authority: state only, state+county, or state+county+city.

use_sourcing.label: Sourcing Method
use_sourcing.helper: Origin-based (seller's location) or destination-based (achater's location) tax sourcing.

include_shipping.label: Include Shipping in Taxable Base
include_shipping.placeholder: Saisir include shipping in taxable base
include_shipping.helper: Whether shipping and handling charges are subject to sales tax.

shipping_charge.label: Shipping & Handling Charge
shipping_charge.helper: Total shipping and handling fees charged to customers.

project_duration_days.label: Project Durée (Jours)
project_duration_days.helper: Total planned Durée of scaffolding usage on site.

total_scaffold_area_sqm.label: Total Scaffold Surface (sqm)
total_scaffold_area_sqm.helper: Total surface Surface of scaffolding required.

rental_rate_per_sqm_per_day.label: locational Taux par sqm par day
rental_rate_per_sqm_per_day.placeholder: Saisir locational taux par sqm par day
rental_rate_per_sqm_per_day.helper: Daily locational Coût par square meter of scaffolding.

transport_cost_per_trip.label: Transport Coût par Trip
transport_cost_per_trip.helper: Coût par delivery or pickup trip for scaffolding Matériaus.

number_of_trips.label: Number of Transport Trips
number_of_trips.helper: Total trips for delivery and return of scaffolding.

erection_hours_per_sqm.label: Erection Heures par sqm
erection_hours_per_sqm.helper: Standard Labor Heures to erect one square meter of scaffolding.

dismantle_hours_per_sqm.label: Dismantle Heures par sqm
dismantle_hours_per_sqm.helper: Standard Labor Heures to dismantle one square meter.

utilization_rate.label: Utilization Taux (%)
utilization_rate.helper: parcentage of Temps scaffolding is actively utilisé vs idle.

waste_factor.label: parte Factor (%)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated Matériau loss or damage during project.

region.label: Region
region.helper: Geographic region affecting Labor Tauxs and standards.

include_insurance.label: Include Insurance Coût
include_insurance.helper: Whether to include insurance premium in Total Coût.

inputnumber.label: Entrée Number
inputnumber.helper: The numeric Valeur to be converted. Accepts any real number within double-precision floating-point range.

conversiondirection.label: Conversion Direction
conversiondirection.helper: Sélectionnez whether to convert from decimal to scientific notation or from scientific notation to decimal.

significantdigits.label: Significant Digits
significantdigits.helper: Number of significant digits in the scientific notation output. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the decimal output. utilisé when converting from scientific to decimal.

engineeringnotation.label: Engineering Notation
engineeringnotation.helper: If true, exponent is forced to a multiple of 3 for engineering applications (IEC 60027).

useepsilon.label: Use Epsilon Threshold
useepsilon.helper: If true, numbers below machine epsilon (2.22e-16) are flagged as potential underDébit.

total_units_produced.label: Total Units Produced
total_units_produced.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting pariod (e.g., shift, day, week).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units that failed quality inspection or are non-conforming.

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that were reworked to meet specifications (counted sepaTauxly from scrap).

material_cost_per_unit.label: Matériau Coût par Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Matériau Coût par unit in USD.

labor_cost_per_unit.label: Labor Coût par Unit
labor_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct labor Coût par unit in USD.

overhead_cost_per_unit.label: Overhead Coût par Unit
overhead_cost_per_unit.helper: Allocated overhead Coût par unit in USD.

process_stage.label: Process Stage
process_stage.helper: Stage in the production process where scrap is measured.

include_rework_in_scrap.label: Include Rework in Scrap Calculation
include_rework_in_scrap.placeholder: Saisir include rework in scrap calculation
include_rework_in_scrap.helper: If true, rework units are treated as scrap for Coût calculations (conservative approach).

total_work_content.label: Total Work Content (TWC)
total_work_content.helper: Sum of all standard times for oparations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 Temps measurement).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oparators
number_of_operators.helper: Total direct labor assigned to the line.

takt_time.label: Takt Temps
takt_time.helper: Customer demand Taux: available production Temps divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).

bottleneck_time.label: Bottleneck Station Temps
bottleneck_time.helper: Longest oparation Temps among all stations (Theory of Constraints).

line_balance_type.label: Line Balance Type
line_balance_type.helper: Configuration du sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).

allow_rebalancing.label: Allow Rebalancing
allow_rebalancing.helper: If true, the tool will suggest oparator reassignment to improve balance.

shift_duration_hours.label: Shift Durée (Heures)
shift_duration_hours.helper: Total scheduled shift Temps in Heures. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 Heures.

total_units_produced.label: Total Units Produced
total_units_produced.helper: Total Unités conformes produced during the shift, including reworked units.

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Units that failed quality inspection and are not reworkable.

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average fully loaded labor Coût par oparator par hour.

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oparators
number_of_operators.helper: Total oparators assigned to the shift.

material_cost_per_unit.label: Matériau Coût par Unit
material_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Matériau Coût par unit produced.

energy_cost_per_shift.label: Énergie Coût par Shift
energy_cost_per_shift.helper: Total Énergie Coût (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift type affects labor premiums and Énergie tariffs.

overtime_applied.label: Overtime Applied
overtime_applied.helper: Indicates if overtime Tauxs apply to any portion du shift.

direct_labor_hourly_rate.label: Direct Labor Hourly Taux
direct_labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift diffelocationials.

num_direct_labor_employees.label: Number of Direct Labor Employés
num_direct_labor_employees.placeholder: Saisir number of direct labor employés
num_direct_labor_employees.helper: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.

annual_operating_hours_per_employee.label: Annual Oparating Heures par Employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.placeholder: Saisir annual oparating heures par employee
annual_operating_hours_per_employee.helper: Standard annual Heures par employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 Heures). Adjust for overtime or part-Temps.

total_annual_overhead_costs.label: Total Annual Overhead Coûts
total_annual_overhead_costs.helper: All indirect Coûts: location, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.

total_annual_machine_costs.label: Total Annual Machine Coûts
total_annual_machine_costs.helper: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and Énergie Coûts for all production equipment.

average_shop_efficiency_percent.label: Average Shop Efficiency (%)
average_shop_efficiency_percent.helper: Efficacité globale des équipements (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, Préparation, and speed loss.

quality_yield_percent.label: Quality Yield (%)
quality_yield_percent.helper: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly Coût.

shift_premium_factor.label: Shift Premium Factor
shift_premium_factor.helper: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift oparations (accounts for shift diffelocationials).

include_benefits.label: Include Benefits & Payroll Taxes
include_benefits.helper: If true, adds 30% burden to direct Labor Taux for benefits, FICA, workers' comp, etc.

overhead_allocation_method.label: Overhead Allocation Method
overhead_allocation_method.helper: Basis for distributing overhead to hourly Taux. Direct Labor Heures is most common in job shops.

material_cost.label: Matériau Coût par Unit
material_cost.helper: Direct Coût of raw Matériaus par signage unit, including substTaux, ink, and laminates.

labor_hours.label: Labor Heures par Unit
labor_hours.helper: Standard direct Labor Heures required to produce one signage unit, based on Temps studies.

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux par Hour
labor_rate.helper: Fully burdened hourly wage including benefits, taxes, and overhead allocation.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Taux
overhead_rate.helper: parcentage applied to direct Coûts to cover facility, equipment, and administrative overhead.

complexity_factor.label: Complexity Factor
complexity_factor.helper: Adjusts labor and parte factors based on design complexity par ISO 9001 process variation guidelines.

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Defines inspection rigor and rework allowance based on Six Sigma quality levels.

quantity.label: Order Quantité
quantity.helper: Total number of signage units in the order, affecting Volume discounts and Préparation amortization.

waste_factor.label: parte Factor
waste_factor.helper: Expected Matériau parte parcentage due to Préparation, trimming, and defects, aligned with Lean manufacturing Cibles.

risk_margin.label: Risk Margin
risk_margin.helper: Additional margin to cover market volatility, Matériau Prix fluctuations, and unforeseen delays.

shipping_cost_per_unit.label: Shipping Coût par Unit
shipping_cost_per_unit.helper: Average freight Coût par unit based on Distance, Poids, and packaging.

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux (DPMO)
defect_rate.helper: Courant defects par million opportunities for the process under evaluation.

process_sigma.label: Courant Process Sigma Level
process_sigma.helper: Courant sigma level du process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.

annual_volume.label: Annual Unit Volume
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units produced or transactions processed par year.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût incurred par defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.

implementation_cost.label: Estimated Implementation Coût
implementation_cost.helper: Total Coût to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).

project_risk.label: Project Risk Level
project_risk.helper: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource Disponibilité, stakeholder achat-in).

strategic_alignment.label: StTauxgic Alignment Score
strategic_alignment.helper: How well the project aligns with organizational stTauxgic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).

customer_impact.label: Customer Impact Score
customer_impact.helper: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy and reliability du Entrée data (0% = guess, 100% = verified).

wake_time.label: Desired wake-up Temps (24h)
wake_time.helper: Cible end of sleep cycle; utilisé to back-Calculer optimal bedtimes.

sleep_debt_hours.label: Accumulated sleep debt (Heures)
sleep_debt_hours.helper: Cumulative deficit from prior nights; drives recovery need par sleep science.

cycle_length_minutes.label: Average sleep cycle Longueur
cycle_length_minutes.helper: Typical NREM/REM cycle Durée; 90 min is standard, adjustable par individual.

fall_asleep_minutes.label: Estimated Temps to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.placeholder: Saisir estimated Temps to fall asleep
fall_asleep_minutes.helper: Sleep onset latency; affects actual sleep start Temps.

recovery_efficiency.label: Recovery efficiency factor
recovery_efficiency.helper: Adjusts sleep debt repayment Taux (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = impaired recovery, >1.0 = enhanced).

shift_worker.label: Shift worker?
shift_worker.helper: Flag to apply circadian disruption penalty par ISO 10075-2.

current_changeover_time.label: Courant Changeover Temps (minutes)
current_changeover_time.helper: Total Temps from last good piece of previous run to first good piece of next run. Measured par SMED standard.

internal_operations_percentage.label: Internal Oparations (% of total Temps)
internal_operations_percentage.placeholder: Saisir internal oparations (% of total Temps)
internal_operations_percentage.helper: parcentage of changeover Temps where machine is stopped. Cible is to convert internal to external.

setup_team_size.label: Préparation Team Size (oparators)
setup_team_size.helper: Number of oparators directly involved in the changeover process.

parallel_work_possible.label: Parallel Work Possible
parallel_work_possible.helper: Indicates if tasks can be parformed simultaneously by multiple oparators (SMED principle).

standardization_level.label: Standardization Level
standardization_level.helper: Degree of standardized work instructions, tooling, and die design. High = minimal adjustments.

waste_motion_score.label: parte Motion Score (1-10)
waste_motion_score.helper: Subjective assessment of unnecessary movement, searching, and walking during changeover. 1 = optimal, 10 = extreme parte.

subgroup_size.label: Subgroup Size (n)
subgroup_size.helper: Number of samples par subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical Valeurs: 3-10.

num_subgroups.label: Number of Subgroups (k)
num_subgroups.helper: Total subgroups utilisé to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.

overall_mean.label: Overall Mean (X-double-bar)
overall_mean.helper: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.

average_range.label: Average Range (R-bar)
average_range.helper: Mean of subgroup ranges. utilisé to estimate process sigma.

usl.label: Uppar Specification Limit (USL)
usl.helper: Maximum acceptable Valeur par customer or design requirement.

lsl.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lsl.helper: Minimum acceptable Valeur par customer or design requirement.

chart_type.label: Chart Type
chart_type.helper: Sélectionnez control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.

use_estimated_sigma.label: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
use_estimated_sigma.placeholder: Saisir use estimated sigma from r-bar
use_estimated_sigma.helper: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.

process_cycle_time_min.label: Process Cycle Temps (minutes)
process_cycle_time_min.helper: Average Temps to complete one production cycle. utilisé to estimate units produced par shift.

units_per_cycle.label: Units par Cycle
units_per_cycle.helper: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

defect_rate_out_of_control.label: Defect Taux When Out of Control
defect_rate_out_of_control.placeholder: Saisir defect taux when out of control
defect_rate_out_of_control.helper: Expected defect parcentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

defect_rate_in_control.label: Defect Taux When In Control
defect_rate_in_control.placeholder: Saisir defect taux when in control
defect_rate_in_control.helper: Baseline defect parcentage when the process is stable and in control.

cost_per_defect.label: Coût par Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Coût incurred par defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

detection_delay_hours.label: Detection Delay (Heures)
detection_delay_hours.helper: Temps from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

response_delay_hours.label: Response Delay (Heures)
response_delay_hours.helper: Temps from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

shift_hours.label: Shift Heures par Day
shift_hours.helper: Number of production Heures par shift. utilisé pour calculer daily production Volume.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts par Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of shifts oparating par day.

operating_days_per_year.label: Oparating Jours par Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Number of Jours the plant opeTauxs annually.

signal_frequency_per_year.label: Out-of-Control Signal Frequency (par year)
signal_frequency_per_year.helper: Expected number of out-of-control signals par year based on historical SPC data.

cost_of_correction_per_event.label: Coût of Correction par Event
cost_of_correction_per_event.placeholder: Saisir coût of correction par event
cost_of_correction_per_event.helper: Average Coût to investigate and correct an out-of-control event (labor, Matériaus, downtime).

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.placeholder: Saisir include hidden losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include estimated hidden Coûts such as brand damage and lost future sales.

hidden_loss_multiplier.label: Hidden Loss Multiplier
hidden_loss_multiplier.helper: Multiplier applied to direct defect Coûts to estimate hidden losses (based on industry benchmarks).

area_sqft.label: Surface in Pieds carrés
area_sqft.helper: Total Surface to be converted from imparial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

measurement_accuracy.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
measurement_accuracy.helper: Defines the tolerance level du original measurement par ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

rounding_precision.label: Rounding Precision
rounding_precision.helper: Number of decimal places for the final Résultat. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

include_tolerance.label: Include Tolerance Band
include_tolerance.helper: If enabled, the output will include uppar and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

orifice_diameter.label: Orifice Diamètre
orifice_diameter.helper: Diamètre du trap orifice; typical failed traps have orifices from 1 mm to 20 mm.

steam_pressure.label: Steam Pression (gauge)
steam_pressure.helper: Gauge Pression of steam upstream du trap. Common industrial range 3–15 bar_g.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oparating Heures du steam system. Typical continuous process: 8000 h/yr.

steam_cost.label: Steam Coût
steam_cost.helper: Coût to geNetaux one metric tonne of steam, including Carburant, water treatment, and maintenance.

trap_type.label: Trap Type
trap_type.helper: Type of steam trap influences discharge coefficient and failure mode.

failure_mode.label: Failure Mode
failure_mode.helper: Failure mode deDuréeines effective orifice Surface and discharge coefficient.

condensate_recovery.label: Condensate Recovery
condensate_recovery.helper: Whether condensate is recovered; affects Net Énergie loss calculation.

actual_labor_cost.label: Actual Labor Coût
actual_labor_cost.helper: Total labor Coût incurred by subcontractor.

actual_material_cost.label: Actual Matériau Coût
actual_material_cost.helper: Total Matériau Coût incurred by subcontractor.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead parcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Overhead as parcentage of direct Coûts (ISO 9001 Coût accounting).

quality_rework_cost.label: Quality Rework Coût
quality_rework_cost.helper: Coût of rework due to non-conformance (Six Sigma DMAIC).

schedule_delay_penalty.label: Schedule Delay Penalty
schedule_delay_penalty.helper: Penalties incurred due to late delivery (Lean just-in-Temps).

waste_factor.label: parte Factor (Lean Muda)
waste_factor.helper: Estimated parte as parcentage of total direct Coûts (Lean manufacturing).

labor_efficiency_index.label: Labor Efficiency Index (LEI)
labor_efficiency_index.helper: Ratio of standard Labor Heures to actual Labor Heures (WERC DC metrics).

material_price_variance.label: Matériau Prix Variance
material_price_variance.helper: différence between standard and actual Matériau Prixs.

scope_change_cost.label: Scope Change Coût
scope_change_cost.helper: Additional Coûts from unapproved scope changes.

inventory_holding_cost.label: Inventory Holding Coût
inventory_holding_cost.helper: Coût of carrying excess inventory (WERC warehousing).

currency_exchange_loss.label: Currency Exchange Loss
currency_exchange_loss.helper: Loss due to unfavorable exchange Taux fluctuations.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of subcontractor contract influences margin risk.

use_lean_accounting.label: Use Lean Accounting Adjustments
use_lean_accounting.helper: Apply Lean accounting principles to Valeur stream Coûting.

contract_value.label: Contract Valeur (in base currency)
contract_value.helper: Total Valeur du supplier contract denominated in the base currency (e.g., USD).

foreign_exposure_pct.label: Foreign Currency Exposure (%)
foreign_exposure_pct.helper: parcentage of contract Valeur exposed to foreign currency fluctuations.

volatility_annual.label: Annual FX Volatility
volatility_annual.helper: Expected annualized standard deviation du foreign exchange Taux, based on historical data or market consensus.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: parcentage du foreign exposure that is hedged via forward contracts, options, or other instruments.

time_horizon_months.label: Temps Horizon (months)
time_horizon_months.helper: Durée over which the currency risk is assessed, typically matching the contract payment schedule.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level for Valeur-at-Risk (VaR) calculation. Higher levels indicate more conservative risk estimates.

supplier_credit_rating.label: Supplier Credit Rating (S&P equivalent)
supplier_credit_rating.helper: Credit rating du supplier, utilisé to adjust default probability and overall risk premium.

use_iso_31000.label: Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework
use_iso_31000.placeholder: Saisir apply iso 31000 risk management framework
use_iso_31000.helper: If enabled, the calculation incorpoTauxs ISO 31000 principles for risk identification, analysis, and evaluation.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Prix par Unit
purchase_price.helper: Negotiated Unit Prix from supplier contract.

defect_rate.label: Defect Taux (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts par million defective, Six Sigma metric.

inspection_cost_per_unit.label: Inspection Coût par Unit
inspection_cost_per_unit.helper: Coût of incoming quality inspection par unit.

freight_cost_per_unit.label: Freight Coût par Unit
freight_cost_per_unit.helper: Average shipping Coût par unit from supplier.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Temps (Jours)
lead_time_days.helper: Supplier lead Temps from order to delivery.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Coût Taux
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual inventory holding Coût as parcentage of unit Coût (Lean metric).

warranty_claim_rate.label: Warranty Claim Taux
warranty_claim_rate.helper: parcentage of units that Résultat in warranty claims.

average_claim_cost.label: Average Warranty Claim Coût
average_claim_cost.helper: Average Coût par warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

supplier_quality_level.label: Supplier Quality Level
supplier_quality_level.helper: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

use_eco_cost.label: Include Environmental Coût
use_eco_cost.helper: Toggle to include estimated carbon and parte disposal Coûts (ISO 14040).

co2_per_unit.label: CO2 Emissions par Unit
co2_per_unit.helper: Estimated carbon footprint par unit from supplier oparations.

carbon_tax_rate.label: Carbon Tax Taux
carbon_tax_rate.helper: Applicable carbon tax or internal Prix du carbone.

supplier_reliability_score.label: Supplier Reliability Score (0-100)
supplier_reliability_score.helper: Historical on-Temps delivery and quality parformance of key suppliers. Higher score indicates better reliability.

inventory_buffer_days.label: Inventory Buffer (Jours of Cover)
inventory_buffer_days.helper: Average Jours of inventory held to absorb demand or supply shocks. Based on lean inventory principles.

lead_time_variability.label: Lead Temps Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
lead_time_variability.placeholder: Saisir lead Temps variability (coefficient of variation)
lead_time_variability.helper: Standard deviation of lead Temps divided by mean lead Temps. Higher Valeurs indicate unpredictable supply.

single_source_dependency.label: Single Source Dependency (0-100%)
single_source_dependency.helper: parcentage of critical components sourced from a single supplier. High dependency increases risk.

geopolitical_risk_index.label: Geopolitical Risk Index (0-100)
geopolitical_risk_index.helper: Composite index of political instability, trade restrictions, and regional conflicts affecting supply chain.

demand_volatility.label: Demand Volatility (Coefficient of Variation)
demand_volatility.helper: Variability in customer demand over Temps. High volatility strains capacity and inventory.

transportation_disruption_probability.label: Transportation Disruption Probability (0-1)
transportation_disruption_probability.helper: Estimated likelihood of a major Transportation disruption (port closure, strike, etc.) in the next quarter.

quality_defect_rate.label: Quality Defect Taux (ppm)
quality_defect_rate.helper: Parts par million defective from incoming inspection. Six Sigma Cible is < 3.4 ppm.

cyber_risk_score.label: Cyber Risk Score (0-100)
cyber_risk_score.helper: Assessment of cybersecurity vulnerabilities in supply chain IT systems. Higher score indicates higher risk.

use_advanced_hedging.label: Enable Advanced Hedging StTauxgies
use_advanced_hedging.helper: If true, applies financial and oparational hedging models to mitigate currency and commodity risks.

target_value.label: Cible Valeur (T)
target_value.helper: The ideal nominal specification for the product characteristic (e.g., Longueur, Poids, voltage).

lower_spec_limit.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
lower_spec_limit.helper: Minimum acceptable Valeur par engineering or customer requirement.

upper_spec_limit.label: Uppar Specification Limit (USL)
upper_spec_limit.helper: Maximum acceptable Valeur par engineering or customer requirement.

cost_at_limit.label: Coût at Specification Limit (A₀)
cost_at_limit.helper: Estimated financial loss (rework, scrap, warranty) when a unit is exactly at the specification limit.

deviation_at_limit.label: Deviation at Limit (Δ)
deviation_at_limit.helper: Distance from Cible to the nearest specification limit (Δ = min(T-LSL, USL-T)).

production_volume.label: Production Volume (N)
production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced in the pariod.

inspection_rate.label: Inspection Taux (%)
inspection_rate.helper: parcentage of units inspected. utilisé to adjust hidden loss estimates.

loss_function_type.label: Loss Function Type
loss_function_type.helper: Type of quality characteristic: nominal-is-best (Cible), smaller-is-better (e.g., impurities), larger-is-better (e.g., strength).

include_hidden_factory.label: Include Hidden Factory Losses
include_hidden_factory.helper: If true, adds estimated losses from rework, inspection, and scrap that are not captured by the basic loss function.

available_work_time_seconds.label: Available Work Temps par Shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.placeholder: Saisir available work Temps par shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.helper: Total planned production Temps par shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

customer_demand_per_shift.label: Customer Demand par Shift (units)
customer_demand_per_shift.helper: Number of units required by the customer par shift.

cycle_time_seconds.label: Actual Cycle Temps (seconds)
cycle_time_seconds.helper: Measured average Temps to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck oparation.

changeover_time_minutes.label: Average Changeover Temps (minutes)
changeover_time_minutes.helper: Temps required to switch from one product variant to another, including Préparation and adjustments.

batch_size.label: Average Batch Size (units)
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Coût par Hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Saisir direct labor coût par hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production oparators.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead Taux (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of direct labor Coût allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., suparvision, utilities, maintenance).
