demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; utilisé to quantify demand uncertainty.

flexibility_strategy.label: Flexibility StTauxgy
flexibility_strategy.helper: Production stTauxgy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic Taux; utilisé in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict equations.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender-specific coefficients for BMR estimation par ISO 8996 and clinical standards.

weight.label: Body Poids
weight.helper: Primary driver of Énergie expenditure; utilisé in all BMR formulas.

height.label: Hauteur
height.helper: Hauteur influences lean body mass and BMR; utilisé in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity level (PAL) multiplier par WHO/FAO and ISO 8996 metabolic Taux classification.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat parcentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional Entrée for Katch-McArdle formula; improves accuracy for lean mass estimation.

isathlete.label: Athlete Mode
isathlete.helper: Activates adjusted activity multipliers for high-frequency training (6+ sessions/week).

production_volume_meters.label: Monthly Production Volume (meters)
production_volume_meters.helper: Total fabric produced par month, utilisé as baseline for parte ratio calculations.

fabric_type.label: Fabric Type
fabric_type.helper: Diffelocation fabric types have distinct parte generation profiles and recycling potential.

waste_percentage.label: Courant parte parcentage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Measured parte as a parcentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

rework_rate.label: Rework Taux (%)
rework_rate.helper: parcentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

defect_density.label: Defect Densité (defects par 1000 meters)
defect_density.helper: Number of defects par 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Énergie Coût ($/kWh)
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity Coût, utilisé pour calculer Énergie parte from inefficient processes.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Coût ($/hour)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage, utilisé to quantify labor parte from rework and idle Temps.

recycling_capability.label: Recycling Capability
recycling_capability.helper: Courant ability to recycle parte fabric, affecting parte disposal Coût and environmental impact.

iso_14001_certified.label: ISO 14001 Certified
iso_14001_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility has ISO 14001 environmental management certification, influencing parte reduction practices.

material_type.label: Matériau Type
material_type.helper: Sélectionnez Matériau category to apply appropriate thermal conductivity ranges and correction factors par ISO 8301.

temperature_k.label: Oparating Temparature
temperature_k.helper: Mean temparature du Matériau during oparation. Affects phonon scattering and electron Transport in solids.

thickness_m.label: Épaisseur
thickness_m.helper: Matériau Épaisseur in the direction of heat Débit. utilisé for thermal resistance calculation.

cross_section_area_m2.label: Cross-Sectional Surface
cross_section_area_m2.helper: Surface parpendicular to heat Débit. Critical for heat flux Densité calculations.

heat_flow_w.label: Heat Débit Taux
heat_flow_w.helper: Steady-state heat transfer Taux through the Matériau. Measured via calorimeter or heat flux sensor.

temperature_delta_k.label: Temparature différence
temperature_delta_k.helper: Temparature gradient across the Matériau Épaisseur. Drives conductive heat transfer.

moisture_content_pct.label: Moisture Content
moisture_content_pct.helper: parcentage of moisture by Volume. Increases effective thermal conductivity in porous Matériaus (WERC guidelines).

aging_factor.label: Aging Factor
aging_factor.helper: Multiplier accounting for Matériau degradation over Temps. Based on Six Sigma aging studies.

measurement_confidence.label: Measurement Confidence
measurement_confidence.helper: Confidence level in Entrée data quality. Affects data confidence adjustment in outputs.

observed_time.label: Observed Temps (seconds)
observed_time.helper: Average cycle Temps recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.

performance_rating.label: parformance Rating (%)
performance_rating.helper: Oparator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance parcentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Total allowance for fatigue, parsonal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).

frequency_per_cycle.label: Frequency par Cycle
frequency_per_cycle.helper: How many times the observed element occurs par complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections par assembly).

work_measurement_method.label: Work Measurement Method
work_measurement_method.helper: The technique utilisé to obtain the observed Temps; affects confidence and adjustment factors.

include_learning_curve.label: Include Learning Curve Adjustment
include_learning_curve.helper: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.

tool_cost.label: Tool Coût par Unit
tool_cost.helper: Purchase Prix of a single cutting tool or insert.

tool_life_parts.label: Tool Life (Parts par Tool)
tool_life_parts.helper: Average number of parts produced before tool replacement est obligatoire.

replacement_time_min.label: Replacement Temps
replacement_time_min.helper: Temps required to replace or index the tool.

machine_hourly_rate.label: Machine Hourly Taux
machine_hourly_rate.helper: Fully burdened Coût par hour of machine oparation (including labor, overhead, depreciation).

rework_rate.label: Rework Taux due to Wear
rework_rate.placeholder: Saisir rework taux due to wear
rework_rate.helper: parcentage of parts requiring rework due to tool wear, based on Six Sigma defect tracking.

rework_cost_per_part.label: Rework Coût par Part
rework_cost_per_part.helper: Average Coût to rework a defective part (Matériau, labor, overhead).

scrap_rate.label: Scrap Taux due to Wear
scrap_rate.placeholder: Saisir scrap taux due to wear
scrap_rate.helper: parcentage of parts scrapped due to tool wear beyond tolerance.

scrap_material_cost.label: Scrap Matériau Coût par Part
scrap_material_cost.placeholder: Saisir scrap matériau coût par part
scrap_material_cost.helper: Coût of raw Matériau lost par scrapped part.

tool_type.label: Tool Type
tool_type.helper: Matériau du cutting tool, affects wear Taux and Coût multipliers.

coolant_used.label: Coolant utilisé
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is utilisé; affects tool life and wear Taux.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Prix
purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for acquiring the asset (ISO 15663 lifecycle Coûting).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Énergie Coût
annual_energy_cost.helper: Yearly electricity, Carburant, or other Énergie Consommation Coûts (Lean Énergie efficiency).

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Coût
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Planned and unplanned maintenance expenses (Six Sigma reliability).

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Labor Coût
annual_labor_cost.helper: Oparator and technician wages directly attributable to the asset (WERC DC metrics).

annual_consumables_cost.label: Annual Consommables Coût
annual_consumables_cost.helper: Filters, lubricants, spare parts, and other recurring supplies.

useful_life_years.label: Durée de vie utile (Années)
useful_life_years.helper: Expected oparational lifespan par ISO 15663 or manufacturer specification.

salvage_value.label: Valeur résiduelle
salvage_value.helper: Residual Valeur At end of Durée de vie utile (accounting standard).

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (%)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital or hurdle Taux for NPV calculation.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Taux (%)
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation for future Coût escalation.

utilization_hours_per_year.label: Utilization Heures par Year
utilization_hours_per_year.helper: Actual oparating Heures par year (OEE Disponibilité).

downtime_cost_per_hour.label: Downtime Coût par Hour
downtime_cost_per_hour.helper: Lost revenue or penalty Coût par hour of unplanned downtime.

expected_downtime_hours_per_year.label: Expected Downtime Heures par Year
expected_downtime_hours_per_year.placeholder: Saisir expected downtime heures par year

training_cost_per_operator.label: Training Coût par Oparator
training_cost_per_operator.helper: Initial and recurring training Coût par oparator (Lean skill matrix).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oparators
number_of_operators.helper: Direct oparators assigned to the asset.

environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.label: Environmental Compliance Coût par Year
environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.placeholder: Saisir environmental compliance coût par year

asset_type.label: Asset Type
asset_type.helper: Category influences depreciation method and maintenance factors.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method for annual depreciation expense.

include_downtime.label: Include Downtime Coûts
include_downtime.helper: Toggle to include or exclude downtime-related Coûts in TCO.

base_salary.label: Base Annual Salary
base_salary.helper: Annual gross salary before any deductions or benefits.

bonus_percent.label: Cible Bonus (% of base salary)
bonus_percent.placeholder: Saisir cible bonus (% of base salary)
bonus_percent.helper: Typical annual bonus as a parcentage of base salary.

benefits_percent.label: Benefits Coût (% of base salary)
benefits_percent.placeholder: Saisir benefits coût (% of base salary)
benefits_percent.helper: Includes health insurance, retirement contributions, paid leave, etc. Typical range 25-40%.

payroll_tax_percent.label: Payroll Tax (% of base salary)
payroll_tax_percent.placeholder: Saisir payroll tax (% of base salary)
payroll_tax_percent.helper: Employer portion of Social Security and Medicare (FICA) in the US.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead Allocation (% of direct Coût)
overhead_percent.placeholder: Saisir overhead allocation (% of direct coût)
overhead_percent.helper: Facilities, equipment, IT, admin support allocated par employee.

training_cost.label: Annual Training Coût par Employee
training_cost.placeholder: Saisir annual training coût par employee
training_cost.helper: Direct Coût of training programs, certifications, and development.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: actual productive Temps vs. available Temps. 1 = full productivity.

turnover_rate.label: Annual Turnover Taux (%)
turnover_rate.helper: parcentage of Employés leaving par year. Drives replacement and ramp-up Coûts.

replacement_cost_percent.label: Replacement Coût (% of base salary)
replacement_cost_percent.placeholder: Saisir replacement coût (% of base salary)
replacement_cost_percent.helper: Coût of recruiting, hiring, and onboarding a replacement.

overtime_hours_per_week.label: Average Overtime Heures par Week
overtime_hours_per_week.placeholder: Saisir average overtime heures par week
overtime_hours_per_week.helper: Average weekly overtime Heures par employee.

overtime_premium.label: Overtime Premium (multiplier)
overtime_premium.helper: Typically 1.5x for Temps-and-a-half, 2x for double Temps.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Coût Drivers
include_hidden_costs.helper: Toggle to include absenteeism, engagement loss, and quality Coûts.

production_cost_per_unit.label: Production Coût par Unit (USD)
production_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct manufacturing Coût par unit (Matériaus, labor, overhead) at the producing entity.

market_price_per_unit.label: Market Prix par Unit (USD)
market_price_per_unit.helper: Arm's Longueur market Prix for comparable uncontrolled transactions.

volume_units.label: Transaction Volume (units)
volume_units.helper: Total number of units transferred between entities in the pariod.

tax_rate_producer.label: Producer Entity Tax Taux (%)
tax_rate_producer.helper: Effective corpoTaux tax Taux du producing entity's jurisdiction.

tax_rate_distributor.label: Distributor Entity Tax Taux (%)
tax_rate_distributor.helper: Effective corpoTaux tax Taux du distributing entity's jurisdiction.

transfer_price_current.label: Courant Transfer Prix (USD)
transfer_price_current.helper: Existing transfer Prix utilisé for intercompany transactions.

compliance_risk_tolerance.label: Compliance Risk Tolerance (Low/Medium/High)
compliance_risk_tolerance.helper: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's Longueur range, High = wider range.

include_lean_waste_factor.label: Include Lean parte Factor
include_lean_waste_factor.helper: If true, applies a parte reduction factor (muda) to production Coût based on Six Sigma process capability.

annual_volume.label: Annual Shipping Volume (units)
annual_volume.helper: Total number of units shipped par year across all modes.

avg_shipment_weight.label: Average Shipment Poids (kg)
avg_shipment_weight.helper: Average Poids par shipment, utilisé to compute freight Coût and risk exposure.

distance_km.label: Average Distance par Shipment (km)
distance_km.helper: Average haul Distance for each shipment, influences Carburant Coût and transit risk.

mode.label: Transport Mode
mode.helper: Primary mode of Transport: truck, rail, ocean, air.

fuel_price_per_liter.label: Carburant Prix (USD par liter)
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: Courant diesel or bunker Carburant Prix, utilisé for Variable Coût estimation.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Taux (USD par hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage for drivers/oparators, utilisé in labor Coût calculation.

transit_time_days.label: Transit Temps (Jours)
transit_time_days.helper: Expected door-to-door transit Temps, affects inventory carrying Coût and risk.

damage_rate_percent.label: Historical Damage Taux (%)
damage_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.

insurance_rate_per_1000.label: Insurance Taux (par $1000 Valeur)
insurance_rate_per_1000.helper: Premium par $1000 of declared cargo Valeur, utilisé for insurance Coût.

cargo_value_per_unit.label: Cargo Valeur par Unit (USD)
cargo_value_per_unit.helper: Average Valeur of each shipped unit, utilisé for risk exposure and insurance.

inventory_holding_cost_percent.label: Inventory Holding Coût (% of Valeur par year)
inventory_holding_cost_percent.placeholder: Saisir inventory holding coût (% of valeur par year)
inventory_holding_cost_percent.helper: Annual Coût to hold inventory as a parcentage of cargo Valeur, includes warehousing, capital Coût.

carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.label: Carbon Tax (USD par ton CO2)
carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.placeholder: Saisir carbon tax (usd par ton co2)
carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.helper: Regulatory Coût par metric ton of CO2 emitted, utilisé for environmental Coût.

use_lean_metrics.label: Apply Lean Metrics (takt Temps, parte)
use_lean_metrics.placeholder: Saisir apply lean metrics (takt Temps, parte)
use_lean_metrics.helper: If enabled, includes lean parte factors (overprocessing, waiting) in Coût and risk.

num_employees.label: Number of Employés
num_employees.helper: Total headcount at the start du pariod.

annual_turnover_rate.label: Annual Turnover Taux
annual_turnover_rate.helper: parcentage of Employés leaving par year (voluntary + involuntary).

avg_salary.label: Average Annual Salary par Employee
avg_salary.placeholder: Saisir average annual salary par employee
avg_salary.helper: Average total compensation (base + benefits) par employee.

onboarding_cost_per_hire.label: Onboarding Coût par Hire
onboarding_cost_per_hire.helper: Training Matériaus, orientation, IT Préparation, mentor Temps.

training_cost_per_hire.label: Training Coût par Hire (first year)
training_cost_per_hire.placeholder: Saisir training coût par hire (first year)

lost_productivity_months.label: Lost Productivity Durée
lost_productivity_months.helper: Average months of reduced output par new hire (ramp-up pariod).

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor during Ramp-up
productivity_factor.helper: Average productivity level during ramp-up (e.g., 50% means half output).

exit_interview_cost_per_leaver.label: Exit Interview Coût par Leaver
exit_interview_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Saisir exit interview coût par leaver

overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.label: Overtime Cover Coût par Leaver
overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Saisir overtime cover coût par leaver
overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.helper: Extra pay for Restant staff covering duties.

quality_defect_cost_per_leaver.label: Quality Defect Coût par Leaver
quality_defect_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Saisir quality defect coût par leaver
quality_defect_cost_per_leaver.helper: Rework, scrap, customer complaints due to inexparience.

customer_impact_cost_per_leaver.label: Customer Impact Coût par Leaver
customer_impact_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Saisir customer impact coût par leaver

knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver.label: Knowledge Loss Coût par Leaver
knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Saisir knowledge loss coût par leaver
knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver.helper: Loss of institutional knowledge, intellectual proparty.

include_indirect_costs.label: Include Indirect Coûts
include_indirect_costs.helper: Toggle to include quality, customer, and knowledge loss Coûts.

leak_diameter_mm.label: Equivalent Leak Diamètre (mm)
leak_diameter_mm.helper: Estimated Diamètre du leak orifice, typically measured via ultrasonic leak detector or Débit test.

system_pressure_bar.label: System Pression (bar gauge)
system_pressure_bar.helper: Oparating Pression du compressed air system at the point of leak.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oparating Heures par Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total annual Heures the vacuum/compressed air system is in oparation.

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Coût ($/kWh)
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average Coût of electricity par kilowatt-hour, including demand charges if applicable.

compressor_specific_power.label: Compressor Specific Puissance (kW par 100 cfm)
compressor_specific_power.placeholder: Saisir compressor specific puissance (kw par 100 cfm)
compressor_specific_power.helper: Puissance Consommation du compressor par 100 cfm of free air delivered. Typical range 16-22 kW/100 cfm for rotary screw compressors.

ambient_temperature_c.label: Ambient Temparature (°C)
ambient_temperature_c.helper: Average ambient temparature at compressor intake, affects air Densité and mass Débit.

leak_type.label: Leak Type (Orifice Shape Factor)
leak_type.helper: Shape factor affects discharge coefficient. Round is typical for drilled holes; sharp for cracks; long for pipes.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon Coût Calculation
include_carbon_cost.helper: If enabled, calculates CO2 emissions and associated Coût based on grid emission factor.

emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kwh.label: Grid Emission Factor (kg CO2/kWh)
emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kwh.helper: Average CO2 emissions par kWh of electricity consumed. Varies by region (e.g., US average ~0.4, China ~0.6).

vector1_magnitude.label: Vector 1 Magnitude
vector1_magnitude.helper: Magnitude du first force/velocity vector in Newtons (N) or m/s. Typical range for industrial applications: 0.1–100,000 N.

vector1_angle.label: Vector 1 Angle
vector1_angle.helper: Direction du first vector measured from positive x-axis (0° to 360°). utilisé in force analysis par ISO 80000-2.

vector2_magnitude.label: Vector 2 Magnitude
vector2_magnitude.helper: Magnitude du second vector. Common in multi-force systems (e.g., conveyor belt tensions, robotic arm loads).

vector2_angle.label: Vector 2 Angle
vector2_angle.helper: Direction du second vector. Typical angles: 0° (horizontal), 90° (vertical), 180° (opposite).

unit_system.label: Unit System
unit_system.helper: Sélectionnez SI (metric) or Imparial (lb, ft/s) for output consistency. ISO 1000 recommends SI for engineering calculations.

confidence_level.label: Data Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Confidence in Entrée measurement accuracy (e.g., from sensor calibration). utilisé for Six Sigma risk adjustment.

conductor_material.label: Conductor Matériau
conductor_material.helper: Matériau affects resistivity; coppar and aluminum are common in industrial installations.

conductor_size.label: Conductor Size (AWG or kcmil)
conductor_size.helper: Cross-sectional Surface deDuréeines resistance par unit Longueur.

circuit_length.label: One-Way Circuit Longueur
circuit_length.helper: Distance from source to load; longer runs increase voltage drop.

load_current.label: Courant de charge (Ampares)
load_current.helper: Courant drawn by the load; higher Courant increases drop.

system_voltage.label: System Voltage (Line-to-Line)
system_voltage.helper: Nominal voltage du system; utilisé to compute parcentage drop.

phase_type.label: Phase Type
phase_type.helper: Single-phase or three-phase affects the voltage drop formula (factor sqrt(3) for three-phase).

power_factor.label: Puissance Factor (cos φ)
power_factor.helper: Reactive component increases effective Courant; typical industrial PF is 0.8-0.95.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temparature
ambient_temperature.helper: Temparature affects conductor resistance; higher temparature increases resistance.

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Total customer demand par year for the product family under analysis.

sellingprice.label: Selling Prix par unit
sellingprice.helper: Average Selling Prix par unit to the customer.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Coût par hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Fully loaded labor Coût par oparator hour.

totalcycletime.label: Total Cycle Temps (minutes)
totalcycletime.helper: Sum of all process cycle times for one unit through the Valeur stream.

totalvalueaddedtime.label: Total Valeur-Added Temps (minutes)
totalvalueaddedtime.helper: Sum of only Valeur-added process times (ISO 22400, Lean definition).

defectrate.label: Defect Taux (%)
defectrate.helper: parcentage of units that require rework or are scrapped (First Pass Yield).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Coût par defective unit
reworkcostperunit.placeholder: Saisir rework coût par defective unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional Coût to rework one defective unit (labor + Matériau).

inventoryholdingcostpercent.label: Inventory Holding Coût (% of COGS)
inventoryholdingcostpercent.placeholder: Saisir inventory holding coût (% of cogs)
inventoryholdingcostpercent.helper: Annual inventory carrying Coût as a parcentage of Coût of goods sold (WERC standard).

averageinventoryvalue.label: Average Inventory Valeur (currency)
averageinventoryvalue.helper: Average Valeur of raw Matériau, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Taux (% of direct labor)
overheadrate.placeholder: Saisir overhead taux (% of direct labor)
overheadrate.helper: Manufacturing overhead allocated as a parcentage of direct labor Coût.

operatorspershift.label: Oparators par shift
operatorspershift.helper: Number of direct oparators working par shift in the Valeur stream.

shiftsperday.label: Shifts par day
shiftsperday.helper: Number of production shifts par day.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Jours par year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of oparating Jours par year.

wastereductiontarget.label: parte Reduction Cible (%)
wastereductiontarget.helper: Cible parcentage reduction in non-Valeur-added Temps (Lean continuous improvement).

total_floor_area.label: Total Surface au sol
total_floor_area.helper: Total available warehouse floor space in Pieds carrés.

storage_area_percent.label: Storage Surface parcentage
storage_area_percent.helper: parcentage of total Surface au sol dedicated to storage (pallet racks, shelving).

aisle_width.label: Aisle Largeur
aisle_width.helper: Largeur of main travel aisles in feet.

pallet_flow_type.label: Pallet Débit Type
pallet_flow_type.helper: Type of pallet storage system utilisé.

avg_pallet_size.label: Average Pallet Size (footprint)
avg_pallet_size.helper: Average footprint of a single pallet (Longueur x Largeur).

avg_inventory_turns.label: Average Inventory Turns par Year
avg_inventory_turns.placeholder: Saisir average inventory turns par year
avg_inventory_turns.helper: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Coût par Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse oparators.

equipment_cost_per_hour.label: Equipment Coût par Hour
equipment_cost_per_hour.helper: Hourly Coût of Matériau handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).

order_lines_per_day.label: Order Lines par Day
order_lines_per_day.helper: Average number of order lines processed daily.

storage_utilization.label: Storage Utilization Taux
storage_utilization.helper: Courant parcentage of storage positions occupied.

layout_type.label: Layout Type
layout_type.helper: Warehouse layout configuration based on aisle Largeur and equipment.

include_cross_dock.label: Include Cross-Dock Surface
include_cross_dock.helper: Whether a dedicated cross-docking zone is included in the layout.

numemployees.label: Number of Employés
numemployees.helper: Total full-Temps equivalent Employés on site.

workdaysperyear.label: Work Jours par Year
workdaysperyear.helper: Number of oparating Jours par year.

avgwateruseperpersonperday.label: Average Water Use par parson par Day
avgwateruseperpersonperday.placeholder: Saisir average water use par parson par day
avgwateruseperpersonperday.helper: Estimated daily water Consommation par employee (drinking, sanitation, cleaning).

processwaterintensity.label: Process Water Intensity
processwaterintensity.helper: Water utilisé par unit of production output (e.g., liters par product).

leakagefactor.label: Leakage Factor
leakagefactor.helper: Estimated parcentage of water lost due to leaks in the distribution system.

recyclingrate.label: Water Recycling Taux
recyclingrate.helper: parcentage of process water that is treated and reutilisé.

seasonalfactor.label: Seasonal Adjustment Factor
seasonalfactor.helper: Multiplier to account for seasonal variations (e.g., summer peak).

industrytype.label: Industry Type
industrytype.helper: Sélectionnez industry sector to apply appropriate benchmarks.

totalwaterin.label: Total Water Entrée (m³)
totalwaterin.helper: Total Volume of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).

productionoutput.label: Production Output (units)
productionoutput.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting pariod.

processwater.label: Process Water utilisé (m³)
processwater.helper: Water directly utilisé in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).

coolingwater.label: Cooling Water Makeup (m³)
coolingwater.helper: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.

wastewaterdischarge.label: partewater Discharge (m³)
wastewaterdischarge.helper: Volume of partewater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.

recycledwater.label: Recycled Water (m³)
recycledwater.helper: Volume of water treated and reutilisé within the facility.

leakagelosses.label: Leakage Losses (m³)
leakagelosses.helper: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.

industrytype.label: Industry Type
industrytype.helper: Industry classification utilisé for benchmarking and normalization.

watercostperm3.label: Water Coût (currency/m³)
watercostperm3.helper: Average Coût par cubic meter of water including supply and partewater treatment.

enableadvancedanalysis.label: Enable Advanced Analysis
enableadvancedanalysis.helper: If true, enables hidden loss driver detection and suggested actions.

weld_type.label: Weld Type
weld_type.helper: DeDuréeines the geometry factor and stress distribution model par AWS D1.1.

base_material_yield_strength.label: Base Matériau Yield Strength
base_material_yield_strength.helper: Yield strength du weaker base Matériau (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

weld_material_tensile_strength.label: Weld Matériau Tensile Strength
weld_material_tensile_strength.helper: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

throat_thickness.label: Effective Gorge Épaisseur
throat_thickness.helper: Minimum Gorge dimension par ISO 5817 quality level B.

applied_load.label: Applied Load
applied_load.helper: Service load acting on the weld joint.

load_angle.label: Load Angle (from weld axis)
load_angle.helper: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (ISO 5817)
quality_level.helper: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=modeTaux, D=basic.

inspection_method.label: Inspection Method
inspection_method.helper: NDT method utilisé; affects confidence factor.

is_fatigue_loading.label: Fatigue Loading
is_fatigue_loading.helper: If true, applies S-N curve reduction par AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

joint_type.label: Joint Type
joint_type.helper: Sélectionnez weld joint geometry par ISO 9692. Affects Volume calculation formula.

plate_thickness.label: Plate Épaisseur (t)
plate_thickness.helper: Épaisseur du base metal. Critical for groove Volume calculation.

root_face.label: Root Face (f)
root_face.helper: Land at the root du groove. Affects effective Profondeur.

root_gap.label: Root Gap (g)
root_gap.helper: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld Volume.

groove_angle.label: Groove Angle (α)
groove_angle.helper: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range par AWS D1.1.

leg_length.label: Leg Longueur (for fillet)
leg_length.helper: Fillet weld leg size. Only utilisé when joint_type = fillet.

weld_process.label: Welding Process
weld_process.helper: Sélectionnez welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and Labor Taux.

material_density.label: Matériau Densité
material_density.helper: Densité of weld metal. Steel ~7.85, Aluminum ~2.7, Stainless ~8.0.

labor_rate.label: Labor Taux
labor_rate.helper: Hourly Coût of welder including overhead.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Taux
overhead_rate.helper: parcentage added to direct labor for indirect Coûts.

consumable_cost_per_kg.label: Consumable Coût par kg
consumable_cost_per_kg.helper: Coût of filler metal par kilogram.

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited metal to consumed filler. Varies by process: SMAW~65%, GMAW~90%, FCAW~85%, SAW~99%, GTAW~95%.

operator_factor.label: Oparator Factor
operator_factor.helper: parcentage of total Temps that the welder is actually depositing metal. Typical range 20-50%.

weld_speed.label: Weld Speed
weld_speed.helper: Travel speed du welding arc. Affects deposition Taux and Temps.

wire_feed_speed.label: Wire Feed Speed (if applicable)
wire_feed_speed.helper: Only for GMAW/FCAW processes. utilisé pour calculer deposition Taux.

wire_diameter.label: Wire Diamètre
wire_diameter.helper: Diamètre of filler wire. Affects cross-sectional Surface and deposition Taux.

use_premium_data.label: Use Premium Data (historical trends)
use_premium_data.helper: If true, adjusts deposition efficiency and oparator factor based on historical data from premium database.

weld_length_mm.label: Weld Longueur (mm)
weld_length_mm.helper: Total Longueur du weld joint to be deposited.

weld_throat_mm.label: Weld Gorge Épaisseur (mm)
weld_throat_mm.helper: Effective Gorge Épaisseur du fillet or groove weld.

material_density_g_per_cm3.label: Matériau Densité (g/cm³)
material_density_g_per_cm3.helper: Densité du base and filler Matériau (typical steel ~7.85).

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency (%)
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Taux (USD/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor Coût for welder.

welding_speed_mm_per_min.label: Welding Speed (mm/min)
welding_speed_mm_per_min.helper: Travel speed du welding torch along the joint.

filler_wire_cost_per_kg.label: Filler Wire Coût (USD/kg)
filler_wire_cost_per_kg.helper: Coût par kilogram of filler wire or electrode.

gas_cost_per_liter.label: Shielding Gas Coût (USD/L)
gas_cost_per_liter.helper: Coût par liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).

gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.label: Gas Débit Taux (L/min)
gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.helper: Débit Taux of shielding gas during welding.

welding_power_kw.label: Welding Puissance (kW)
welding_power_kw.helper: Average Puissance Consommation du welding machine during oparation.

overhead_rate_per_hour.label: Overhead Taux (USD/hour)
overhead_rate_per_hour.helper: Facility and equipment overhead allocated par hour of welding.

rework_rate_percent.label: Rework Taux (%)
rework_rate_percent.helper: parcentage of welds requiring rework (defect Taux).

rework_cost_factor.label: Rework Coût Factor
rework_cost_factor.helper: Multiplier on original Coût to account for rework (cutting, re-welding, inspection).

weld_process_type.label: Welding Process Type
weld_process_type.helper: Standard arc welding process par AWS A3.0.

use_premium_material.label: Use Premium Filler Matériau
use_premium_material.helper: Toggle to apply a 20% Coût premium for high-parformance filler wire.

basic_wind_speed.label: Basic Wind Speed (V)
basic_wind_speed.helper: Design wind speed at 10m Hauteur for the location, typically from local building codes.

terrain_category.label: Terrain Category
terrain_category.helper: Terrain roughness par ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.

building_height.label: Building Hauteur (z)
building_height.helper: Hauteur above ground to the top du structure.

exposure_factor.label: Exposure Factor (Ce)
exposure_factor.helper: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, par ASCE 7.

gust_factor.label: Gust Effect Factor (G)
gust_factor.helper: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.

pressure_coefficient.label: Pression Coefficient (Cp)
pressure_coefficient.helper: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).

air_density.label: Air Densité (ρ)
air_density.helper: Standard air Densité at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.

is_cyclic_loading.label: Cyclic Loading Consideration
is_cyclic_loading.helper: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor par ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.

turbine_capacity.label: Turbine Tauxd Capacity (MW)
turbine_capacity.helper: Nameplate capacity du wind turbine model under evaluation.

capacity_factor.label: Capacity Factor (%)
capacity_factor.helper: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

capital_cost_per_mw.label: Capital Coût par MW (USD)
capital_cost_per_mw.helper: Total installed Coût par MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

opex_per_mwh.label: Oparating Expenditure (USD/MWh)
opex_per_mwh.helper: Annual oparations and maintenance Coût par MWh geNetauxd (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

electricity_price.label: Electricity Selling Prix (USD/MWh)
electricity_price.helper: Puissance purchase agreement Prix or wholesale market Prix par MWh.

discount_rate.label: Discount Taux (%)
discount_rate.helper: Poidsed average Coût of capital (WACC) utilisé for Net present Valeur calculation.

project_lifetime.label: Project Lifetime (Années)
project_lifetime.helper: Expected oparational life du wind farm (typically 20-25 Années).

degradation_rate.label: Annual Degradation Taux (%)
degradation_rate.helper: Expected annual reduction in Énergie production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

incentive_tax_credit.label: Production Tax Credit (USD/MWh)
incentive_tax_credit.helper: Government incentive par MWh geNetauxd (e.g., US PTC).

grid_availability.label: Grid Disponibilité (%)
grid_availability.helper: parcentage of Temps the grid is available to accept Puissance (curtailment factor).

turbine_type.label: Turbine Type
turbine_type.helper: Technology classification affecting O&M Coût profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance StTauxgy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and Coût.

material_thickness.label: Matériau Épaisseur (mm)
material_thickness.helper: Épaisseur du base metal to be welded, measured in millimeters.

carbon_equivalent.label: Carbon Equivalent (CE)
carbon_equivalent.helper: Carbon equivalent Valeur calculated from Matériau composition (IIW formula).

hydrogen_level.label: Hydrogen Level (ml/100g weld metal)
hydrogen_level.helper: Diffusible hydrogen content du welding consumable, par ISO 3690.

heat_input.label: Heat Entrée (kJ/mm)
heat_input.helper: Arc Énergie par unit Longueur of weld, calculated from voltage, Courant, and travel speed.

joint_restraint.label: Joint Restraint Factor
joint_restraint.helper: Degree of mechanical restraint on the weld joint, affecting crack susceptibility.

preheat_method.label: Preheat Method
preheat_method.helper: Method utilisé to apply preheat, influences heating Taux and uniformity.

sectorFooter.tagline: Outils de calcul sectoriels pour la production, l'industrie et les décisions opérationnelles.
sectorFooter.noteBody: Les calculateurs servent à l'évaluation préliminaire et à l'aide à la décision. Vérifiez avec vos propres données avant toute décision commerciale critique.

inputGuide.title: Guide de saisie
inputGuide.description: Ce schéma indique quelle mesure ou quelle valeur correspond à chaque champ.

standard.title: Usage agreement
standard.body: This calculation provides a preliminary assessment based on your inputs and DéDuréeiniste methodology. Results do not replace quotes, investment, Moteurering, tax, legal, or safety Décisions. For Critique Décisions, verify with your own data, qualified exparts, and applicable regulations.

elevated.title: Important usage notice
elevated.body: This tool models commercial or compliance-sensitive exposure. Sorties are indicative only and must be validated against your contracts, payroll records, and local rules before Action.

engineering.title: Moteurering reference notice
engineering.body: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity Décisions require authorized Moteurering review.

standards.selectorNote: Default follows Région; you may switch reference systems for comparison.
standards.engineeringWarning: This tool provides standard-referenced pre-calculation only. Final design, safety, and conformity Décisions require authorized Moteurering review.
